This pattern is consistent with merge-level weight drift progressively erasing evaluator-interface priors, and suggests that interface repair and curriculum scheduling target distinct failure modes. We further report a cross-dataset transfer observation on SVHN, where direct base-model generation without curriculum warmup yields 27% peak SR at substantially lower accuracy (60.5%) than the CIFAR-10 equivalent, consistent with the increased synthesis difficulty of the unq-family anchor architecture.

</details>


### [170] [Backbone-Agnostic Perturbation-Induced Uncertainty Learning for End-to-End Real-World Image Dehazing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11623)
*Bingcai Wei*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为BPUL的即插即用不确定性学习框架，用于端到端的真实世界图像去雾。该方法通过可学习的扰动诱导不确定性调制器（LPUM）估计特征敏感性，并利用传输和大气光先验设计了先验引导的重建模块（PURM），同时引入双空间域多样化分布感知对比损失（$D^3$CL）以增强鲁棒性。实验表明，BPUL在多个真实世界配对基准上均显著提升多种骨干网络性能，且推理时仅保留LPUM，带来显著恢复增益而额外开销极小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实世界图像去雾面临雾霾退化空间非均匀、光照依赖及物理模糊等挑战，现有方法多将去雾视为确定性映射，忽视了退化特征、雾霾先验和跨域负样本中的不确定性，导致恢复效果受限。

Method: 提出BPUL框架，包含：1）可学习扰动诱导不确定性调制器（LPUM），通过重参数化随机扰动估计通道与空间维度的特征敏感性；2）先验引导的不确定性重建模块（PURM），利用传输与大气光先验重构观测图像并保证退化一致性；3）双空间域多样化分布感知对比损失（$D^3$CL），在真实与合成负样本下正则化清洁恢复与雾化重构空间。

Result: 在五个真实世界配对基准上，BPUL显著提升多个代表性骨干网络的去雾性能。由于推理阶段仅保留LPUM，而PURM和$D^3$CL仅用于训练，因此实现显著恢复增益的同时仅增加极小的推理开销。

Conclusion: BPUL是一种高效且通用的不确定性学习框架，能够有效建模真实世界去雾中的复杂不确定性，显著提升去雾质量，同时保持轻量级推理特性。

Abstract: Real-world paired image dehazing remains challenging because haze degradation is spatially non-uniform, illumination-dependent, and physically ambiguous even when haze-free references are available. Existing end-to-end restoration networks usually formulate dehazing as a deterministic mapping from a hazy observation to a clean target, leaving the uncertainty hidden in degraded features, haze priors, and cross-domain negative samples insufficiently explored. In this paper, we propose Backbone-Agnostic Perturbation-Induced Uncertainty Learning (BPUL), a plug-and-play uncertainty learning framework for end-to-end real-world image dehazing. BPUL first introduces a Learnable Perturbation-induced Uncertainty Modulator (LPUM) that estimates channel-wise and spatial-wise feature sensitivity through reparameterized stochastic perturbations. It then develops a Prior-informed Uncertainty-guided Reconstruction Module (PURM), which exploits transmission and atmospheric-light priors to reconstruct the hazy observation from the restored result and enforce degradation consistency. Furthermore, we propose a Dual-space Domain-diversified Distribution-aware Contrastive Loss ($D^3$CL) to regularize both clean restoration and hazy reconstruction spaces with real-world and synthetic negatives. Experiments on five real-world paired benchmarks show that BPUL consistently improves multiple representative backbones. Since only LPUM is retained during inference while PURM and $D^3$CL are used as training-time constraints, BPUL brings substantial restoration gains with only marginal additional inference overhead.

</details>


### [171] [Motion4Motion: Motion Transfer Across Subjects at Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11644)
*Ling-Hao Chen,Zixin Yin,Duomin Wang,Xianfang Zeng,Gang Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练的运动迁移框架Motion4Motion，通过建模视频中角色的运动流而非依赖预定义的人体骨骼结构，实现了跨物种的运动迁移。该方法克服了传统骨架依赖方法在多样角色（如不同物种动物）上泛化能力差及标注数据稀缺的问题，在实验和新应用中表现优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频运动迁移方法主要依赖人体骨骼结构和骨架条件模型训练，难以推广到非人类角色（如不同物种的动物），且受限于多样骨骼标注数据的稀缺性，导致无法大规模训练。因此亟需一种不依赖骨架、可泛化至多样化角色的运动迁移方法。

Method: 提出Motion4Motion框架，跳脱传统的骨架依赖范式，直接建模视频中角色的运动流，实现无需训练的跨物种运动迁移。

Result: 在多个实验中，Motion4Motion显著优于现有基线方法，能够有效保留不同角色的独特运动风格，并支持新颖的应用场景。

Conclusion: Motion4Motion通过基于运动流的建模方式，成功实现无需训练的跨物种运动迁移，突破了传统骨架依赖方法的局限，为动画创作提供了更灵活、通用的技术路径。

Abstract: This work explores the motion transfer from one video to another, which is crucial in animation for diverse characters. Previously, video motion transfer has been largely explored between human and human-like characters, enabling a lot of applications in digital creation. However, these approaches encounter a main limitation. Specifically, related technical pipelines heavily rely on a predefined human skeleton structure and accordingly require skeleton-conditional model training. On the one hand, these methods are difficult to generalize to diverse characters, such as animals from different species, while preserving their unique motion styles. On the other hand, labeled data in diverse skeletons is limited, which additionally restricts the large-scale training for the task. In this paper, we jump out of the skeleton-based motion transfer framework and propose a training-free motion transfer framework, named Motion4Motion. Motion4Motionmodels the motion flow of the character in a video instead of skeletons, which makes motion transfer across species easier. Extensive experimental results and novel applications show our methods outperform baselines impressively. Project page is available at https://lhchen.top/Motion4Motion.

</details>


### [172] [Event-RGB Adaptive Tracking for Nighttime Highway Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11646)
*Haidong Wang,Hengxing Cai,Wanlei Li,Xiaogang Xiong,Renxin Zhong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 针对高速公路夜间低光照条件下RGB相机感知性能下降的问题，本文提出一种新型的联合事件-图像自适应跟踪框架（JEAT），通过动态融合异步事件流与RGB帧，利用自适应扩展卡尔曼滤波器根据测量噪声实时调整模态权重，在暗光或高速运动时侧重事件数据，明亮或静止时侧重图像数据。同时构建了大规模合成数据集SEHN，涵盖昼夜、无照明夜间及不同交通密度场景，支持多模态融合研究。代码与数据集将开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于RGB的智能交通系统在夜间无照明、高车速环境下因运动模糊、曝光不足和信噪比低导致感知性能严重下降，亟需更鲁棒的多模态感知方案。

Method: 提出JEAT框架，采用自适应扩展卡尔曼滤波结合NIS统计量动态估计测量噪声，实现事件流与RGB帧的联合数据关联优化与自适应融合；使用CARLA仿真器构建大规模合成数据集SEHN，提供同步的RGB与事件数据。

Result: 实验表明，JEAT在低光照和高速场景下显著提升目标跟踪精度与稳定性，优于传统多传感器融合方法；SEHN数据集有效支持了多模态感知算法的研发与评估。

Conclusion: JEAT框架实现了对事件与RGB数据的自适应融合，显著提升了复杂夜间高速场景下的感知可靠性；SEHN数据集为未来事件-视觉融合研究提供了重要资源。

Abstract: Intelligent Transportation Systems deployed on highways predominantly rely on conventional RGB cameras for traffic perception and vehicle tracking. However, highway environments present unique challenges: the absence of artificial lighting infrastructure, combined with high vehicle velocities, results in severely degraded perception performance under low-light conditions. Specifically, nighttime scenarios suffer from motion blur, insufficient exposure, and poor signal-to-noise ratios, which catastrophically impair the reliability of RGB-based sensing systems. To address these limitations, we propose a novel Joint Event-RGB Adaptive Tracking (JEAT) framework. Unlike existing multi-sensor trackers constrained by rigid, hard-coded prioritization, JEAT merges asynchronous event streams and RGB frames into a unified joint data association optimization. By employing an Adaptive Extended Kalman Filter to continuously estimate measurement noise via NIS statistics, the framework dynamically weights and fuses both modalities, optimally harnessing event streams during dark or high-speed motion while leveraging RGB frames under bright or static conditions. Furthermore, given the absence of publicly available datasets tailored for event-based highway perception with diverse environmental conditions, we present SEHN, a large-scale synthetic dataset generated using the CARLA simulator. Our dataset encompasses diverse environmental conditions (daytime, nighttime, nighttime with out artificial lighting) and varying traffic densities, providing synchronized RGB imagery and event streams to facilitate multi-modal fusion research. Our code and datasets will be available at https://github.com/haidongwang96/SEHN.

</details>


### [173] [Feature-Space Guided Diffusion for Realistic Ultrasound Image Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11655)
*Marina Domínguez,Nélida Mirabet-Herranz,Valery Naranjo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需训练的采样策略FSCG，通过在特征空间中进行局部k-NN特征修正和基于能量选择最优候选样本，显著提升条件扩散模型生成的医学超声图像的真实性，有效缩小与真实图像之间的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有条件扩散模型虽能生成解剖结构合理的超声图像，但难以模拟真实的B-mode外观，如斑点纹理、组织对比度和衰减等采集依赖特性，导致生成图像与真实图像在表示空间中存在明显差距。

Method: FSCG是一种训练-free的采样策略，在采样阶段通过局部k-NN特征修正，并根据特征空间能量选择最佳候选样本，利用冻结的超声基础模型引导生成结果向真实超声域靠拢。

Result: 在三个不同数据集上，FSCG将FID64降低56%，FID192降低57%，最近邻特征距离降低47%，显著优于标准条件扩散采样和其他推理时引导方法。

Conclusion: 域感知的特征表示能够揭示并减少医学扩散合成中的真实性差距，无需重新训练生成器即可实现更逼真的图像生成。代码已开源。

Abstract: Conditional diffusion models can generate anatomically plausible medical ultrasound (US) images, but anatomical plausibility alone does not ensure realistic B-mode appearance. Most US pipelines adapt standard generative architectures and condition them on anatomical masks, or use guidance mechanisms that reinforce the same anatomical signal. However, B-mode US images are shaped by acquisition-dependent properties such as speckle texture, tissue contrast, and attenuation. Using a frozen US foundation model, we show that standard conditional diffusion baselines remain separated from real images in representation space. In this work, we propose Feature-Space Candidate Guidance (FSCG), a training-free sampling strategy to reduce this gap. At sampling time, FSCG applies local k-NN feature correction and selects the best of multiple stochastic candidates according to their feature-space energy. In this way, the mask defines the anatomy, while FSCG steers samples toward the real US domain. Across three different datasets, FSCG reduces average FID64 by 56\%, FID192 by 57\%, and nearest-neighbour feature distance by 47\% over standard conditional diffusion sampling, outperforming alternative inference-time guidance baselines. The results suggest that domain-aware feature representations can reveal and reduce realism gaps in medical diffusion synthesis without retraining the generator. Our code is available at https://github.com/marinadominguez/FSCG.

</details>


### [174] [ABot-3DWorld 0: A Universal World Model to Explore Any 3D Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11673)
*Mingchao Sun,Luyang Tang,Yu Liu,Xu Yan,Zhan Li,Yunwei Zhang,Fei Yu,Zengye Ge,Yumin Liu,Jiacheng Zhang,Yongchang Zhang,Jiawei Zhang,Zhicheng Liu,Zhongxu Sun,Tianjian Ouyang,Wenzheng Chen,Shixing Yang,Nianfei Fan,Guodong Sun,Huan Li,Zheng Zhou,Yongze Li,Yingliang Peng,Mengmeng Du,Yuan Liu,Haozhe Shi,Chunnuo Gong,Chengzhen Yu,Chunxue Jia,Yang Liu,Shiying Zeng,Junnan Lai,Hang Zhang,Ning Guo,Baoquan Chen,Mu Xu,Hongyu Pan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ABot-3DWorld 0 是一个通用的多模态 3D 世界模型，可将文本、图像和视频输入转换为高保真、可探索的 3D 世界。其核心是统一的空间生成基元（SGP），由高质量全景图和空间点云组成，高效描述任意 3D 空间。该框架通过几何严谨的恢复或生成式补全，将多模态输入转化为 SGP；再通过 3D 一致的全景视频生成器沿规划轨迹探索；最后利用全景视频重建引擎生成清晰、逼真的 3D 高斯泼溅（3DGS）世界。该方法支持丰富输入（如多视角图像、随意视频）与单图/文本输入，实现从真实场景还原到创意生成的全覆盖，并锚定地理兴趣点，支持消费者级地图原生空间探索。实验表明，ABot-3DWorld 0 在开源方法中达到新基准，且在多模态输入下优于 Marble 模型的场景保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前 3D 内容创作门槛高，缺乏统一、高效的多模态输入转 3D 世界的方法。现有技术难以兼顾真实场景还原与创造性生成，且缺乏地理锚定与可探索性支持。因此需要一种低门槛、通用性强、支持多模态输入并能实现高保真 3D 世界生成的系统。

Method: 提出统一空间生成基元（SGP），结合几何严谨的恢复与生成式补全，将多模态输入映射至 SGP；使用 3D 一致性全景视频生成器沿规划路径探索；最终通过全景视频重建引擎生成基于 3DGS 的高保真、可交互 3D 世界。支持多视角、视频输入的精确恢复与单图/文本输入的创造性生成。

Result: ABot-3DWorld 0 在开源方法中达到领先水平，尤其在多模态输入下显著提升场景保真度，优于 Marble 模型。支持从真实场景复现到创意生成的无缝切换，并具备地理锚定能力，实现地图原生的空间探索，适用于大众用户。

Conclusion: ABot-3DWorld 0 成功构建了一个通用、高效、低门槛的多模态 3D 世界生成框架，实现了从文本、图像、视频到可探索 3D 世界的端到端转换，兼具高保真与可扩展性，为大众化 3D 内容创作提供了新范式。

Abstract: We present ABot-3DWorld 0, a universal multimodal 3D world model that turns text, image, and video inputs into high-fidelity, explorable 3D worlds. At the heart of our framework is a unified Spatial Generative Primitive (SGP), a compact tuple of a high-quality panorama and a spatial point cloud that delivers an efficient description of any 3D space. Multimodal inputs are first lifted into this primitive; a 3D-consistent panoramic video generator then explores the primitive along a planned trajectory; finally, our panoramic video reconstruction engine converts the generated video into a clean, photorealistic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) world. This pipeline covers two regimes: rich inputs (multi-view sets, casual video) are lifted into the SGP through a geometry-rigorous recovery that mirrors the observed scene, while a single image or sentence is completed generatively into a creative world. The result is one low-barrier engine for general 3D content creation that further anchors generated worlds to geographic points of interest, enabling map-native spatial exploration at consumer scale. Experiments show that ABot-3DWorld 0 sets the state of the art among open-source methods and demonstrates stronger scene fidelity than Marble under rich multimodal inputs.

</details>


### [175] [Illuminant-Adaptive 3D Lookup Tables for Camera Color Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11681)
*Claudio Rota,Luca Cogo,Simone Bianco,Raimondo Schettini*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于光照自适应三维查找表（C²LUT）的颜色校正框架，结合色度感知的光照表示和非线性色彩转换，有效应对广泛色度和光谱复杂性的光源。通过使用Tucker张量分解降低计算开销，实现在相机ISP中的高效部署。在包含1473个光谱功率分布的大规模数据集上进行实验，验证了该方法在多种相机、光源和真实图像上的优越性能，相比现有方法将CIE ΔE₀₀降低最多20%，角度误差降低最多18%。代码与数据集已开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的颜色校正方法难以应对相机传感器响应与CIE XYZ色彩空间之间的非线性关系，以及日益复杂的高色度LED光源带来的挑战，亟需一种更准确且适用于现代相机硬件的校正方法。

Method: 采用光照自适应的三维查找表（LUT），结合色度感知的光照表示与非线性色彩变换；利用Tucker张量分解压缩LUT以降低计算开销；构建大规模光谱数据集用于训练与评估。

Result: 在多相机、多光源、多种反射率数据集及真实图像上均表现出优于现有方法的性能，最大降低CIE ΔE₀₀达20%，角度误差降低18%，同时满足现代相机硬件的计算约束。

Conclusion: C²LUT框架通过结合光照自适应表示与高效张量压缩，实现了在复杂光照条件下的高精度颜色校正，具备实际部署潜力，并为后续研究提供了公开的数据与代码资源。

Abstract: Color correction is a key component of camera image signal processing (ISP) pipelines, encompassing illuminant discounting and colorimetric mapping of device-dependent sensor responses to device-independent color spaces, such as CIE XYZ. Despite extensive research, accurate color correction remains challenging due to the non-linear relationship between camera sensor responses and CIE XYZ color space, as well as to the increasing presence of highly chromatic and spectrally complex LED illuminants. We propose a color correction framework based on illuminant-adaptive three-dimensional lookup tables (LUTs), which we call Color Correction LUT (C$^2$LUT). Our method combines a chromaticity-aware illuminant representation with a non-linear color transformation, enabling accurate correction under illuminants spanning a wide range of chromaticities and spectral complexities. We employ Tucker tensor decomposition to represent the LUTs, ensuring that computational requirements remain sufficiently low for deployment in camera ISPs. In addition, we introduce a large-scale illuminants dataset comprising 1,473 spectral power distributions, with different chromaticities and spectral profiles. Experiments across multiple cameras, illuminants, reflectance datasets, and real captured images demonstrate consistent improvements over existing methods for color correction, reducing CIE $ΔE_{00}$ by up to 20% and angular error by up to 18% while remaining compatible with modern camera hardware constraints. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/claudiom4sir/C2LUT.

</details>


### [176] [SVI360: Spherical Video Interpolation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11710)
*Le-Kim Nguyen,Renato Martins,Pascal Vasseur,Cedric Demonceaux*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SVI360，一种双分支框架，用于解决全景视频插值中极区严重畸变的问题。通过结合图像帧及其旋转正交视图，增强流位移的等变性，从而提升中间帧预测质量。在四个公开基准测试中，该方法优于现有先进方法，且保持了精确的光流估计。代码和预训练模型已开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频插值方法难以处理全景视频在极区的严重畸变问题，限制了其在虚拟现实和沉浸式视频增强中的应用。

Method: 提出SVI360双分支框架，利用原始视图与旋转正交视图之间的等变性约束，优化光流估计并提升中间帧生成质量。

Result: 在四个公开数据集上，该方法在插值质量上优于现有最先进方法，并保持了更准确的光流估计。

Conclusion: SVI360有效解决了全景视频插值中的极区畸变问题，显著提升了中间帧生成质量，具有良好的应用前景。

Abstract: This paper addresses the problem of omnidirectional video interpolation, which plays an essential role in applications such as virtual reality and immersive video enhancement. Existing video interpolation methods are not well-suited for spherical videos, as they have difficulty handling severe distortions close to the poles. To address this issue, we propose SVI360, a dual-branch framework that combines the image frame and its rotated orthogonal view to deal with these distortions. The core methodological aspect of the approach is to reinforce equivariance of the flow displacements between the original and orthogonal views to improve intermediate frame prediction. Experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in interpolation quality while maintaining accurate optical flow in four different public benchmarks. Code and pre-trained models are available at: https://icb-vision-ai.github.io/video360_interpolation/

</details>


### [177] [GFR-SAM: Training-Free Referring Camouflaged Object Segmentation via Cross-Image Prompting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11732)
*Yilong Yang,Jianxin Tian,Shengchuan Zhang,Liujuan Cao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出GFR-SAM，一种三阶段无训练的参考伪装目标检测框架，通过生成-过滤-精炼流程提升性能，利用跨图像上下文提示和对比学习有效抑制背景干扰，结合几何与语义信息恢复精细边界，在R2C7K基准上超越现有无训练方法8.7%的加权F-measure，媲美有监督最先进模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有监督方法依赖大量标注，而基于稀疏点提示的无训练方法对定位误差敏感，因此需要一种更鲁棒且无需训练的方案来实现高效、准确的伪装目标检测。

Method: 采用三阶段无训练框架：1）引入上下文范例引导分割，使SAM3具备跨图像推理能力以生成候选掩码；2）使用基于DINOv3的区域-全局对比过滤模块，通过原型对齐排序候选结果并抑制背景干扰；3）结合边界框与文本提示的几何-语义精炼模块，恢复细粒度边界并提升实例召回率。

Result: 在R2C7K基准上，GFR-SAM相比现有无训练方法提升8.7%的加权F-measure（$F_β^w$），性能接近甚至媲美有监督的最先进方法，验证了其有效性与鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该工作揭示了将SAM3潜力扩展至跨图像上下文提示的可行性，建立了一种无需任务微调即可连接通用基础模型与专用感知任务的稳健无训练范式，显著缩小了通用模型与标签密集型任务之间的差距。

Abstract: Referring Camouflaged Object Detection (Ref-COD) requires segmenting hidden targets guided by reference cues. While supervised methods are annotation-heavy and training-free approaches via sparse point-prompting are sensitive to localization errors, we propose GFR-SAM, a robust three-stage training-free framework. GFR-SAM shifts the paradigm from fragile point-matching to a "Generate-Filter-Refine" pipeline. First, we introduce In-Context Exemplar-guided Segmentation, empowering SAM3 with cross-image inference to generate candidate masks via holistic visual exemplars, bypassing its native intra-image constraints. Second, a Region-Global Contrastive Filtering module ranks candidates through DINOv3-based prototypical alignment, effectively suppressing background distractors. Finally, a Geometric-Semantic Refinement module synergizes bounding box and text prompts to recover fine-grained boundaries and enhance instance recall. Evaluated on the R2C7K benchmark, GFR-SAM outperforms existing training-free methods by 8.7\% in weighted F-measure ($F_β^w$) and competes with supervised state-of-the-art counterparts. Ultimately, this work underscores the potential of unlocking SAM3's latent capability for cross-image In-Context prompting, establishing a robust, training-free paradigm that effectively bridges the gap between general-purpose foundation models and specialized, label-intensive perception tasks without the need for task-specific fine-tuning.

</details>


### [178] [Higher-Order Cell Tracking Transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11754)
*Jordão Bragantini,Ilan Theodoro,Loïc A. Royer*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出HOCT（高阶细胞追踪Transformer），一种以边为中心的架构，通过3D几何先验解决细胞分裂导致的路径纠缠和边标签随机性问题，在无需深度预训练图像编码器的情况下实现最佳跟踪性能，并在人工介入微调中显著降低错误率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在构建候选追踪图时忽略了两个结构障碍：细胞分裂导致不同谱系路径在节点嵌入空间中纠缠，以及共享节点的边具有近似随机的标签一致性，使得图神经网络难以利用拓扑信息进行聚合。

Method: 提出基于边中心的高阶细胞追踪变压器（HOCT），利用3D几何先验让候选细胞连接之间相互注意，从而解决上述两个问题。

Result: 在细胞追踪挑战赛和细菌分裂基准测试中均达到最先进水平；在人工介入设置下，仅用400个标注即可使追踪错误率降低59%，优于其他基于Transformer基线的LoRA微调方法（提升6.75%）。

Conclusion: HOCT通过引入边中心注意力与3D几何先验，有效克服了传统方法中的结构性障碍，实现了高性能且易于微调的细胞追踪，为活体成像中的细胞谱系重建提供了新范式。

Abstract: Reconstructing lineages from live-imaging microscopy requires linking cell detections across time, including through cell divisions. A common approach is to construct a candidate graph and associate cell segmentations (nodes) across frames. However, these and other existing methods overlook two structural obstacles in candidate tracking graphs: (i) cell divisions entangle distinct lineage paths in the node embedding space, and (ii) edges sharing a node have near-random label agreement, so the candidate-graph topology carries no useful information for graph neural networks to aggregate. We propose the \textbf{Higher-Order Cell Tracking Transformer} (HOCT), an edge-centric architecture in which candidate cell links attend to one another under a 3D geometric prior, resolving both issues. Evaluated on the Cell Tracking Challenge and a bacteria division benchmark, HOCT achieves state-of-the-art results without deep pre-trained image encoders. Moreover, the proposed approach is easier to fine-tune, quickly reducing tracking errors by 59% with 400 annotations in a human-in-the-loop setting, outperforming LoRA fine-tuning of competing transformer baselines (6.75% improvement).

</details>


### [179] [StoryTeller: Training-Free Narrative Grounding for Long-Form Audio Description](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11798)
*Seung Hyun Hahm,Minh T. Dinh,SouYoung Jin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: StoryTeller 是一种无需训练的框架，用于生成具有故事连贯性的长视频字幕描述。它通过维护一个经过验证的叙事记忆，跨场景保留角色、事件和故事背景信息，避免传统视觉语言模型在处理长视频时忽略上下文的问题。该方法不依赖字幕、脚本或特定微调，仅需原始视频和电影标题，并可选择性地检索公开的电影元数据，同时通过语义过滤和VLM验证确保信息准确性。为评估生成描述的故事理解能力，研究提出了 StoryAD-QA 基准测试。实验表明，StoryTeller 在自动评估、问答评估和人工评估中均显著优于现有基线，提升了描述的连贯性、事实准确性和故事理解度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频-语言模型在处理长视频时通常孤立地分析每一帧或短片段，导致生成的音频描述缺乏对角色、事件因果关系和整体叙事脉络的理解，难以满足盲人和低视力观众对完整故事体验的需求。因此，亟需一种能够保持跨场景叙事一致性、无需额外标注数据的长形式音频描述方法。

Method: StoryTeller 采用无训练设计，基于原始视频与电影标题构建故事感知的描述系统。它通过动态维护一个经语义过滤和视觉语言模型验证的‘已验证叙事记忆’，持续存储并传递关键角色、事件及关系信息。系统可选地从公开来源获取电影元数据（如人物名、剧情概要），但仅接受视频中可支持的事实，以保证真实性。整个流程无需脚本、字幕、预定义角色库或微调，实现端到端的通用长视频描述。

Result: 在多个标准音频描述基准和多样化长视频数据集上，StoryTeller 显著提升描述的叙事连贯性、事实准确性和故事理解能力。在 StoryAD-QA 问答任务中表现优异，证明其生成的描述能有效支撑对复杂情节的理解。自动评估与人类评价结果一致显示其优于当前主流基线模型。

Conclusion: StoryTeller 成功实现了无需训练、无需外部标注的长形式音频描述，通过引入可信的叙事记忆机制，显著增强了生成内容的故事感知能力，为盲人和低视力用户提供更沉浸、更易理解的影视观看体验，具备广泛的应用潜力。

Abstract: Long-form audio description (AD) requires more than describing visible actions: it must preserve characters, events, relationships, and story context across scenes so that blind and low-vision (BLV) audiences can follow a film. Modern video-language models (VLMs) are effective on short clips, but they often treat each moment independently, producing descriptions that miss who characters are, why events matter, and how the current scene connects to earlier narrative context. We propose StoryTeller, a training-free framework for story-aware long-form AD. Instead of relying only on local visual cues, StoryTeller maintains a verified narrative memory that carries forward story-relevant information across scenes, enabling later descriptions to remain coherent, grounded, and contextually informative. Given only raw video and a movie title, StoryTeller can optionally retrieve public movie metadata to resolve names and story context, while accepting only facts that are supported by the video through semantic filtering and VLM verification. The method requires no subtitles, scripts, AD transcripts, aligned captions, character banks, precomputed face identities, or task-specific fine-tuning. To evaluate whether generated AD preserves narrative information, we introduce StoryAD-QA, a question-answering benchmark that tests whether a language model can answer story-context questions using only the generated descriptions. Experiments on standard AD benchmarks and diverse long-form videos show that StoryTeller consistently improves narrative coherence, factual grounding, and story comprehension over strong baselines in automatic, QA-based, and human evaluations.

</details>


### [180] [MM-ToolSandBox: A Unified Framework for Evaluating Visual Tool-Calling Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11818)
*Kaixin Ma,Di Feng,Alexander Metz,Jiarui Lu,Eshan Verma,Afshin Dehghan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MM-ToolSandBox是一个用于视觉基础工具调用智能体的基准测试和评估框架，提供跨16个应用领域、500多个工具的状态化执行环境，支持多图像、多轮任务，能处理现实中的对话现象（如目标修改、错误修正、状态变化）。通过信息流引导的规划与多阶段质量过滤，自动生成258个人类验证的典型场景及50个针对交互式UI应用的变体。对12个前沿模型（从4B开源到领先专有系统）的评估显示，当前模型在视觉工具调用方面仍缺乏鲁棒性，最佳模型成功率低于50%。失败分析表明，视觉精度而非规划能力是主要瓶颈：53%的失败源于从图像中提取信息错误，尽管任务流程正确。随着模型规模增大，瓶颈从“决策”转向“感知”，小模型因无法规划而失败，大模型则因感知偏差而失败，提示不同规模模型需采用不同优化方向。该框架与基准已公开于GitHub。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉工具调用智能体评估缺乏真实、复杂且多样化的场景，尤其在多轮、多图像、状态化交互和真实对话行为方面存在不足。同时，模型在视觉信息提取与工具调用之间的衔接上表现不佳，亟需一个全面、可扩展的评估体系来揭示其真实能力边界。

Method: 构建包含500+工具、16个应用领域的状态化执行环境；设计信息流引导的自动化场景生成管道，结合多阶段质量过滤生成高质量、多样化场景；引入人类验证确保场景真实性；支持多图像、多轮交互，模拟真实用户行为；使用该框架对12个主流模型进行评估，并进行失败模式分析。

Result: 评估结果显示，即使最先进的模型在关键任务上的成功率为50%以下，表明当前视觉工具调用能力仍有显著短板。53%的失败案例源于视觉信息提取错误，说明视觉感知精度是核心瓶颈。随着模型规模增大，失败模式从规划失误转向感知误差，揭示了不同规模模型的差异化缺陷。

Conclusion: MM-ToolSandBox为视觉基础工具调用智能体提供了首个全面、可扩展的评估框架，揭示了当前模型在视觉感知与工具调用衔接上的严重不足。研究发现，模型能力瓶颈随规模演变，未来工作应针对不同规模模型分别强化规划能力或视觉精度。该框架和数据集已开源，推动该领域持续发展。

Abstract: We introduce MM-ToolSandBox, a benchmark and evaluation framework for visually grounded tool-calling agents. The framework provides a stateful execution environment spanning 500+ tools across 16 application domains, supporting multi-image, multi-turn tasks where agents must ground progressively arriving visual inputs into executable tool calls while handling realistic conversational phenomena (goal revisions, error corrections, state mutations). An automated scenario generation pipeline produces diverse, visually grounded scenarios through information-flow-guided planning and multi-stage quality filtering, yielding 258 human-verified nominal scenarios and 50 variants targeting interactive UI applications. Evaluating 12 state-of-the-art models, from 4B open-weight to frontier proprietary systems, shows that current models still lack robust visual tool-calling capability: even the best model achieves below 50% success rate. Our failure analysis further reveals that visual precision, not only planning, is a primary bottleneck for capable models: 53% of failures stem from incorrect information extraction from images despite otherwise correct task workflows. A planning-to-precision crossover emerges with scale: smaller models fail at deciding what to do, while larger models fail at perceiving what they see, suggesting fundamentally different research directions for improving models at different capability levels. The framework and the benchmark are publicly available at https://github.com/apple/ml-mmtoolsandbox

</details>


### [181] [MicroCharNet: Less is More for License Plate Character Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11830)
*Huy Che,Dinh-Duy Phan,Duc-Lung Vu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为MicroCharNet的超轻量级模型，专为车牌字符检测设计。该模型采用紧凑的骨干网络（包含C2f块和CoordAtt模块），结合轻量级的C3k2颈部结构，以及单级无锚框检测头，实现了高精度与低计算开销的平衡。在UFPR-ALPR数据集上的实验表明，MicroCharNet仅需0.08M参数和0.096 GFLOPs，性能优于多个YOLO基线模型，并在边缘设备上具备实时部署能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于深度学习的车牌字符检测方法虽然精度较高，但大多依赖大规模模型，导致计算开销大，难以在资源受限的设备上实时部署。因此需要设计一种既高效又准确的轻量化模型。

Method: 采用紧凑的C2f骨干网络并引入CoordAtt模块以增强特征提取能力，同时保留空间信息；使用轻量级C3k2颈部融合多尺度特征；设计单级无锚框检测头实现端到端预测。

Result: 在UFPR-ALPR数据集上，MicroCharNet达到竞争性检测精度，参数量仅为0.08M，计算量为0.096 GFLOPs，优于多个YOLO基线模型；硬件测试验证其适合边缘设备实时运行。

Conclusion: 通过精心设计的超轻量级架构，可在保证检测精度的同时显著降低计算开销，为车牌字符检测在边缘设备上的实时应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: License plate character detection is a crucial component of intelligent transportation systems, where high accuracy and computational efficiency are required for real-time deployment. Although recent deep learning-based methods have substantially improved detection performance, many high-accuracy models rely on large-scale architectures that incur substantial computational overhead, limiting their applicability to resource-constrained devices. In this paper, we propose MicroCharNet, an ultra-lightweight model specifically designed for license plate character detection. The proposed architecture employs a compact backbone composed of C2f blocks, integrated with CoordAtt module to enhance feature extraction while preserving spatial information. A lightweight C3k2-based neck fuses multi-level features, followed by a single-level anchor-free detection head that enables end-to-end prediction. Experiments conducted on the UFPR-ALPR dataset demonstrate that MicroCharNet achieves competitive detection accuracy with only 0.08M parameters and 0.096 GFLOPs, while outperforming several recent YOLO-based baselines. Hardware-level evaluations further confirm its efficiency for real-time deployment on edge devices. These results indicate that carefully designed ultra-lightweight architectures can effectively balance accuracy and efficiency in license plate character detection. The source code is available at https://github.com/chequanghuy/MicroCharNet.

</details>


### [182] [Cycle-World: Mitigating Error Accumulation in Long-term Video World Models via Reverse-Prediction Cycle Consistency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11836)
*Zihan Su,Teng Hu,Jiangning Zhang,Ruiyan Wang,Ran Yi,Lizhuang Ma,Dacheng Tao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Cycle-World提出了一种新颖的框架，通过在训练和推理阶段强制时间可逆性来解决长视频生成中的误差累积问题。该方法利用循环一致性目标严格限制前向生成漂移，并通过反向预测模型嵌入因果约束，使生成序列具有可逆性。在推理阶段，冻结的反向模型作为运行时校正器，通过梯度引导迭代修正潜在表示，抑制误差积累。在VBench基准测试中，该方法在60秒长视频生成中实现了卓越的生成质量和时间一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归扩散模型在长视频生成中存在误差累积问题，导致生成漂移、结构坍塌和视觉质量下降。需要一种机制来保证长期生成的稳定性与一致性。

Method: 提出Cycle-World框架，结合训练阶段的反向预测模型以嵌入因果约束，并在推理阶段使用冻结的反向模型作为梯度引导的运行时校正器，实现循环一致性指导下的误差抑制。

Result: 在VBench基准上，Cycle-World在60秒长视频生成中显著提升了生成质量与时间一致性，达到当前最优水平。

Conclusion: 通过引入双向时间可逆性机制，Cycle-World有效缓解了自回归扩散模型在长视频生成中的误差累积问题，为高质量、长时间一致的视频合成提供了新范式。

Abstract: Autoregressive diffusion models have enabled high-quality video generation, yet their sequential nature inherently suffers from error accumulation. In long-horizon video synthesis, minor prediction deviations compound over time, inevitably leading to unconstrained generative drift, structural collapse, and severe visual degradation. To address this, we propose Cycle-World, a novel framework designed for stable and temporally consistent long-video generation. Our approach tackles error drift by enforcing strict temporal reversibility across both the training and inference phases. Theoretically, we demonstrate that forward generative drift can be strictly bottlenecked by a cycle-consistency objective. During training, we integrate an efficient reverse-prediction model to implicitly embed causal constraints into the forward generator, compelling it to produce reversible sequences that tightly adhere to the natural video manifold. At inference time, we repurpose this frozen reverse model as a runtime corrector. Through gradient-based cycle guidance, it iteratively refines the generated latent representations, actively suppressing accumulated errors before they are committed to the historical context. Extensive experiments on the VBench benchmark demonstrate that Cycle-World's dual-phase synergy significantly mitigates error drift, achieving state-of-the-art overall generation quality and long-horizon temporal consistency in 60-second synthesis.

</details>


### [183] [HASTE: A Platform for Rapid Post-Disaster Building Damage Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11838)
*Caleb Robinson,Anthony Ortiz,Simone Fobi Nsutezo,Cameron Birge,Meygha Machado,Marcelo Duarte,Joaquin Rivero Rodriguez,Anthony Cintron Roman,Kevin White,Inbal Becker-Reshef,Juan M. Lavista Ferres*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HASTE 是一个无需编码的网络平台，可在灾难发生后快速生成建筑损毁地图。它提供两种方法：一是用户标注灾后影像中的建筑物区域，训练小型语义分割模型并映射到全部图像；二是利用预训练视觉模型嵌入建筑物轮廓，仅需少量标注即可在浏览器中通过逻辑回归快速评分。该平台已在三十多个真实灾害事件中应用，支持地震、飓风、洪水等多种灾害，结果在数小时至数天内交付给人道主义伙伴。实验表明，基于基础模型的嵌入方法仅用少量标签即可达到与全监督ResNet-50相当的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在重大灾害发生后，救援人员急需快速获取受损建筑物的地图，但现有模型依赖匹配的灾前灾后影像和相似历史数据，这些在灾后首日通常不可得。因此需要一种无需机器学习专业知识、能快速处理新场景的工具。

Method: HASTE平台采用两种方法：第一种是用户标注灾后影像中的多边形，训练轻量级语义分割模型，将结果与已有建筑轮廓融合；第二种是使用预训练视觉模型对建筑轮廓进行嵌入，仅需少量人工标注，通过浏览器内逻辑回归实现快速评估。

Result: HASTE在xbd数据集上的初步实验显示，基于预训练模型的嵌入方法在仅使用约1/20的标注数据下，性能可媲美全监督的ResNet-50模型。平台自2023年以来已支持超过三十次真实灾害响应，涵盖多种灾害类型，结果在数小时内至数天内完成并交付。

Conclusion: HASTE为非专业人员提供了高效、快速的灾后建筑损毁评估能力，具备高度实用性和可扩展性。未来方向包括视觉-语言评估、主动学习以及道路等基础设施的损毁建模。平台开源，促进灾害响应技术的发展。

Abstract: When a large disaster strikes, responders need a map of which buildings are damaged within hours. The models that do well on public benchmarks assume matched before-and-after imagery and a training set drawn from similar past events, and neither is usually available for a new disaster in its first day. We present HASTE (High-speed Assessment and Satellite Tracking for Emergencies), a no-code web platform that lets analysts who are not machine learning engineers produce per-building damage maps from post-disaster satellite imagery. HASTE implements two methods that share one interface. The first requires the user to label polygons over the post-disaster scene, trains a small semantic segmentation model on that single scene, runs it over the whole image, and joins the per-pixel output to existing building footprints. The second embeds every footprint with a pretrained vision model, requires the user to label a handful of buildings, and fits a logistic regression in the browser that scores the rest of the scene in seconds. We describe the platform, both methods, and the engineering that supports them. We also report preliminary experiments on xBD showing that foundation-model embeddings pooled over footprints separate damaged from intact buildings using post-disaster imagery alone, matching a fully supervised ResNet-50 baseline with a twentieth of its labels. HASTE and its predecessors have supported more than thirty real-world disaster responses since 2023, spanning earthquakes, hurricanes, cyclones, floods, wildfires, and tornadoes, delivering results to humanitarian partners within hours to days of imagery becoming available. We close with the directions we think are most promising, including vision-language assessment, active learning, and damage models for roads and other infrastructure. HASTE is open source at https://github.com/microsoft/haste.

</details>


### [184] [LoRA-Based Cascaded Multimodal Fusion for Action Recognition in Medical Training Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11839)
*Divya Mereddy,Jeevan Beedareddy*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于低秩适应（LoRA）的级联多模态融合框架，用于医疗训练环境中的动作与活动识别。该框架通过参数高效的模态特异性适配与顺序融合，实现模态分阶段集成，无需重新训练已学习组件。其优势在于支持可扩展的跨数据集适应，尤其适用于不同模态组合的数据集。在NurViD和Nurse Training数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于单一模态模型，并达到与特定数据集基线相当的性能，验证了其在医学训练任务中高效融合异构模态的潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在医疗训练环境中，动作与活动识别需要融合多种异构模态数据（如视频、传感器、语音等），但传统融合方法往往依赖固定结构且需大量参数微调，难以适应不同模态组合的场景。因此，亟需一种参数高效、灵活可扩展的多模态融合方法。

Method: 提出一种基于低秩适应（LoRA）的级联多模态融合框架。首先对各模态进行参数高效的独立适配，再按语义相关性顺序逐步融合，实现非侵入式、可扩展的多模态集成，避免重复训练已有模块。

Result: 在NurViD和Nurse Training数据集上，所提方法显著优于单模态模型，且性能媲美或超过现有特定数据集的基线方法，证明其在异构模态融合中的有效性与泛化能力。

Conclusion: 级联式LoRA多模态融合是一种有前景的参数高效方法，适用于医疗训练中复杂、多变的模态组合，具备良好的可扩展性和实用性。

Abstract: This paper presents a cascaded Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)-based multimodal fusion framework for action and activity recognition in healthcare-oriented training environments. The proposed architecture combines parameter-efficient modality-specific adaptation with sequential fusion, enabling modalities to be integrated in stages without retraining previously learned components. Rather than assuming a fixed fusion structure, the framework first integrates more closely related modalities and then incorporates additional heterogeneous modalities, supporting scalable adaptation across datasets with different modality sets.We evaluate the framework on two healthcare-oriented training environment datasets: NurViD and the Nurse Training dataset. Across these datasets, preliminary results suggest that the proposed cascaded fusion strategy improves over individual modality models and provides competitive performance relative to previously reported dataset-specific baselines. Overall, these findings indicate that cascaded LoRA-based fusion is a promising parameter-efficient approach for integrating heterogeneous modalities in medical training action and activity recognition tasks. github: https://github.com/anonymous0-ai/LoRA-Based-Cascaded-Multimodal-Fusion-.git.

</details>


### [185] [Beyond the Single Camera: Agentic Multi-View Reasoning in Sports Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11844)
*Kerui Chen,Jinglu Wang,Xiaoyi Zhang,Yan Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SportMV-Bench多视角体育视频理解基准，评估MLLM在复杂场景下的表现；发现现有模型难以有效利用多视角信息，主要瓶颈在于细粒度视觉感知和视角选择；提出SportMV-Agent框架，通过主动视角选择、感知工具执行与证据驱动推理的迭代循环，实现14.46%相对性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM在单视角视频理解上表现良好，但在体育视频等存在密集遮挡、快速运动和复杂交互的场景中受限于单一视角；实际体育赛事采用多摄像机拍摄，提供互补信息，但缺乏评估多视角理解能力的基准；因此需要构建一个高质量、多视角的基准来推动该方向研究。

Method: 构建SportMV-Bench基准，结合大语言模型生成、多模态大模型验证与人工筛选，确保数据质量；设计SportMV-Agent框架，包含主动视角选择、感知工具执行与基于证据的推理的迭代机制，以增强多视角信息融合能力。

Result: 当前MLLM难以有效利用多视角信息，主要瓶颈在于细粒度视觉感知和视角选择；SportMV-Agent在三个任务类别（PAR、REI、ADR）上相比最强基线模型取得14.46%的相对性能提升，显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 多视角信息对体育视频理解至关重要，但现有MLLM尚未充分挖掘其潜力；SportMV-Bench为该领域提供了可靠评估基准，SportMV-Agent通过智能视角协同策略实现了显著性能突破，为未来多视角理解系统设计提供了新范式。

Abstract: Recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance on single-view video understanding benchmarks. However, sports videos involve dense occlusion, rapid motion, and complex interactions that are difficult to resolve from a single viewpoint. In practice, sports events are recorded from multiple camera angles, providing complementary evidence used by referees. Yet, no existing benchmark evaluates MLLMs on multi-view sports video understanding. To address this gap, we introduce SportMV-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark built from official match recordings, through a dedicated pipeline combining LLM-based generation, MLLM-based verification, and human filtering to ensure quality and consistency. SportMV-Bench containing 787 multi-view video bundles and 2592 question-answer pairs across three categories: Perception-Aware Recognition (PAR), Rule-aware Event Interpretation (REI), and Adjudicative Decision Reasoning(ADR). Our analysis shows that current MLLMs fail to effectively exploit multi-view information, with the bottlenecks lying in fine-grained visual perception and view selection rather than logical reasoning or domain knowledge. We propose SportMV-Agent, an agentic framework that orchestrates an iterative loop of active view selection, perception tool execution, and evidence-grounded reasoning, achieving a significant 14.46% relative improvement over the strongest MLLM baseline.

</details>


### [186] [Evidence-Backed Video Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11862)
*Shijie Wang,Honglu Zhou,Ziyang Wang,Ran Xu,Caiming Xiong,Silvio Savarese,Chen Sun,Juan Carlos Niebles*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出E-VQA任务，要求模型输出语义答案和精确的时空证据（时间片段和密集追踪的对象分割掩码），引入首个经人工验证的ST-Evidence基准，用于判别性和生成性像素级定位。构建160k规模的ST-Evidence-Instruct数据集，通过微调实现显著性能提升，建立可解释视频理解的新基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频大模型在问答中缺乏可验证的视觉依据，现有解释方法难以捕捉复杂视频动态，亟需更精细的时空证据支持。

Method: 设计E-VQA任务，构建人类验证的ST-Evidence基准，开发自动化数据生成管道生成大规模ST-Evidence-Instruct数据集，并基于该数据对视频大模型进行微调以增强视觉感知与推理能力。

Result: 在7B模型上，微调后模型相比UniPixel基线在t-mean上提升27.2，在J&F上提升13.8，验证了该方法在可解释视频理解中的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过引入精确的时空证据与大规模训练数据，显著提升了视频大模型的视觉感知能力与可解释性，为未来可解释视频理解研究提供了坚实基础。

Abstract: Current Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) excel in question answering (QA) but largely operate as black boxes, providing textual answers without verifiable visual grounding. Existing explainability efforts rely on textual rationales or sparse bounding boxes, which struggle to capture complex video dynamics such as occlusions and non-rigid deformations. We propose Evidence-Backed Video Question Answering (E-VQA), a novel task requiring models to jointly output a semantic answer and precise spatio-temporal evidence: temporal segments and dense, tracked object segmentation masklets. To support this, we introduce ST-Evidence, the first human-verified benchmark for both discriminative and generative pixel-level grounding. Evaluations of state-of-the-art models reveal a critical decoupling between QA accuracy and true visual perception that scaling alone fails to bridge. To address this, we develop scalable, automated generation pipelines to create ST-Evidence-Instruct, a 160k-scale dataset bridging high-level reasoning with fine-grained grounding. Fine-tuning grounded Video LLMs on this data yields substantial gains over the corresponding size-matched UniPixel baselines (e.g., +27.2 t-mean and +13.8 J&F on a 7B model), establishing a robust baseline for explainable, evidence-backed video understanding. Code and data are available at https://github.com/SalesforceAIResearch/EVQA.

</details>


### [187] [Latent-Identity Tuning in Text-to-Image Personalization Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11885)
*Daniel Garibi,Ronen Kamenetsky,Hadar Averbuch-Elor,Daniel Cohen-Or,Or Patashnik*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种无需额外训练的细粒度身份调优方法，通过探索预训练冻结编码器的潜在空间，识别出与特定面部区域对应的潜在语义方向，实现对人物身份的精细化编辑，同时保持跨图像的身份一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于通用文本到图像模型的个性化和编辑方法在精细面部编辑上缺乏足够精度，难以实现对人物身份的准确控制。

Method: 利用预训练冻结编码器的潜在空间，分析其潜在标记（latent tokens）所对应的不同面部特征或空间区域，识别出有意义的语义方向，并在此基础上进行局部化、细粒度且语义一致的编辑操作。

Result: 实验表明该方法能够在不改变整体身份的前提下，实现多样化的局部面部修改，同时保持生成图像间的一致性。

Conclusion: 该方法通过挖掘冻结编码器的潜在空间，实现了无需训练的细粒度身份调优，为高精度人脸生成与编辑提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Generating and editing a person's face demands high precision, as even minor modifications can significantly alter a subject's perceived identity. Current personalization and editing methods built on general-purpose text-to-image models, however, often lack the precision required for fine-grained facial edits. We present a method for fine-grained identity tuning in text-to-image personalization models. Unlike standard image editing, which operates on a given image, identity tuning modifies the latent representation of a specific identity, enabling the generation of diverse images that consistently depict the same edited identity. To enable fine-grained latent identity tuning, we explore the latent space of a pre-trained, frozen encoder for text-to-image personalization. Our approach requires no additional training. Instead, it leverages the existing architecture of a frozen encoder to uncover latent semantic directions. This space consists of a set of latent tokens that play distinct roles in capturing different aspects of an identity and often correspond to specific spatial or semantic facial regions. We show that meaningful directions can be identified within this space and within subspaces defined by selected tokens, enabling localized, fine-grained, and semantically coherent edits. We validate our approach through qualitative and quantitative experiments that demonstrate diverse localized facial edits while preserving cross-image identity consistency. Project page at: https://garibida.github.io/IdentityTuning/

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [188] [CLIR-Bench: Benchmarking Multimodal Question Answering over Irregular Clinical Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09880)
*Frank Nie,Ethan B. Liu,Yuan Zhu,Loe Yan,Wei Fan,Jindong Han*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出CLIR-Bench，一个基于去标识化ICU记录构建的不规则临床时间序列问答基准，包含6,600个问答实例，涵盖11个临床变量，评估模型在稀疏、不规则时间序列上的证据检索与推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准主要关注规则采样或静态医疗数据的问答，缺乏对模型在不规则时间序列中准确定位和利用时间证据能力的评估，因此需要新基准来填补这一空白。

Method: 通过四阶段系统性流程从去标识化ICU记录中构建CLIR-Bench，确保每个问题关联明确的时间证据和任务特定的答案推导规则，支持对答案准确性和证据使用情况的双重评估。

Result: 实验表明，现有通用模型在处理稀疏临床证据时表现不佳，凸显了发展更强不规则时间序列推理方法的必要性。

Conclusion: CLIR-Bench为评估模型在不规则临床时间序列上的推理能力提供了可靠基准，推动该领域研究进展。

Abstract: Clinical time series are central to patient monitoring, risk assessment, and clinical decision support. However, they are often sparse, irregularly sampled, and asynchronous, making it difficult for models to identify the temporal evidence required for clinical Question Answering (QA). Existing benchmarks primarily focus on regularly sampled time-series QA or medical QA over static data, and therefore rarely assess whether models can faithfully ground their answers in irregular temporal observations. To fill this gap, we introduce CLIR-Bench, a benchmark for irregular clinical time series QA constructed from de-identified ICU records through a principled four-stage pipeline. CLIR-Bench contains 6,600 QA instances spanning 11 clinical variables, organized into four capability dimensions and 11 tasks. Each question is linked to explicit temporal evidence and task-specific answer derivation rules, enabling evaluation of both answer accuracy and evidence use. Experiments show that existing generalist models struggle to retrieve and reason over sparse clinical evidence, highlighting the need for stronger irregular time-series reasoning methods. Our code and data are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/winall/CLIR-Bench.

</details>


### [189] [Index SLM Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09885)
*Lusheng Zhang,Shien He,Tianxing Yan,Mengran Yu,Ziang Cui,Kai Zhao,Xiaojing Liu,Tianjiao Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Index-1.9B 是 Bilibili 开发的一系列开源小型语言模型，包含四个版本：基础模型 Index-1.9B-Base、纯数据训练的 Index-1.9B-Pure、对话优化的 Index-1.9B-Chat 以及支持角色扮演的 Index-1.9B-Character。该系列模型在 2.8 万亿字符（中英文为主）上预训练，采用温升-稳定-衰减的学习率调度策略和归一化输出头，显著提升训练稳定性。在多项标准基准测试中，Index-1.9B-Base 平均得分达 64.92，表现优于或媲美数倍规模的开源模型。研究还揭示了学习率调度、数据质量与模型性能之间的复杂关系，并观察到训练中期性能异常跃升现象。所有模型及评估代码已开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个高性能且高效的开源小型语言模型系列，以在资源受限场景下实现接近更大模型的表现，同时探索预训练策略对模型性能的影响。

Method: 采用温升-稳定-衰减学习率调度策略，在衰减阶段提高高质量数据比例；引入归一化输出头（Norm-Head）以增强大学习率下的训练稳定性；通过监督微调和直接偏好优化对基础模型进行对话对齐；利用检索增强生成技术实现角色扮演定制。

Result: Index-1.9B-Base 在多个基准测试中平均得分为 64.92，表现优异，超越或媲美参数量更大的开源模型；控制实验表明学习率调度、数据质量与模型深度密切相关；训练中期出现未解释的性能突增现象。

Conclusion: Index-1.9B 系列展示了小规模模型在精心设计的预训练策略下可达到高竞争力性能，其方法对高效模型开发具有重要参考价值，同时揭示了训练过程中的潜在机制需进一步研究。

Abstract: We present Index-1.9B, a series of open small language models developed at Bilibili. The series comprises four models: Index-1.9B-Base, a foundation model with 1.9 billion non-embedding parameters pre-trained on 2.8 trillion predominantly Chinese and English tokens; Index-1.9B-Pure, a control variant trained with an identical recipe but with all instruction-like data strictly filtered from the corpus; Index-1.9B-Chat, aligned from the base model with supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization; and Index-1.9B-Character, which augments the chat model with retrieval-augmented generation for few-shot role-playing customization. Pre-training employs a Warmup-Stable-Decay learning-rate schedule in which the concentration of curated data is raised substantially during the decay phase, together with a Norm-Head output layer that stabilizes training under large learning rates. On a suite of standard benchmarks covering examination, reasoning, mathematics, and code, Index-1.9B-Base attains an average score of 64.92, competitive with or exceeding open models of several times its size. We further report controlled studies on model depth, learning-rate magnitude and scheduling, the interaction between learning-rate decay and data quality, and the effect of including instruction data during pre-training, and we document an unexplained surge in benchmark performance midway through the constant-learning-rate phase. All models, together with evaluation code, are released at https://github.com/bilibili/Index-1.9B.

</details>


### [190] [RouteRec: Strict Evaluation of Recommender-Agent Selection and Aggregation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09908)
*Kaiji Zhou,Vladimir Kalmykov,Yue Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究探讨在成本约束下，如何通过任务感知的代理排序来选择异构推荐代理（如协同过滤、序列模型、基于内容的检索器和基于LLM的重排序器）。使用RouteRec框架比较了请求级硬选择与项目级学习聚合，在MovieLens-1M数据集上发现，尽管全质量基准仍有提升空间，但硬选择表现不如BM25，而学习聚合（尤其是仅使用低成本代理）能匹配甚至超越BM25，且带有门控的全代理聚合达到HR@10=0.295，仅70.2%调用LLM。结论是：请求级单一代理选择过于粗糙，项目级聚合更具潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推荐系统面临多种异构代理的选择难题，但无一代理始终最优。如何在成本约束下高效整合多代理优势，成为关键挑战。本研究旨在探索更精细的代理组合策略，以提升推荐性能。

Method: 提出RouteRec框架，对比请求级硬选择与项目级学习聚合两种策略；在MovieLens-1M上采用泄漏自由的五折交叉验证协议，评估四类传统代理与一个基于LLM的重排序器的表现。

Result: 硬选择在测试中低于BM25（HR@10: 0.223 vs. 0.254），LLM升级未带来改善；而项目级学习聚合中，仅使用低成本代理的版本达到与BM25相当的HR，且NDCG更高（0.123 vs. 0.114）；全代理门控聚合实现HR@10=0.295，仅70.2%调用LLM。

Conclusion: 请求级单一代理选择在稀疏固定候选场景中过于粗略，项目级聚合是更优的策略方向。路由问题尚未解决，但应转向更细粒度的聚合机制。

Abstract: Recommender systems increasingly face a choice among heterogeneous agents -- collaborative filters, sequential models, content-based retrievers, and LLM-based rerankers -- yet no single agent is uniformly best. We study this choice as task-aware agent ranking under cost constraints using RouteRec, a framework that compares request-level hard selection with item-level learned aggregation over four traditional recommender agents and one LLM reranker agent. On MovieLens-1M, the full quality oracle has substantial headroom (HR@10 = 0.584), confirming that useful cross-agent signal exists. Under a leakage-free 5-fold out-of-fold protocol, however, hard selection remains below BM25 (0.223 vs. 0.254), and selective LLM escalation does not improve it. The same protocol yields a different outcome for learned aggregation: its cheap-only variant matches BM25 in HR and has a higher NDCG point estimate (0.123 vs. 0.114), while gated all-agent aggregation reaches HR@10 = 0.295 with 70.2\% LLM calls. The resulting lesson is not that routing is solved, but that request-level selection of one complete agent list is too coarse for this sparse fixed-candidate setting; item-level aggregation is the more promising action space.

</details>


### [191] [Global Merger-Arbitrage Forecasting with Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09921)
*Hinal Jajal,Michal Mucha,Charles Sweat,Chris Pulman,Charlie Flanagan,Peter Anderson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于并购套利预测的语言模型系统，针对需要长上下文推理的高风险金融场景。系统结合专家指导的上下文工程与基于历史交易的回溯式推理轨迹微调，在超过400笔跨国大型并购案上表现优异，显著优于市场隐含概率、XGBoost及前沿语言模型，证明了在特定金融任务中，基于回溯监督和专家设计上下文的LLM可实现高效预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的判断性预测研究多集中于广泛主题和短文本（如新闻片段），但未覆盖需要处理数百页技术文档的长上下文金融任务。并购套利是一个典型高风险、高复杂度的金融场景，亟需能进行深度推理的模型支持。

Method: 采用专家引导的上下文工程方法，并对历史并购案例中的回溯式推理轨迹进行微调，构建一个能够处理长文档并输出三种结果概率分布（按原条款完成、更高出价、交易终止）的语言模型系统。

Result: 在跨42个国家的400多个大型并购案上，该系统在样本外测试中达到最低的类别平衡Brier分数0.151，比校准后的市场隐含概率低24%，比XGBoost低19%，比前沿语言模型低25%-42%。消融实验进一步验证了回溯监督与专家上下文设计的关键作用。

Conclusion: 大语言模型在特定金融任务中具备成功应用潜力，尤其在需要长上下文推理的场景下；通过回溯式监督与专家设计的上下文工程，可显著提升预测性能，为金融决策提供有力支持。

Abstract: We present a language-model forecasting system for merger arbitrage, a specialized high-stakes financial setting in which the task is to predict the outcome of announced M\&A deals. Unlike prior work on judgmental forecasting with LLMs, which has focused on broad mixed-topic benchmarks and short context such as news snippets, we study a setting that requires long-context reasoning over hundreds of pages of technical documents. Our system combines expert-guided context engineering with finetuning on hindsight-guided reasoning traces derived from historical deals. Given an announced deal, it outputs a probability distribution over three mutually exclusive outcomes: closing at announced terms, a higher bid, or deal termination. On an out-of-sample set of more than 400 large deals spanning 42 countries, our finetuned system achieves the best performance of any method we evaluate, reducing class-balanced Brier score to 0.151. This is 24\% below calibrated market-implied probabilities, 19\% below XGBoost, and 25-42\% below frontier language models. These results, together with ablation studies, show that LLM-based forecasting can succeed in specialized, long-context financial workflows, with hindsight-based supervision and expert-designed context playing a critical role.

</details>


### [192] [Faithful by Design: Evaluating and Improving LLM-Generated Clinical Trial Summaries for Multi-Stakeholder Audiences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09932)
*Robert Williams*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种评估大语言模型（LLM）生成临床试验摘要忠实度的基准框架，涵盖200个来自ClinicalTrials.gov数据库的分层试验，采用针对不同受众的提示模板和六维忠实度标注体系。在1,800份摘要上对GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.6和Gemini 2.5 Flash进行了基线测试，发现‘未经支持的声明’是主要失败模式（平均得分1.55/3）。引入基于知识图谱的检索系统后，显著提升了忠实度评分（蕴含+0.0125，忠实度+0.0130，p<0.0001），且改进路径因模型而异：GPT-4o主要减少矛盾，Claude Sonnet 4.6与Gemini 2.5 Flash则通过增强蕴含关系实现提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在医疗领域生成临床试验摘要时存在幻觉风险，可能误导医护人员、患者和支付方，因此亟需一套可靠的评估框架来衡量其生成内容的忠实度，以保障信息准确性和决策可靠性。

Method: 构建包含200个分层临床试验的基准数据集，设计面向三类受众的提示模板，并采用六维忠实度标注体系；使用交叉编码器自然语言推理（NLI）模型对生成摘要进行评分；对比基线模型（GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 2.5 Flash）表现，并引入基于知识图谱的检索系统进行改进验证。

Result: 所有模型均表现出显著的‘未经支持的声明’问题，平均得分为1.55/3；知识图谱增强的检索系统使NLI相关指标显著提升（蕴含+0.0125，忠实度+0.0130，p<0.0001）；不同模型的改进机制各异：GPT-4o主要减少矛盾，而Claude Sonnet 4.6与Gemini 2.5 Flash则通过提升蕴含关系实现优化。

Conclusion: 当前主流大语言模型在生成临床试验摘要时仍存在严重忠实度问题，尤其易产生未经支持的声明。基于知识图谱的检索系统可有效提升生成内容的准确性，但不同模型的优化路径存在差异，表明需针对具体模型设计适配的增强策略。该研究为临床场景下大语言模型的可信应用提供了可量化的评估工具与改进方向。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used to summarize clinical trial results for healthcare providers, patients, and payers, but their tendency to hallucinate poses significant risks in this high-stakes context. This study introduces a benchmark evaluation framework for measuring the faithfulness of LLM-generated clinical trial summaries across three stakeholder audiences. The framework consists of 200 stratified trials drawn from the Aggregate Analysis of ClinicalTrials.gov database, evaluated using audience-specific prompt templates and a six-dimension faithfulness annotation schema. Baseline measurements were established for GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and Gemini 2.5 Flash across 1,800 generated summaries scored using a cross-encoder natural language inference (NLI) model. Unsupported Claims was identified as the dominant failure mode across all three models, with a mean annotation score of 1.55 out of three. A knowledge-graph-augmented retrieval system was developed and evaluated against the baseline, producing statistically significant improvements in NLI-based faithfulness scores (entailment +0.0125, faithfulness +0.0130, p < 0.0001). Improvement pathways were model-dependent, with GPT-4o improving primarily through contradiction reduction while Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Gemini 2.5 Flash improved through increased entailment.

</details>


### [193] [Workload-Driven Optimization for On-Device Real-Time Subtitle Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09957)
*Tsz-To Wong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究针对台湾地区在短输入、短输出、单批次推理、低延迟和隐私约束下的本地化英中字幕翻译需求，优化了轻量级模型LMT-60-0.6B。通过将151k词表替换为64k的字幕领域专用词表，并进行嵌入空间迁移与微调，显著降低解码时开销，尤其在量化后词汇投影成本上升的背景下。在OpenSubtitles2024测试集上，本地模型（LocalSubs）在GPT-4o评判下相比Google Translate取得59.2%的胜率，短提示表现最优，长提示性能下降。初步实测显示，64k词表模型在Apple M2 Metal上相较原模型提速1.63倍，但因配置不完整，延迟数据为预估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在短输入、短输出、单批次推理、低延迟和隐私保护等严格约束下，传统大规模语言模型优化方法不适用，亟需针对本地化字幕翻译场景定制轻量高效模型。

Method: 基于LMT-60-0.6B模型，采用64k字幕领域专用词表替代原151k词表，迁移嵌入空间，通过嵌入校准与全监督微调适配新词表，以降低解码阶段词汇投影开销。

Result: 在500例测试子集上，本地模型（LocalSubs）在GPT-4o评判中击败Google Translate达59.2%（去重），对短字幕效果最佳；64k词表模型在M2芯片上实现1.63倍速度提升，延迟结果为初步估计。

Conclusion: 针对特定应用场景的轻量化词表设计与模型适配可有效提升本地字幕翻译的效率与性能，尤其在资源受限与隐私敏感条件下具有实用价值。

Abstract: This report studies on-device English-to-Traditional-Chinese subtitle translation for Taiwan under short inputs, short outputs, batch-size-one inference, low latency, and privacy constraints. These conditions limit the value of optimizations designed for long-context or high-throughput language-model serving.
  Starting from LMT-60-0.6B, preliminary profiling suggests that vocabulary projection becomes a more important decode-time cost after GGUF quantization reduces the relative cost of Transformer blocks. We replace the original 151k-token vocabulary with a 64k-token subtitle-domain tokenizer, migrate the embedding space, and adapt the model through embedding calibration followed by full supervised fine-tuning.
  On a fixed 500-example subset of the OpenSubtitles2024 test set, the LocalSubs achieves a 59.2% tie-excluded win rate against Google Translate under GPT-4o pairwise judging. Performance is strongest on short cues and declines as cue length increases. Preliminary Apple M2 Metal measurements on a 64k-vocabulary model show a 1.63$\times$ speedup over a 151k-vocabulary profiling baseline. The raw benchmark configuration is incomplete, so the latency result is treated as preliminary.

</details>


### [194] [Silent Failures in Quantized LLM Reasoning: A Taxonomy-Based Analysis of Hollow Convergence and Failure Mode Shifts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09999)
*Renuka Oladri,Mohan Vamsi Varadaraju Priya,Jerry Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 后训练量化会悄然改变大语言模型的推理方式，即使任务准确率保持不变。通过一个经过两名独立人工标注者验证的六类故障分类法（Cohen's $κ$ = 0.906），研究分析了五种指令微调的大模型（3B–14B参数）在三种量化精度（FP32、FP16、NF4）下30,000条思维链输出，发现虽然准确率在不同精度间稳健（最高下降3.1个百分点），但‘空洞收敛’现象在最小模型中显著下降，而12B及以上模型则保持不变；该效应具有模型规模和基准依赖性，如GSM8K免疫，而LogiQA和ARC-Challenge变化最大。此外，在NF4下，LLaMA 3.2-3B的‘捷径坍塌’从44%升至78%，而‘信心雪球’从15.8%降至接近零，这种质变无法通过表面文本特征检测（最佳F1=0.53），表明其为评估管道无法捕捉的部署相关风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估主要依赖准确率，但后训练量化可能隐性改变模型推理过程。本研究旨在揭示量化对推理质量的潜在影响，尤其是那些不反映在准确率上的深层缺陷，以推动更全面的评估方法发展。

Method: 构建六类故障分类体系，使用两名独立人工标注者验证（Cohen's $κ$ = 0.906）；对五种指令微调的大模型（3B–14B参数）在三种量化精度（FP32、FP16、NF4）下运行于四个推理基准上，生成30,000条思维链输出；系统分析各类错误模式的变化趋势，并测试表面文本特征对‘空洞收敛’的检测能力。

Result: 尽管准确率在不同量化精度间高度稳定（最大下降3.1个百分点），但‘空洞收敛’表现出显著的模型规模依赖性：小模型（<12B）在NF4下急剧下降，大模型（≥12B）保持不变。‘捷径坍塌’在小模型中上升，‘信心雪球’几乎消失，且这些变化不可通过表面文本特征可靠检测（最佳F1=0.53），说明它们是隐藏的、部署相关的失败模式。

Conclusion: 后训练量化可能在不损害准确率的情况下严重扭曲模型推理逻辑，尤其在小模型中。当前基于准确率的评估无法识别此类深层问题，亟需引入对推理路径质量的评估机制，以提升大模型在实际应用中的可靠性与可解释性。

Abstract: We show that post-training quantization can silently alter how large language models reason even when task accuracy is preserved. Using a six-category failure taxonomy validated by two independent human annotators (Cohen's $κ$ = 0.906), we classify 30,000 chain-of-thought outputs from five instruction-tuned LLMs (3B--14B parameters) across three quantization precisions (FP32, FP16, NF4) and four reasoning benchmarks. We find that while accuracy is robust across precisions (maximum 3.1 pp drop), Hollow Convergence (correct answers reached through incomplete or unverifiable reasoning) shows a significant size-dependent shift under NF4, dropping sharply for the two smallest models tested but remaining invariant for models at 12B parameters and above. This effect is also benchmark-specific: GSM8K is categorically immune while LogiQA and ARC-Challenge show the largest shifts. Furthermore, under NF4, Shortcut Collapse rises from 44% to 78% of wrong-answer failures in LLaMA 3.2-3B while Confidence Snowballing collapses from 15.8% to near zero, a qualitative shift invisible to accuracy metrics. Finally, we show Hollow Convergence cannot be reliably detected from surface-level text features (best F1 = 0.53), establishing it as a deployment-relevant failure mode that standard evaluation pipelines cannot catch.

</details>


### [195] [Robust, Scalable Detection of Text Containment in Large Web-Crawled Corpora](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10020)
*Lars Henry Berge Olsen,Pierre Lison,Martin Jullum,Mark Anderson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FindMyText 是一个开源的 Python 工具，用于高效检测文本在语料库中是否存在部分或全部匹配。它通过改进文档指纹技术，引入新的匹配指纹链机制，能更准确地识别近似全文复制的内容，特别适用于版权内容验证。系统基于分布式、基于磁盘的索引框架，可扩展至大规模网络爬取数据集，并在 ArXiv、Wikipedia 和通用网页内容三个数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本相似性检测方法难以可靠区分近似全文复制与一般文本相似，尤其在版权内容检测场景中存在不足。需要一种更精确的方法来识别文本的完整或近似复制。

Method: 基于文档指纹技术，提出一种新机制以显式捕捉匹配指纹序列，形成指纹链，从而增强对近似全文复制的检测能力；采用分布式、基于磁盘的索引框架，支持大规模语料库处理。

Result: 在三个真实数据集（ArXiv、Wikipedia、通用网页）上的新基准测试中，FindMyText 在检测近似全文复制方面显著优于现有方法，具有更高的准确性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: FindMyText 通过创新的指纹链机制和高效的分布式索引架构，实现了对文本复制的高精度检测，是版权保护和文本真实性验证的理想工具。

Abstract: We present FindMyText, an open-source Python package designed to efficiently assess whether a given text appears, in part or in full, within a text corpus. The tool builds on prior techniques for document fingerprinting, but extends them with a novel mechanism to explicitly capture sequences of matching fingerprints. By identifying such chains, the tool can more reliably detect near-verbatim copies of a given text rather than mere textual similarities. This makes FindMyText particularly suited for verifying the presence of copyrighted material in a corpus. Leveraging a distributed, disk-based indexing framework, the system scales to large web-crawled datasets. Using a new benchmark for evaluating text containment methods, we show that FindMyText outperforms alternative approaches across three datasets (ArXiv papers, Wikipedia, and generic web content).

</details>


### [196] [Efficiently Adapting Spoken Language Models for the Singaporean Context](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10092)
*Ng Jia Sheng Jason*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究将开源语音语言模型（SLM）适应于新加坡内政部的敏感领域，涵盖新加坡四种官方语言的五个语音任务。通过LoRA微调、保护免于灾难性遗忘的代理文本问答数据集，以及结合CoBa重加权方案的多任务目标，成功构建了HTD-multilingual-QA数据集（504,853样本），并推出了HT-Moonstone（5B）模型。该模型在多数任务上表现优于甚至超过其7倍大小的SLM，且在口音和性别识别方面达到最佳水平，语音问答能力仅损失不到2%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索如何在原始训练数据不可访问且需要多语言语音查询交互的敏感领域中有效适配语音语言模型，特别是在新加坡多语言环境下的实际应用需求。

Method: 采用LoRA微调技术，构建用于防止灾难性遗忘的代理文本-问答数据集，并设计结合CoBa重加权机制的多任务学习目标，以提升模型在多语言语音任务上的泛化能力。

Result: HT-Moonstone（5B）模型在多个任务上性能超越或匹配更大规模的SLM，具备卓越的口音与性别识别能力，同时保持了接近原始的语音问答性能（损失<2%），并建立了大规模多语言问答数据集HTD-multilingual-QA。

Conclusion: 本研究证明了在缺乏原始数据的情况下，通过合理的方法设计仍可高效适配语音语言模型至复杂多语言敏感场景，为未来在真实世界中的部署提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Spoken language models (SLMs) unify speech perception and reasoning, but adapting them to sensitive domains is underexplored, especially when the original training data is inaccessible and the use case demands multilingual, spoken-query interaction. We adapt an open-source SLM to the Singaporean Home Team context across five speech tasks in Singapore's four official languages, combining LoRA fine-tuning, a surrogate text-QA dataset that guards against catastrophic forgetting, and a multi-task objective that adapts the CoBa reweighting scheme to speech. We also build HTD-multilingual-QA, a 504,853 sample multilingual QA dataset in text and spoken form. The resulting HT-Moonstone (5B) matches or outperforms SLMs up to 7x its size on most tasks, attains the best accent and gender recognition among all models evaluated, and loses under 2\% of its original speech QA ability.

</details>


### [197] [Cost of Reasoning in non-English Languages: A Case Study on Japanese](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10114)
*Yuu Jinnai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了训练能够在日语中进行推理的语言模型的可行性，以实现用户语言偏好下的强推理性能。通过基于Qwen-3-8B持续预训练并使用GRPO方法，开发了日语推理版的Qwen-3-Swallow-8B模型，并在编程、数学和科学基准测试中评估其表现。结果显示，日语推理控制是可行的，但性能仅达到与英语强基线相当的水平；此外，在日语文化相关任务上表现反而不如基线模型，表明日语推理并未自动提升文化相关任务的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了实现用户自定义语言下的强推理能力，同时保持模型可解释性和安全性，需要开发能在非英语语言（如日语）中有效推理的模型，从而满足实际应用需求。

Method: 基于Qwen-3-8B进行持续预训练，构建日语大模型Qwen-3-Swallow-8B，采用GRPO（Generalized Reward Policy Optimization）方法进行微调，以实现日语推理能力。在多个编码、数学、科学及日本文化相关基准上进行评估。

Result: 所训练的日语推理模型在编程、数学和科学任务上的表现与最强的英语推理基线相当，但在日本文化相关任务上的表现低于基线模型，说明日语推理并未自然提升文化相关任务的性能。

Conclusion: 尽管在日语中进行推理是可行的，且能维持较强的通用推理能力，但其在特定文化任务上的表现未见提升，提示需额外针对文化语境优化训练策略。

Abstract: Reasoning Language Models (RLMs) achieve their strongest performance when they reason in English, the language for which reasoning-oriented training data is most abundant. However, reasoning trace is a clue for model interpretability and safety, and useful in practice for both the model users and for model developers. Thus, it is desirable to be able to develop a model that reasons in a language of the user's choice, while still maintaining strong reasoning performance. To this end, we study the feasibility of training a model that reasons in Japanese. We develop a Japanese-reasoning variant of Qwen-3-Swallow-8B, which is a Japanese LLM continually pretrained from Qwen-3-8B, with GRPO and evaluate it across coding, math, and science benchmarks. The study shows that reasoning-language control is feasible by training a Japanese continually pretrained model with GRPO. However, its performance is at best on par with strong English-reasoning baselines on several benchmarks. We also evaluate the trained model on Japanese cultural benchmarks and observe that the model's performance is worse than the baseline models, suggesting that the reasoning in Japanese does not immediately improve performance on culturally relevant tasks for free.

</details>


### [198] [Instruction Set and Language for Hypergraphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10194)
*Mario Pascual-Gonzalez,Ezequiel Lopez-Rubio*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出IsalHG方法，将有限连通超图结构编码为紧凑指令字母表上的字符串；通过虚拟机执行编码与解码，实现超图同构的原生判断；验证了编码-解码的正确性，并在基准测试中显示该方法虽理论先进但实际效率远低于传统基于Levi图的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有超图同构判定依赖于转化为图同构问题（通过Levi图），存在冗余计算和性能开销，本文旨在提出一种原生、直接处理超图同构的编码框架，减少对图同构引擎的依赖。

Method: 设计一个基于虚拟机的编码系统，利用循环双向链表和多指针结构表示超图节点关系；采用贪心算法（h2s）生成字符串，通过回溯法生成字典序最大的规范字符串（canonical string）以作为同构不变量。

Result: 验证了编码-解码的正确性（150个随机均匀超图和组合设计）；所有4种方法（IsalHG与nauty/Traces/bliss）在600个测试案例中一致得出同构结论；但IsalHG在运行时间上比主流基线慢3至5个数量级（几何平均比值311×到117,672×）。

Conclusion: 提出了一个具有完整性的超图编码框架和规范字符串的同构不变量猜想；首次实现了原生超图同构与基于Levi图方法的直接对比，尽管效率较低，但为理论研究提供了新范式。

Abstract: We present IsalHG, a method for representing the structure of any finite, connected hypergraph of bounded hyperedge arity as a string over a compact instruction alphabet $Σ_{\mathrm{HG}}$. The encoding is executed by a small virtual machine comprising a sparse hypergraph, a circular doubly-linked list (CDLL) of node references, and $k$ traversal pointers, where $k$ bounds the hyperedge arity. Instructions either move a pointer through the CDLL or insert a hyperedge, optionally together with new nodes, into the hypergraph. Every string over $Σ_{\mathrm{HG}}$ decodes to a valid hypergraph; the alphabet is closed. A greedy \emph{HypergraphToString} (h2s) algorithm encodes any connected hypergraph into a string; a backtracking variant seeded at nodes of lexicographically maximal structural tuple produces a \emph{canonical string} $w^{*}$, which we conjecture to be a complete isomorphism invariant. Canonical-string equality then decides hypergraph isomorphism natively, without the standard reduction to the Levi incidence graph followed by a graph-isomorphism engine. We verify the round-trip property $s2h(h2s(H)) \cong H$ on 150 connected random uniform hypergraphs and on named combinatorial designs, and we benchmark the canonical algorithm against the three practically available exact baselines -- nauty, Traces, and bliss operating on the 2-coloured Levi graph -- across a $(n, c)$ grid with ten seeds per cell. All four methods agree on every one of 600 isomorphism verdicts, consistent with the completeness conjecture. On wall-clock time the Levi baselines dominate every tested cell by three to five orders of magnitude (geometric-mean ratio $311\times$ to $117{,}672\times$), which we report as measured. We contribute the representation framework, a conjecture of canonical completeness, and the first native-versus-Levi benchmark for hypergraph isomorphism.

</details>


### [199] [Equal Accuracy, Unequal Evidence: Search APIs as Decision Surfaces for Tool-Using Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10198)
*Sriram Selvam,Anneswa Ghosh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了搜索API在智能代理中的角色，提出其不仅是信息检索工具，更是影响代理决策的‘决策表面’。通过对比Brave、Tavily、Firecrawl三个搜索提供商在固定代理策略下的表现，发现尽管答案准确率相近（25-26/100），但各提供商提供的证据经济结构差异显著：Brave提供高质量摘要，Tavily将关键链接置于首位，Firecrawl促进更广泛探索。研究引入‘表面矛盾至黄金答案URL比率’以量化不同供应商的决策影响力，表明搜索提供商的选择本质上是检索预算与策略权衡的结果，而非单纯的召回率问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统搜索API评估主要关注答案准确性，但实际应用中，搜索结果的呈现形式（如标题、摘要、链接）直接影响智能代理是否继续搜索或获取全文，因此需要从‘决策表面’视角重新审视搜索API的作用。

Method: 使用一个固定的GPT-5.4代理，配合search_web和fetch_page两个工具，在SEALQA-HARD数据集上测试三个不同搜索提供商（Brave、Tavily、Firecrawl），仅改变搜索服务源。通过Kimi-K2.6人工标注器对每个可见内容元素进行标注，生成6,869条有效判断，并采用语义匹配标准评估正确性。

Result: 三个搜索提供商在答案准确率上表现接近（25, 25, 26 / 100），但在证据经济结构上存在明显差异：Brave的摘要富含可直接支持答案的信息；Tavily在排名首位集中了高价值链接；Firecrawl则促使代理进行更广泛的探索行为。此外，表面矛盾至黄金答案URL比率在0.92到2.59之间波动，反映出不同提供商对代理决策路径的影响差异。

Conclusion: 搜索API不仅仅是信息召回工具，更是决定代理行为路径的关键决策界面。选择不同的搜索服务相当于在检索预算和策略之间做出权衡，应综合考虑其对代理决策过程的影响，而不仅仅是最终答案的准确率。

Abstract: Search APIs are the fundamental retrieval layer for many agents and are often their most frequently used tool. Traditional search APIs provide URLs, titles, and snippets that preview website contents. Because full-page retrieval is token-intensive, agent retrieval architectures increasingly use progressive disclosure: the agent first sees snippets and then chooses whether to fetch full pages. In such systems, search API performance is often evaluated primarily by answer accuracy. We argue that a commercial search API is better understood as a decision surface: the ranked snippets, URLs, and metadata that determine whether an agent answers immediately, searches again, or spends tokens opening pages. We test this claim with one frozen GPT-5.4 agent, two tools (search_web and fetch_page), and 100 questions from SEALQA-HARD, varying only the search provider (Brave, Tavily, Firecrawl). A Kimi-K2.6 oracle labels every content element visible to the agent (URL, title, snippet, and fetched page, when fetched), producing 6,869 valid per-URL judgments. We use an audited correct-answer label, semantic match, which preserves exact matches while accepting harmless formatting and naming variants. Under this measure, the providers remain close (25, 25, 26 / 100), but their evidence economies differ sharply: Brave offers gold-answer-rich snippets, Tavily concentrates gold-supporting URLs at rank 1, and Firecrawl is associated with broader exploration under this fixed agent policy. We also introduce a surface contradiction-to-gold URL ratio, which varies from 0.92 to 2.59. Provider choice is therefore a retrieval-budget and policy decision, not merely a recall decision.

</details>


### [200] [Consensus vs. Dissent: Dynamic LLM Modeling of Subjective Preferences in Group Recommenders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10235)
*Cedric Waterschoot,Nava Tintarev,Francesco Barile*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了大型语言模型（LLMs）是否能够模拟群体推荐系统中对偏好分布的敏感性，进而根据人类对公平、满意度和共识的细微感知，动态选择最优的偏好聚合策略及推荐结果。通过在人类调查数据上微调LLMs，构建了Judgmental Llama和Judgmental OLMo作为推荐流程中的实时判断模型，并结合社会选择聚合策略生成多个候选推荐，动态选择最符合预测的人类评价结果。用户研究（n=284）表明，该方法在满意度和群体共识方面得分最高；且当考虑LLM判断与群体配置（如少数派或联盟）之间的交互效应时，其与人类感知的契合度更高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有群体推荐系统对群体内部偏好分布敏感，但如何根据具体群体结构动态选择合适的偏好聚合策略仍具挑战。本研究旨在探索大语言模型能否基于人类主观判断（公平、满意度、共识）实现智能策略选择，以提升推荐效果的可接受性与人性化。

Method: 在人类调查数据上微调大型语言模型（LLMs），构建Judgmental Llama和Judgmental OLMo作为判断模型；利用从DeepSeek-V3.1提炼的推理数据集和人工标注真值，设计一个基于社会选择聚合策略的多候选推荐生成与动态选择管道，根据预测的人类评价优化推荐输出。

Result: 用户研究（n=284）显示，该方法在满意度和群体共识方面表现最佳；且当引入LLM判断与群体配置（如少数派或联盟）的交互效应时，模型预测与人类感知高度一致，验证了动态适应策略的有效性。

Conclusion: 大语言模型能够有效捕捉人类对公平、满意度和共识的主观判断，并在不同群体配置下动态调整聚合策略，显著提升推荐系统的用户体验。该研究支持基于群体结构自适应选择推荐策略，并凸显了LLM在融合主观判断方面的优势。

Abstract: Previous work in group recommender systems has demonstrated a sensitivity to the distribution of preferences within a group. Specifically, the selection of the preference aggregation strategy benefits from considering such group configurations. In this paper, we study whether LLMs are able to mimic this sensitivity and to select the ideal aggregation strategy (and corresponding recommendation) according to nuanced human perceptions of fairness, satisfaction, and consensus.
  We do this by fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) on human survey data to serve as real-time judgmental models within the recommendation pipeline. Using a reasoning dataset distilled from DeepSeek-V3.1 and human ground truth assessments, we develop Judgmental Llama and Judgmental OLMo to simulate group assessments. Our pipeline successfully generates multiple recommendation candidates based on social choice-based aggregation strategies and dynamically selects the one that maximizes these predicted human-like evaluations. We further validate these suggestions in a user study (n=284) and find that our methodology achieved the highest scores for satisfaction and group consensus. Furthermore, we find that LLM judgments are most aligned with human perceptions of fairness, satisfaction and consensus when we also consider interaction effects between our LLM-based method and group configuration (e.g., minority or coalition). These findings give further support for dynamically adapting aggregation strategies to specific within-group preference distributions, and highlight the advantage of using LLMs for an adaptation that is aligned with subjective human judgments.

</details>


### [201] [PTEI: Integrating Personality Traits to Enhance Emotional Intelligence in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10245)
*Amir Reza Jafari,Praboda Rajapaksha,Reza Farahbakhsh,Noel Crespi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PTEI框架通过整合MBTI和OCEAN人格特质，提升大语言模型在情感推理任务中的表现。该方法利用对比学习优化检索系统，确保情境与人格特征对齐，从而增强情感理解能力。实验表明，PTEI显著提升了多种LLMs的情感理解能力，尤其在GPT模型上效果更佳，结合思维链（CoT）可进一步提高4%准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型在复杂情感推理方面仍远低于人类水平，主要因缺乏对个体差异（如人格特质）的有效整合。人格特质是人类情感推断的基础，因此需将人格因素引入情感智能任务中以缩小差距。

Method: 提出PTEI框架，从情感场景中提取MBTI和OCEAN人格特质，并将其作为上下文知识融入人格感知提示中；采用对比学习构建优化的检索系统，实现情感与人格匹配的情境召回，提升推理质量。

Result: 在多个标准情感智能基准测试中，PTEI显著提升了各类大语言模型的情感理解能力，尤其对GPT系列模型提升明显；结合思维链推理后，准确率再提升4个百分点。

Conclusion: PTEI为人工智能系统提供了更深入的社会心理基础，推动其向具备更高级社会认知能力的方向发展。

Abstract: Despite advances in Emotional Intelligence (EI), Large Language Models (LLMs) still significantly underperform humans in complex emotional reasoning. This gap originates partly from the limited incorporation of individual differences, particularly personality traits, which are fundamental to human emotional inference. To address this, we propose PTEI, a novel framework for integrating Personality Traits into Emotional Intelligence tasks using LLMs. In PTEI, MBTI and OCEAN personality traits are first extracted directly from the given emotional scenarios and then utilized as contextual knowledge within personality-aware prompts, guiding LLMs to accurately infer emotions and their underlying causes. To ensure optimal contextual grounding, we employ Contrastive Learning to construct an optimized retrieval system that surfaces emotionally and personally aligned scenarios, enhancing reasoning quality. Extensive experiments on established EI benchmarks show that PTEI enhances the Emotional Understanding (EU) capabilities of various LLMs, with the strongest improvement observed in GPT models. Combining PTEI with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning yields an additional 4 percent increase in accuracy. These findings underscore PTEI's contribution toward advancing AI systems with more sophisticated social and psychological grounding.

</details>


### [202] [One mechanism for many mental spaces: a shared router over a value slot in language models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10248)
*Oliver Steele,Jiangtao Wen,Yuxing Han*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了变换器语言模型如何处理不同语义情境（如虚构、信念、时间、反事实等），发现模型通过一个统一的路由/槽位机制实现跨情境的语义构建。该机制使用可复用的值槽和可操控的路由索引来选择不同心理空间，且在多个模型家族中表现出跨类型一致性，表明模型并未对信念等特殊情境进行单独分离。路由结构具有低秩性，与实体身份线性组合，并由后期层的少数注意力头驱动。此外，实验显示该机制能驱动推理并支持组合性，证明其在跨情境通用性上的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统形式语义学将不同语境（如模态、时态、信念、表征）视为逻辑不同的独立空间；而Fauconnier的心理空间理论则主张这些是同一建构过程的结果。本研究旨在探究现代变压器语言模型究竟遵循哪种机制，以理解其对多情境语义的处理方式。

Method: 采用分布式对齐搜索（Distributed Alignment Search）训练子空间以控制特定情境类型（如反事实、信念、虚构、时间），并通过测试其在其他情境上的泛化能力，分析模型内部的路由机制。利用神经探针和消融实验揭示路由结构的性质及其在推理和组合中的作用。

Result: 模型在所有情境类型间表现出高度跨类型控制能力，信念未被特别区分；路由为低秩结构，与实体标识线性组合，仅通过少数后期注意力头起作用；一个基于规则结论训练的子空间能改变模型的推理结果但不改变其输出报告，证明机制驱动推理；组合式空间构建器可生成新的共享路由，体现组合性。

Conclusion: Transformer语言模型在机制上实现了Fauconnier心理空间理论的统一建构，而非形式语义学所强调的分立逻辑。该机制具备跨情境通用性、可组合性和推理驱动能力，为理解大模型如何处理复杂语义情境提供了新视角。

Abstract: Language builds discourse contexts other than the actual: a painting, a belief, a memory, a hypothetical. Each is a mental space in which the same entity can take a different value, as when a flower is red in reality but purple in a portrait. Formal semantics keeps these contexts apart because their logics differ (modal, temporal, doxastic, depictive); Fauconnier's mental-space theory treats them as one space-building operation. We ask which of these a transformer language model implements, and find a mechanistic version of Fauconnier's unification. The model uses one router/slot format across the inventory: a reusable value slot stores attributed content, and a causally manipulable router (the space index) selects which space is read. A subspace trained with Distributed Alignment Search to control one space type, counterfactual, belief, fictional, or temporal, also controls the others, well above a random floor, on three model families; belief, which formal semantics marks as a distinct case, is not specially separated. The router is low-rank, composes additively with entity identity, and acts through a few late-layer heads. Two further results show the mechanism drives inference and composes: a subspace trained on a rule-derived conclusion flips what the model infers while dissociating from what it reports, and composing space-builders mints a fresh router over the shared slot. This paper establishes the cross-type generality. A companion paper develops belief in depth, because of its special status in philosophy, psychology, and linguistics (epistemology, theory of mind, and propositional attitude reports).

</details>


### [203] [Which Languages Transfer Best to Warlpiri? A Similarity-Based Study for Low-Resource ASR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10256)
*Pravina Mylvaganam,Eliathamby Ambikairajah,Ting Dang,Vidhyasaharan Sethu,Tuende Szalay*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了语言相似性如何在极低资源条件下提升自动语音识别（ASR）的跨语言迁移效果。针对澳大利亚原住民语言Warlpiri因标注语音数据极少而难以训练的问题，提出结合预训练语音模型的声学相似性与基于语言类型、音素库、语法和句法特征的语言相似性的框架，以评估高资源源语言对Warlpiri ASR迁移的有效性。实验表明，声学和类型学上相似的语言在微调中表现更优，特别是阿萨姆语和印地语显著降低了词错误率和字符错误率；相关性分析显示，声学相似性是微调性能最强的预测因子，而音素库和类型学相似性则更有利于零样本迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Warlpiri语言缺乏足够的标注语音数据，导致传统ASR方法难以有效训练，因此需要通过跨语言迁移来提升性能，而选择最合适的源语言至关重要。

Method: 结合预训练语音模型的声学相似性与语言类型、音素库、语法及句法特征的语言相似性，构建一个综合评分框架，用于排名高资源源语言，并评估其在Warlpiri ASR任务中的迁移效果。

Result: 实验结果显示，声学和类型学上相似的语言在微调阶段显著优于单语和多语基线，尤其是阿萨姆语和印地语大幅降低词错误率和字符错误率；相关性分析表明，声学相似性是微调性能的最佳预测指标，而音素库和类型学相似性对零样本迁移更具解释力。

Conclusion: 在极低资源语言如Warlpiri的ASR任务中，融合声学与语言学相似性的跨语言迁移策略能有效提升性能，其中声学相似性对微调效果影响最大，而语言类型学特征在零样本迁移中更具价值。

Abstract: This paper investigates how language similarity can improve cross-lingual transfer for automatic speech recognition (ASR) in extremely low-resource settings. Warlpiri, an Australian Aboriginal language, has very limited transcribed speech data, making transfer learning essential. We propose a framework combining acoustic similarity from pre-trained speech models with linguistic similarity based on typology, phoneme inventories, grammatical, and syntactic features to rank high-resource source languages and evaluate their effectiveness for ASR transfer to Warlpiri. Experiments with Whisper show that acoustically and typologically similar languages outperform monolingual and multilingual baselines. Assamese and Hindi achieve substantial reductions in word and character error rates. Correlation analysis further indicates that acoustic similarity is the strongest predictor of fine-tuning performance, while phoneme inventory and typological similarity better explain zero-shot transfer.

</details>


### [204] [Language Re-generation: An investigation into information locality effects on reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10268)
*Amirhossein Mohammadi,Laurence E. Frank,Albert Gatt,Robert A. Bagheri*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究通过重建框架分析语言模型在处理被扰动的不可能语言时恢复自然语言的能力，发现模型倾向于恢复更短的依存距离，表现出对信息局部性的偏好，且恢复难度与局部性破坏程度相关。结构恢复与表面恢复、流畅性与忠实重建存在分离现象，句长也影响恢复效果。整体结果表明信息局部性是语言学习与恢复的共同约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究语言模型是否能从被扰动的不可能语言中恢复自然语言，并揭示其归纳偏置，尤其是信息局部性的作用。现有研究多关注可学习性，但缺乏对模型如何重构语言结构的深入分析。

Method: 采用微调GPT-2模型的方法，在预训练于不可能语言的基础上，对三种不同类型的扰动输入进行自然英语的重建任务，评估模型在结构、表面和流畅性方面的恢复能力，并量化依存长度变化。

Result: 模型恢复出的结构具有更短的依赖长度，反映出对信息局部性的偏好；结构恢复与表面恢复、流畅性与忠实重建之间存在解耦；句子越长，在局部结构保留时恢复越好，但在全局打乱下则完全崩溃；恢复难度与学习难度一致，表明信息局部性是核心约束机制。

Conclusion: 信息局部性是语言模型内在的归纳偏置，不仅影响其学习能力，也决定其重构自然语言的倾向，重建框架为揭示模型深层结构偏好提供了有效手段。

Abstract: Information locality, the tendency for syntactically related words to appear close together, shapes both human language processing and language model learning.
