While prior work has examined whether language models can acquire impossible languages, it remains unclear whether they can recover natural language from such input and what this reveals about their inductive biases. We address this by complementing learnability-based approaches with a reconstruction framework: fine-tuning GPT-2 models pre-trained on impossible languages to reconstruct natural English from three perturbation types. Our findings show that the recovered structures exhibit shorter dependency lengths than the original text, mirroring the locality preference observed in unconstrained language model generation and providing a quantitative signature of an architectural bias that learnability experiments alone do not reveal. Recovery difficulty increases with the degree of locality disruption. Structural recovery (dependency Triple F1) dissociates from surface recovery (Exact Match), while fluency dissociates from faithful reconstruction under global shuffling. Sentence length further modulates performance: longer sentences facilitate recovery when local structure is preserved but lead to complete collapse under global shuffling. Finally, recovery difficulty tracks learnability difficulty across perturbation types, suggesting that information locality is the shared constraint governing both.

</details>


### [205] [PolyInterview: An LLM-based Platform for Immersive Mock Interview Practice with Comprehensive Multimodal Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10310)
*Zhiyuan Wen,Jiannong Cao,Zijian Wang,Chen Chen,Xiaoyun Liu,Jianing Yin,Zhuo Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PolyInterview 是一个基于大语言模型的沉浸式模拟面试平台，能够根据职位描述和简历生成定制化问题，通过带有唇同步的数字人类面试官进行多轮口语面试，并对回答内容、语音表达和非语言行为进行全面评估。系统采用四个并行评估器，生成13个行为层面特征，汇总为10个评估维度和两个能力轨迹，结合KSA和STAR框架提供有行为证据支持的可操作建议。平台已公开，当前包含101个账户、1564次面试会话、7665个生成问题和1422个五阶段问题集。93.7%的会话中生成问题与目标职位描述高度匹配。十位专家评估表明其问题设计合理且反馈具有实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的面试准备系统通常只解决部分需求，如固定问题序列、有限沟通渠道或缺乏证据支持的反馈。真实面试机会少，专家模拟辅导成本高，自我练习又缺乏自适应对话和结构化评估。因此需要一种能提供个性化、互动性强且全面评估的模拟面试平台。

Method: 利用大语言模型（LLM）分析职位描述和简历，生成针对性面试问题；通过数字人类面试官进行多轮语音交互，实现答案感知的追问；采用四个并行评估器分析回答内容、语音表现和非语言行为，提取13个行为特征，归纳为10个评估方面和2个能力轨道；基于KSA和STAR框架生成带证据支持的评分报告与改进建议。

Result: 平台已上线，当前数据包括101个账户、1564次面试会话、7665个生成问题和1422个五阶段问题集。93.7%的会话中生成问题与目标职位描述高度相关。十位专家评估认为问题设计质量高，反馈具有可操作性。

Conclusion: PolyInterview 有效实现了个性化、沉浸式且全面的模拟面试体验，解决了现有系统在适应性、互动性和评估深度方面的不足，为求职者提供了高质量的面试准备工具。

Abstract: Preparing for job interviews is important for securing desired positions, yet realistic practice remains difficult to access: real interviews are infrequent, expert mock coaching is costly, and self-practice offers neither adaptive dialogue nor structured assessment. Existing systems typically address only parts of this need through fixed question sequences, limited communication channels, or feedback with little supporting evidence. We present PolyInterview, an LLM-based platform for immersive mock interview practice with comprehensive multimodal assessment. PolyInterview uses the target job description and CV to generate questions tailored to the role and candidate, conducts multi-turn spoken interviews with a lip-synced digital human interviewer that asks answer-aware follow-up questions, and evaluates response content, vocal delivery, and non-verbal behavior. Four parallel evaluators produce 13 behavior-level features that are aggregated into 10 assessment aspects and two competency tracks. Guided by the KSA and STAR frameworks, the report links each score to behavioral evidence and actionable recommendations. PolyInterview is publicly accessible. Its current all-account snapshot contains 101 accounts, 1,564 interview sessions, 7,665 generated questions, and 1,422 five-stage question sets. Generated questions are more closely aligned with their matched job description than with cross-role job descriptions in 93.7% of sessions. An evaluation by ten experts found strong question plans and actionable feedback.

</details>


### [206] [Polarization Detection: A Hybrid Approach with AfroXLMR-Social and DeBERTa for Low- and High-Resource Settings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10312)
*Muhammad Abdullahi Said*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文针对英语和豪萨语中的极化话语检测与表征问题，提出一种混合建模策略：英语二分类任务采用DeBERTa模型，豪萨语及所有细粒度子任务（类型与表现形式）则使用领域适配的多语言模型AfroXLMR-Social。为应对计算资源限制与数据稀缺，引入低秩适应（LoRA）与文本数据增强（nlpaug）。实验表明，根据子任务需求选择合适模型可实现最佳性能平衡，各项任务均取得有竞争力的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线极化现象迅速蔓延，威胁社会凝聚力，亟需在多种语言背景下具备鲁棒性的自动化检测系统。现有方法在非英语语种（如豪萨语）上的表现受限，且面临数据稀疏与计算成本高的挑战，因此需要更高效、跨语言的解决方案。

Method: 采用混合建模策略：英语二分类任务使用单语强项的DeBERTa；豪萨语及细粒度任务则使用经过领域适配的多语言模型AfroXLMR-Social。结合低秩适应（LoRA）以降低参数量，利用nlpaug进行文本数据增强以缓解数据稀缺问题。

Result: 在所有三个子任务中均取得了有竞争力的性能表现，验证了针对不同子任务选择合适模型的有效性，实现了性能与效率的良好平衡。

Conclusion: 模型选择应根据具体子任务需求进行定制化设计，结合领域适配的多语言模型与轻量化技术（如LoRA）及数据增强，是实现高效、跨语言极化话语检测的关键。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of online polarization threatens social cohesion, necessitating robust automated detection systems that operate effectively across diverse linguistic contexts. This paper presents our system description for the POLAR Shared Task 2026, focusing on the detection and characterization of polarized discourse in English and Hausa. We propose a hybrid modeling strategy: for English binary detection, we leverage the monolingual strength of \textbf{DeBERTa}, while for Hausa and all fine-grained subtasks (Types and Manifestations), we utilize \textbf{AfroXLMR-Social}. This domain-adapted multilingual model proved critical for capturing the nuances of polarization in social media text. To further address computational constraints and data scarcity, we implement Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and textual data augmentation via \texttt{nlpaug}. We report competitive results across all three subtasks, demonstrating that model selection tailored to specific subtask requirements yields the best balance of performance.

</details>


### [207] [Neutralizing Structural Inequality in the Nigerian FinTech Sector](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10317)
*Muhammad Abdullahi Said*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于尼日利亚金融科技领域销售点欺诈检测的分层人机协作模型，旨在解决数据代理隐含结构性不平等的问题。通过引入校准集成模型作为主要过滤器，采用三阶段路由策略，将具有认知不确定性（如新账户冷启动）的交易分配给专家分析师，高风险案件则交由高级主管处理。为优化人力有限资源，采用动态影子价格机制分配人类注意力，并引入随机审计以防止人工技能退化。实验表明，该模型在欺诈召回率上比自主基线提升24.79个百分点，互补性差距显著降低1.88%，区域性能差距从19.43%降至2.88%，有效消除了结构性偏见，保障了农村用户因环境偶然因素被排除在数字金融体系之外的风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 算法决策系统在金融服务中常依赖可能编码结构性不平等的数据代理，特别是在尼日利亚等基础设施薄弱地区，网络延迟等随机噪声易被误判为欺诈意图，导致对农村用户产生歧视性结果。因此需要一种能识别并缓解此类‘歧视转嫁’问题的机制。

Method: 提出分层人机协同模型，包含三阶段路由策略：使用校准集成模型进行初步筛选；将具有高认知不确定性的交易（如新账户）路由至专家分析师；高风险案例交由高级主管处理；结合动态影子价格优化人力资源分配，并通过随机审计维持人工判断能力。

Result: 实验结果显示，与自主基线相比，模型实现1.88%的互补性差距下降和24.79个百分点的欺诈召回率提升；区域性能差距由19.43%降至2.88%，显著减少结构性偏差，实现更公平的数字金融准入。

Conclusion: 分层协作机制能够有效应对算法中的结构性不平等，通过合理的人机分工与资源调配，确保弱势群体（如农村用户）不会因环境偶然因素而被排除在数字金融体系之外，实现实质性的机会平等。

Abstract: Algorithmic decision systems in financial services often rely on data proxies that inadvertently encode structural inequalities. This paper introduces a hierarchical human-AI triage model for Point of Sale fraud detection in the Nigerian FinTech sector. Adopting a We Are All Equal worldview, we address the challenge of discrimination laundering, wherein the system misinterprets infrastructure related aleatoric noise such as rural network timeouts as fraudulent intent. We implement a three-tier routing policy utilizing a calibrated ensemble model as a primary filter. The policy routes transactions characterized by epistemic uncertainty such as cold start new accounts to specialist analysts while reserving high stakes cases for a senior supervisor. To manage finite human capacity, we utilize a dynamic shadow price to ration human attention and implement a random audit mechanism to prevent human skill atrophy. Our experimental results demonstrate a statistically significant 1.88\% complementarity gap and a 24.79\% percentage point gain in fraud recall over an autonomous baseline. Crucially, the model reduces the regional performance gap from 19.43 to 2.88 percentage points, neutralizing structural bias. Hierarchical collaboration provides a robust mechanism for substantive equality of opportunity, ensuring that rural accounts are not excluded from the digital economy due to environmental brute luck.

</details>


### [208] [CAFE: A Compound-AI Factorial Evaluation Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10380)
*Fabian Lukassen,Christoph Weisser,Thomas Kneib,Alexander Silbersdorff*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CAFE 是一个开源平台，用于评估复合人工智能系统（CAIS），通过因子设计方法系统地分析不同组件（如检索器、模型、提示）对答案质量的影响。它结合大语言模型和人工评分，利用混合效应模型量化各组件及其交互作用的效果，提供显著性、最佳配置、成本与延迟权衡等信息。在 HotpotQA 数据集上的实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前工具大多仅搜索最优配置或孤立评分输出，缺乏对影响答案质量的关键组件及其交互作用的解释能力。为解决这一问题，需要一种能够系统评估并解释复合AI系统中各组件贡献的方法。

Method: 将可替换的系统组件定义为因子，构建因子设计；运行所有组合配置，使用可配置的大语言模型与人工评分者共同打分；采用混合效应模型分析方差来源，计算效应大小、显著性，并评估配置间的成本与延迟权衡。

Result: 在 HotpotQA 基准数据集上，CAFE 成功恢复了预设的因子效应，在置换零假设下保持校准，能有效识别关键组件及交互作用，提供可靠的性能解释与优化建议。

Conclusion: CAFE 为复合人工智能系统的评估提供了可解释、可复现且可扩展的框架，不仅找到最佳配置，还揭示了哪些组件真正影响质量，填补了现有工具在系统性解释方面的空白。

Abstract: We introduce CAFE (Compound-AI Factorial Evaluation), an open-source platform that brings design of experiments to the evaluation of compound AI systems (CAIS). Such systems expose many interchangeable choices - e.g. which retriever, model, or prompt - and practitioners rarely know which of them most affects answer quality. With CAFE, a practitioner registers each swappable component of a pipeline as a factor to build a factorial design over the chosen factors, run the resulting configurations, and score the answers on a shared rubric using a configurable LLM judge together with human raters. From these ratings it attributes answer-quality variance to the components and their interactions with mixed-effects models and reports effect sizes, significance, the best configuration, cost and latency trade-offs, and judge-human reliability. Whereas existing tools mostly either search for a good configuration or score outputs in isolation, CAFE also explains which component drives quality and whether an observed difference is significant. We validate CAFE on a retrieval-augmented question-answering (QA) pipeline over the HotpotQA benchmark dataset, where it recovers planted factor effects and stays calibrated under a permutation null. CAFE is released as a Python package and as a Web application.

</details>


### [209] [Structured Thoughts For Improved Reasoning And Context Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10386)
*Zain Sarwar,Supriyo Chakraborty,Berkcan Kapusuzoglu,Chia-Hsuan Lee,Anirban Das,Stephen Rawls,Kartik Balasubramaniam,Sambit Sahu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Structured Thoughts框架，将推理过程组织为交替的<try>（探索性草稿）和<outcome>（结论摘要）块。通过构建标注数据集并微调模型，使模型采用结构化推理方式，在推理基准上性能提升最高达8.08%。该结构支持上下文剪枝：每对<try>/<outcome>后可丢弃<try>部分，仅保留结论，实现平均85%的内存/上下文节省，数学任务中性能下降约8.67%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长链思维（long chains of thought）虽有效但冗长且内存效率低，亟需更高效、可压缩的推理结构以提升大语言模型在复杂任务中的表现与资源利用效率。

Method: 通过分割现有推理轨迹生成<try>块，并用LLM生成对应的<outcome>摘要，构建结构化思维数据集；随后对预训练模型进行微调，使其学习结构化推理模式；并设计一种基于结构的上下文剪枝策略，实现内存节省。

Result: 模型在推理基准上性能最高提升8.08%；剪枝实现平均85%的内存/上下文节省，数学任务中性能下降8.67%。

Conclusion: Structured Thoughts框架有效提升了大语言模型的推理效率与内存利用率，结构化推理不仅增强性能，还支持高效的上下文管理，为长任务推理提供了可行优化路径。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) excel at generating long chains of thought, but long reasoning traces are often verbose and memory-inefficient. In this work, we introduce Structured Thoughts, a framework that organizes reasoning into alternating <try> and <outcome> blocks: <try> captures exploratory scratch work, while <outcome> contains the distilled conclusion of that step. We construct a dataset of structured thoughts by segmenting reasoning traces into <try> blocks and prompting an LLM to summarize each step into its corresponding <outcome>. Fine-tuning pretrained foundation models on this reformatted data produces models that adopt the structured reasoning style, leading to performance gains of up to 8.08\% on reasoning benchmarks compared to standard SFT. The explicit structure also enables context pruning: after each <try>/<outcome> pair, the <try> can be pruned, allowing the model to retain conclusions without keeping the full scratch work in the context. A proof-of-concept pruning implementation achieves an average of 85\% memory / context savings with an 8.67\% performance drop across mathematical tasks.

</details>


### [210] [A Stepwise Questioning Expert-Editor Multi-Agent Framework for Long-Document Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10390)
*Lingyun Shen,Xuejia Guo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于多智能体的逐步提问方法，通过专家与编辑智能体在不同方面提出问题并提供修订线索，以提升大语言模型在长文档摘要任务中的表现。实验在两个代表性科学数据集上进行，结果表明该方法有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在长文档摘要任务中受限于输入长度，难以处理超长文本，因此需要增强其能力以提高摘要质量。

Method: 提出专家-编辑逐步提问的多智能体方法，由专家和编辑智能体引导其他智能体从不同角度提问，并提供针对性修订提示，逐步优化摘要内容。

Result: 在两个代表性长文档科学数据集上的实验表明，所提方法显著提升了摘要质量，且在自动评估指标上表现优异。

Conclusion: 所提出的多智能体逐步提问方法能够有效克服大语言模型在长文档摘要中的局限性，为未来长文本生成提供了可行的改进路径。

Abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) have shown promising potential in news summarization tasks, their performance on long-document summarization remains challenging as their length often exceeds the input limits. As the agent investment, which provide possibility to improve the inherent capabilities of LLMs. To enhance the effectiveness of long-document summarization based on LLMs, this paper proposes an expert-editor stepwise questioning multi-agent method, in which the expert and the editor guide another agent to refine the summary by posing questions on different aspects of the content and providing targeted clues for revision. We conducted experiments on two representative long-document scientific datasets and evaluated the results through widely recognized automatic metrics. The results demonstrated the effectiveness of our method.

</details>


### [211] [Enjoy Your Talk: A Human-Centered Benchmark for Multi-Turn Dialogue with Decoupled User Simulation, Target Modeling, and Judging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10428)
*Jinglan Gong,Jiefan Lu,Hewei Guo,Kehan Li,Zhiyuan Han,Jihang Jiang,Wenwen Tong,Lewei Lu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: EYT-Bench 是一个以人为中心的多轮对话评估基准，采用三者解耦设计，包含基于人物设定的用户模拟器、分离意图感知与响应生成的目标模型，以及独立的第三方LLM评判器。该基准使用真实人类标注的人设数据集（Nemotron-Personas-USA 和 PersonaMem-v2），避免合成数据带来的偏见。引入轨迹级指标：基于嵌入的意图漂移和最终意图完成率（FICR）。在17个目标模型 × 200次对话的评估中发现：(i) 尽管顶尖闭源与开源模型在主观维度（共情/人设/拟人化）上差异很小（≤0.3），但在客观意图追踪上差距可达9倍；(ii) 推理过程（“thinking on”）显著提升长上下文人设下的意图追踪准确率（Gemma-4 提升0.47–0.50），但对主观评分影响甚微；(iii) 人设格式主导轨迹分布，FICR在Nemotron-USA中饱和于0.95以上，而在PersonaMem-v2中波动于0.53–0.88；(iv) 预热效应在16/17模型中稳定存在，仅GPT-5.5出现反转；跨评判器消融实验表明，目标模型排名与最终意图满意度在不同评判器间保持一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单轮评估基准无法充分探测大语言模型作为多轮对话伙伴的能力，如人物一致性、意图演化跟踪、情感动态及目标完成度。因此需要更贴近真实对话场景的评估框架，以揭示模型在复杂交互中的真实表现。

Method: 提出EYT-Bench，采用三者解耦架构：用户模拟器基于真实人设数据生成对话输入；目标模型分离意图感知与响应生成模块；独立的第三方LLM评判器进行评价，支持多评判器集成。使用真实人设数据集（Nemotron-Personas-USA、PersonaMem-v2）减少合成偏差。引入轨迹级指标：意图漂移与最终意图完成率（FICR）。通过大规模实验（17模型×200对话）分析模型表现，并进行跨评判器和参数敏感性分析。

Result: (i) 顶尖闭源与开源模型在主观维度差异小（≤0.3），但客观意图追踪能力差距达9倍；(ii) 启用推理可使长上下文意图追踪准确率提升0.47–0.50，主观评分基本不变；(iii) 人设格式显著影响表现，FICR在Nemotron-USA中高于0.95，在PersonaMem-v2中波动于0.53–0.88；(iv) 预热效应在多数模型中稳定，仅GPT-5.5例外；跨评判器实验验证了结果鲁棒性。

Conclusion: EYT-Bench 提供了一套全面、可靠且可扩展的多轮对话评估体系，能够有效揭示模型在复杂对话任务中的真实能力，尤其凸显了推理机制对客观意图追踪的显著作用，同时证明了评估框架在不同评判器间的稳定性，为未来对话模型研发提供了重要基准。

Abstract: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) as multi-turn conversational partners requires probing capabilities that single-turn benchmarks miss: persona consistency, evolving intent tracking, emotional dynamics, and goal completion. We introduce EYT-Bench, a human-centered benchmark built around a three-party decoupled design: a persona-grounded user simulator, a target model that separates intent perception from response generation, and an independent third-party LLM judge with optional multi-judge ensembling. Personas are sampled from public human-curated corpora, Nemotron-Personas-USA and PersonaMem-v2, rather than synthesized, reducing LLM-induced persona bias. EYT-Bench also introduces two trajectory-level metrics: embedding-based intent drift and final-intent completion rate (FICR), inspired by tau-bench. In a 17-target x 200-dialogue evaluation, EYT-Bench reveals four findings: (i) state-of-the-art closed- and open-source models are statistically close on subjective dimensions (empathy / persona / anthropomorphism vary within <= 0.3), but differ by up to 9x on objective intent tracking; (ii) reasoning ("thinking on") sharply improves objective tracking on long-context personas (+0.47-0.50 latent-intent accuracy on Gemma-4) while leaving subjective scores nearly unchanged; (iii) persona format dominates trajectory spread, with FICR saturating above 0.95 on Nemotron-USA but spreading from 0.53 to 0.88 on PersonaMem-v2; and (iv) the warm-up effect is robust on 16/17 models (one outlier, GPT-5.5, reverses the effect), with stable rankings across alpha in [0.05, 0.15]. A cross-judge ablation using deepseek-v4-pro confirms that target rankings and final-intent satisfaction are preserved across judges.

</details>


### [212] [Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models Using Diversion Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10476)
*Basel Abdeen,S M Tahmid Siddiqui,Meah Tahmeed Ahmed,Anoop Singhal,Latifur Khan,Punya Parag Modi,Ehab Al-Shaer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为diversion decoding的新方法，通过在解码阶段主动挑战模型生成的响应，提取反映模型对替代答案抵抗能力的特征，并利用这些特征训练机器学习模型，构建一种衡量LLM不确定性的启发式指标。实验表明该方法在降低计算复杂度的同时，优于现有方法，具有高效且鲁棒的幻觉检测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型虽具备强大的文本生成能力，但存在幻觉问题，即生成不实信息或虚构知识，影响其可靠性。现有评估不确定性和检测幻觉的方法多为概率性且计算成本高，难以实际应用。因此需要一种更高效、实用的解决方案。

Method: 提出diversion decoding方法，在解码阶段主动引入干扰，迫使模型生成替代答案，从而提取反映其对干扰抵抗能力的特征；基于这些特征训练机器学习模型，建立不确定性启发式评估机制。

Result: 实验结果显示，diversion decoding在保持高性能的同时，显著降低了计算复杂度，优于现有方法，能够高效、可靠地检测大语言模型的幻觉行为。

Conclusion: diversion decoding是一种高效且鲁棒的幻觉检测方法，通过在解码阶段主动挑战模型输出，有效捕捉其不确定性，为提升大语言模型的可信度提供了实用工具。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a powerful tool for retrieving knowledge through seamless, human-like interactions. Despite their advanced text generation capabilities, LLMs exhibit hallucination tendencies, where they generate factually incorrect statements and fabricate knowledge, undermining their reliability and trustworthiness. Multiple studies have explored methods to evaluate LLM uncertainty and detect hallucinations. However, existing approaches are often probabilistic and computationally expensive, limiting their practical applicability. In this paper, we introduce diversion decoding, a novel method for developing an LLM uncertainty heuristic by actively challenging model-generated responses during the decoding phase. Through diversion decoding, we extract features that capture the LLM's resistance to produce alternative answers and utilize these features to train a machine-learning model to develop a heuristic measure of the LLM's uncertainty. Our experimental results demonstrate that diversion decoding outperforms existing methods with significantly lower computational complexity, making it an efficient and robust solution for evaluating hallucination detection.

</details>


### [213] [When Reasoning Hurts Legal Drafting: The Verbalization Bottleneck in Patent Claim Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10480)
*Lekang Jiang,Wenjun Sun,Stephan Goetz*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了思维链（CoT）提示在专利权利要求生成中的有效性，提出了一种针对该任务的特定CoT方法。结果显示，增强推理的提示能提升权利要求质量；更重要的是，隐式CoT（即内部推理不显式表达）表现优于显式CoT。显式推理会因抽象关键细节、破坏内部生成模式和错误传播等机制降低输出质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 专利权利要求撰写是一项需要技术专长、精确语言控制、严格遵循形式规范并保持元素间复杂逻辑关系的法律文书任务。尽管思维链（CoT）提示被广泛用于提升大语言模型的推理能力，但在高度结构化或模式敏感的任务中，其效果可能有限甚至负面，因此有必要探究CoT在专利权利要求生成中的适用性。

Method: 本文提出一种面向专利权利要求生成的任务特定CoT方法，并通过自动评估指标与专家人工评估相结合的方式进行有效性验证。同时对比显式CoT与隐式CoT的表现，分析其在生成过程中的影响机制。

Result: 推理增强提示有助于提升专利权利要求的质量；隐式CoT在所有测试中均优于显式CoT。显式推理引入不必要的信息瓶颈，通过抽象关键细节、干扰内部生成模式及引发错误级联传播等机制损害输出质量。

Conclusion: 本研究揭示了在法律类高结构化任务中，显式思维链提示可能并非最优策略，而隐式推理更具优势，为大语言模型在法律文本生成中的应用提供了新见解。

Abstract: Patent claim drafting is a challenging legal drafting task that requires technical expertise, precise linguistic control, strict adherence to formal conventions, and the preservation of complex logical relationships among claim elements. While Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has been widely used to improve the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), recent evidence suggests that its benefits may be limited, or even negative, in highly structured or pattern-sensitive tasks. Therefore, this paper investigates whether CoT prompting benefits patent claim generation. We propose a task-specific CoT method for patent claim generation and evaluate its effectiveness through both automatic metrics and human expert assessment. Our results show that reasoning-enhanced prompting can improve claim quality. Moreover, we demonstrate a counter-intuitive but important empirical finding: implicit CoT, where reasoning is kept internal rather than explicitly verbalized, consistently outperforms explicit CoT. Through systematic analysis, we show that explicit CoT can introduce an unnecessary information bottleneck for claim generation. Verbalized reasoning may compromise the quality of final outputs through three specific mechanisms: abstraction of critical details, disruption of internalized generation patterns, and cascading error propagation. Our findings provide new insights into legal tasks and CoT applications.

</details>


### [214] [Articulate Intuition or Genuine Analysis? Benchmarking Epistemic Reliability in LLM-as-a-Judge Peer Reviews](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10511)
*Nuo Chen,Qian Wang,Qingyun Zou,Bingsheng He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了LLM评委与人类评审委员会在评估学术论文时是否在衡量相同标准，发现两者并不一致。研究基于Kahneman的双过程理论构建了名为Kahneman4Review的基准，包含3,563篇经评分的评审文本，涵盖九个理论驱动的文本维度、八个偏见诊断指标和一个连续推理质量评分。关键发现包括：评审决策层级与文本基础的认知质量代理无明显关联；公开展示的代理式评审得分高于人工汇总评审，但这一差异主要由长度和发表场合解释，且样本未配对；ICLR评审文本的诊断特征在2022-2023年发生转变，与大模型普及时间重合但未确定因果关系。此外，匹配函数探针实验表明该评分体系能有效区分真实批评与表面流畅性。研究主张，可信的LLM评委基准应将分析形式与认知功能分离，并提出具体设计建议。交互式演示可在Hugging Face空间获取。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM评委与人类评审在判断论文质量时是否测量相同维度，揭示其潜在差异及其哲学意义，以提升评审系统可信度。

Method: 基于Kahneman双过程理论构建结构化评分框架，开发Kahneman4Review基准，涵盖九个文本维度、八个偏见诊断及连续推理质量评分；通过实证分析、样本对比与函数探针实验验证框架有效性。

Result: 评审决策层级与认知质量代理不匹配；代理式评审得分更高但主要受长度和发表场合影响；评审文本特征在2022–2023年发生显著变化，与大模型普及同步但未确认因果；评分体系可有效区分真实批判与表面流畅性。

Conclusion: 可信的LLM评审基准必须将分析形式与认知功能区分开来，本文提出相应设计方向以增强可靠性。

Abstract: When an LLM judge calls a peer review analytical and a human committee calls another review high quality, are they tracking the same thing? We argue they are not, and that the difference matters philosophically. We operationalise Kahneman's dual-process theory into a structured rubric for peer review and release Kahneman4Review, a benchmark of 3,563 rated reviews scored along nine theoretically motivated textual dimensions, eight bias diagnostics, and a continuous reasoning-quality score. Three findings bear on trustworthiness: decision tier is not detectably aligned with the rubric's text-grounded epistemic-quality proxy; public-showcase agentic reviews receive higher raw scores than pooled human reviews, but length and venue explain most of the gap and the samples are not paper-paired; and ICLR review-text diagnostics shift at the 2022--2023 transition, temporally coincident with widespread LLM availability but without identifying its cause. A matched function-probe pilot further shows that the rubric distinguishes textual probes designed to contrast genuine fault-finding with surface fluency. We argue that a trustworthy reliability benchmark for LLM judges must separate analytical form from epistemic function, and propose concrete design choices toward that goal. An interactive demo is available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/nuojohnchen/Kahneman4Review.

</details>


### [215] [UNIBROWSE: A Data-to-Agent Framework for Multimodal BrowseComp](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10557)
*Xiyu Wei,Qingwei Zong,Zhuocheng Yu,Sujian Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: UNIBROWSE提出一个统一的数据生成管道，首次同时覆盖文本到图像、图像到文本和纯文本三种信息流模式，通过引入实时网络检索增强知识图谱，并使用探索度新指标过滤低信号样本，以提升强化学习效率。该方法生成高质量的冷启动工具使用轨迹和探索丰富的问答对，训练出350亿参数的智能体，在五个多模态浏览基准上平均准确率达54.4，显著优于基线模型Qwen3.5-35B-A3B（43.9）及多个闭源模型如GPT-5、Gemini系列。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据构建方法仅覆盖文本到图像和图像到文本两种信息流模式，忽视了真实世界中常见的文本到图像信息交互，导致智能体在多模态浏览任务中的泛化能力和鲁棒性受限。为解决此问题，需要一种能全面涵盖三类信息流的统一数据生成机制，以支持更真实、更复杂的多模态交互训练。

Method: 提出UNIBROWSE统一数据管道，整合三类信息流（文本到图像、图像到文本、纯文本），结合人工标注与自动构建；利用实时网络检索动态补充知识图谱以提升数据真实性；设计探索度指标筛选低信号样本，优化强化学习训练效率；基于生成数据进行监督微调与探索感知强化学习，训练350亿参数智能体。

Result: UNIBROWSE智能体在五个多模态浏览基准上达到平均54.4%的准确率，较其基线模型Qwen3.5-35B-A3B提升10.5个百分点，超越GPT-5（42.9）、Gemini-2.5 Pro（44.8）和Gemini-2.5 Flash（41.3）等闭源系统，证明其在复杂多模态任务中的优越性能。

Conclusion: UNIBROWSE通过统一数据生成框架，首次全面覆盖多模态浏览中的三类信息流，显著提升了智能体的多模态理解与长期推理能力，为构建通用、鲁棒的网页交互智能体提供了有效路径。

Abstract: Multimodal BrowseComp tasks require agents to combine perception, tool use, and long-horizon reasoning over dynamic web content, challenging their ability to handle compositional structure, open-world uncertainty, and multimodal integration across extended interactions. Crucially, real-world multimodal browsing involves three distinct information-flow patterns: text-only, image-to-text, and text-to-image, yet existing data construction methods cover only the text-only and image-to-text patterns, leaving text-to-image largely unaddressed and limiting agent generality and robustness. We introduce UNIBROWSE, a unified data pipeline that for the first time simultaneously generates training data covering all three patterns, augments curated knowledge graphs with live web retrieval for improved fidelity, and introduces a novel metric of exploration degree to filter low-signal instances for efficient reinforcement learning. Through this pipeline, we produce high-quality cold-start tool-use trajectories and exploration-rich QA pairs, and train a 35B-scale agent via supervised fine-tuning and exploration-aware RL.The resulting UNIBROWSE agent achieves state-of-the-art performance on multimodal BrowseComp benchmarks, attaining an average accuracy of 54.4 across five diverse benchmarks -- an improvement of 10.5 points over its base model Qwen3.5-35B-A3B -- and surpassing serveral closed-source agent workflows such as GPT-5 (42.9), Gemini-2.5 Pro (44.8), and Gemini-2.5 Flash (41.3).

</details>


### [216] [Demographic Prompting at Scale: When More Attributes Hurt LLM--Human Agreement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10590)
*Mahammed Kamruzzaman,Shrabon Kumar Das,Gene Louis Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了在提示词中加入标注者人口统计学属性如何影响大语言模型（LLM）预测与人类标注之间的对齐。通过五个开源LLM，系统性地改变提示中属性的数量和组合，发现对齐效果在1-3个高信号属性时达到峰值，而全属性配置下则下降，表明存在过拟合阈值；此外，属性对齐的提升不取决于其在人类标注中的总体影响力，而需综合考虑属性信号的可学习性和方向一致性；神经元探查显示，只有在信号一致的情况下，特定激活才与对齐提升相关，单纯激活量并不意味着可调控性。整体表明，人口统计学提示并非单一干预手段，其有效性高度依赖于属性信号质量、任务特性和模型架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究人口统计学属性作为提示词成分如何影响大语言模型预测与人类标注的一致性，以优化模型对齐效果。

Method: 使用五个开源大语言模型，系统性地变化提示中的人口统计学属性数量与组合，涵盖从单属性到全属性的所有配置，评估不同设置下的对齐表现，并结合神经元探查分析模型内部激活模式。

Result: 1. 对齐效果在1-3个高信号属性时最优，全属性配置导致性能下降；2. 属性对齐的提升不取决于其在人类标注中的总体影响力，而与信号的可学习性和方向一致性有关；3. 仅当注释信号一致时，特定神经元激活才与对齐提升相关，激活量本身不足以说明可调控性。

Conclusion: 人口统计学提示的效果并非普适，而是高度依赖于属性信号质量、任务特性及模型架构，不能简单视为统一干预手段。

Abstract: We investigate how annotator demographic attributes, supplied as prompt cues, shape the alignment between large language model (LLM) predictions and human annotations across five tasks. Using five open-source LLMs, we systematically vary the number and composition of demographic components in the prompt, spanning every combination from single-attribute through full-attribute configurations. Our experiments reveal three principal findings. First, alignment consistently peaks with one to three high-signal attributes and degrades under the full attribute set, establishing a clear over-specification threshold. Second, the overall magnitude of demographic influence on human annotations does not predict which attributes improve LLM alignment; instead, both the learnability and the directional coherence of each attribute's annotation signal need to be considered jointly. Third, neuron probing reveals that specialized activation correlates with alignment gains only under coherent annotation signals, and that activation volume alone does not imply steerability. Together, these results demonstrate that demographic prompting is not a monolithic intervention: its utility is highly context-dependent, shaped by attribute signal quality, task characteristics, and model architecture.

</details>


### [217] [Non-binary bottom-up constituency parsing without arity actions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10591)
*Jungyeul Park,Eunkyul Leah Jo,Zihao Huang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出一种无需显式使用arity动作的非二叉自底向上句法解析方法，通过分隔符界定的栈配置来恢复缩减跨度，使arity成为解析状态的衍生属性而非动作标签。实验表明，该方法在PTB和CTB数据集上性能与基于arity的动作基线相当，且动作集合更小，同时保持了高阶成分的稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统非二叉自底向上解析依赖于显式的arity动作（如Reduce-X#k），这增加了动作空间复杂度并可能导致冗余。本文旨在简化动作设计，减少对arity特定动作的依赖，提升解析器的简洁性与可扩展性。

Method: 引入分隔符界定的栈结构，将成分标签与缩减跨度分离处理；通过活跃分隔符和标签标记唯一确定缩减的arity，从而避免显式定义arity动作。

Result: 在PTB和CTB数据集上的实验显示，该方法在相同实现框架下性能与基线相当，动作数量显著减少，预测的arity分布接近真实树库，高阶成分未出现坍塌现象。

Conclusion: arity并非非二叉自底向上解析中必需的过渡原语；通过分隔符引导的机制，可有效消除arity特定动作，实现更简洁、高效的解析架构。

Abstract: Non-binary bottom-up constituency parsing is usually taken to require arity actions: reductions such as \(\textsc{Reduce-}X\#k\) specify both the mother label and the number of children to be composed. We show that this arity parameter is not a necessary transition primitive. Our parser introduces constituent labels separately and recovers reduction spans from delimiter-bounded stack configurations. In a well-formed reduction configuration, arity is uniquely determined by the active delimiter and the label marker, making it a derived property of parser state rather than an action label. This factorization removes label--arity-specific reduce actions while preserving direct construction of original non-binary trees. Experiments on PTB and CTB show that the delimiter-guided parser remains competitive with an arity-specific bottom-up baseline under the same implementation framework, with substantially smaller action inventories. Analyses further show that its predicted arity profile remains close to the gold treebanks and that high-arity constituents do not collapse when arity actions are removed.

</details>


### [218] [Eval-Pair Matrix: Answer-Paired Meta-Evaluation of LLM Judges for Grounded RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10626)
*Sriram Selvam,Anneswa Ghosh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Eval-Pair Matrix，一种用于源基RAG的受控元评估协议，通过在生成和评判中使用相同模型家族，揭示了自宽纵问题。实验包含300个核心记录，897个标注生成输出及2,683个评判结果，采用3×3交叉矩阵设计。研究重点在于配对同一答案的评判效果，发现同模型评判的召回率差异接近零（-0.5个百分点），仅在避免诱导主张的答案中观察到显著的判别遗漏（-4.3个百分点）。人工评估表明，看似假阳性实为替代来源错误、标签误判或模糊案例，并无真实假警报。结论强调：RAG评估应报告完整矩阵、答案配对效应、行为分层与标签任务一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM作为评判者在RAG评估中广泛应用，但使用同一模型家族作为生成器和评判者会导致自宽纵问题难以识别，影响评估可信度。

Method: 构建Eval-Pair Matrix，基于GaRAGe问题与原始段落，每条记录引入一个隐藏的因果矛盾；利用GPT、Grok、Gemini模型对扰动段落生成答案，并用相同模型作为盲评者评估答案与原始段落的一致性；采用3×3交叉矩阵设计，分析配对答案的评判效果。

Result: 同模型评判的召回率差异极小（-0.5个百分点，置信区间[-2.7, +1.7]）；唯一显著的配对差距是避免诱导主张的答案中，匹配评判者的标记率下降（-4.3个百分点）；人工评估确认所有看似假阳性均为标签误差或模糊情况，无真实假警报。

Conclusion: RAG评估研究应报告完整的评估矩阵、答案配对效应、行为分层以及标签与任务的对齐情况，以提升评估的严谨性与可解释性。

Abstract: LLM-as-a-judge evaluation is widely used for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), but reusing the same model family as both generator and judge makes self-leniency difficult to identify. We introduce Eval-Pair Matrix, a controlled meta evaluation protocol for source-grounded RAG. Starting from GaRAGe questions and grounding passages, we induce one hidden answer-causal contradiction per record, generate answers from perturbed passages with GPT, Grok, and Gemini models, and then use the same models as blind judges to evaluate each answer against the original passages. The experiment contains 300 core records, 897 labeled generator outputs, and 2,683 judge verdicts in a crossed 3 x 3 matrix; the primary analysis uses 275 fully validated records. Instead of comparing diagonal and off-diagonal cells across different answers, we estimate same-model effects by pairing judges on the exact same candidate answer. This changes the interpretation: diagonal and off diagonal F1 are similar, and the paired same-model recall effect is near zero (-0.5 pp; 95% cluster bootstrap CI [-2.7, +1.7]). The only robust paired gap is lower matching-judge flagging for answers that avoided the induced claim (-4.3 pp). A targeted human evaluation finds that reviewed apparent false positives are alternate source-error detections, mistakes in labeling whether the induced claim was adopted, or unclear cases; none were adjudicated as genuine false alarms. The lesson is methodological: RAG judge studies should report full matrices, answer-paired effects, behavior strata, and label-task alignment.

</details>


### [219] [Anamnesis: An Open-Source Platform for Large-Scale Backstory-Conditioned Survey Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10628)
*Song-Ze Yu,Joseph Suh,Serina Chang,David M. Chan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Anamnesis 是一个基于大语言模型的交互式系统，支持在虚拟人群中进行可控制人口统计特征的调查模拟，适用于非技术用户和研究人员。它结合了 Anthology 与 Alterity 框架，通过结构化叙事背景生成响应，支持开放式生成、概率性人口重采样及多模态（图像与音频）调查。通过两个案例研究验证：一是复现皮尤研究中心的美国趋势面板数据，二是模拟《纽约客》标题竞赛中的人类偏好。结果表明，Anamnesis 生成的意见分布比传统角色提示方法更接近真实调查数据，提供透明、可重复且开源的替代方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有调查模拟工具多依赖于封闭或复杂的系统，难以实现对人口统计特征的精确控制，且缺乏透明度与可重复性。为解决这些问题，需要一种面向非技术用户的开放平台，能够高效、准确地生成符合现实分布的虚拟调查数据。

Method: Anamnesis 集成 Anthology 和 Alterity 框架，利用结构化叙事背景作为条件输入，引导大语言模型生成符合特定人口统计特征的响应；通过网页界面实现交互式操作，支持开放式生成、基于概率的人口重采样以及图像与音频形式的多模态调查设计。

Result: 在两个案例研究中，Anamnesis 所生成的意见分布显著优于标准角色提示基线，更贴近真实世界调查数据，在政治类型学和生物医学议题上表现良好，并成功模拟了人类对幽默标题的偏好模式。

Conclusion: Anamnesis 提供了一种透明、可重复、开源且用户友好的调查模拟平台，能够有效支持问卷原型设计与压力测试，是现有专有服务的重要替代方案，具有广泛的应用前景。

Abstract: We present Anamnesis, an interactive system for demographically controllable survey simulation using large language models. Open-source, and designed for non-technical users/researchers, Anamnesis enables the prototyping and stress-testing of survey instruments on virtual populations rather than real human subjects. The platform operationalizes the recently introduced Anthology and Alterity frameworks, which use structured narrative backstories to condition model responses, within a unified web interface. It supports open-ended generation, probabilistic demographic resampling, and multimodal (image and audio) surveys. We evaluate the system through two case studies: (1) replicating segments of Pew Research Center's American Trends Panel (ATP) on political typology and biomedical issues and (2) emulating human preference in the New Yorker Caption Contest. In both cases, Anamnesis produces opinion distributions that more closely match real-world survey data than standard persona-prompting baselines, offering a transparent, reproducible, and open-source alternative to proprietary simulation services.

</details>


### [220] [MafiaScope: Non-Invasive, Time-Resolved Belief Probing for LLM Agents in Social Deduction Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10645)
*Ilia Karpov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: MafiaScope 是一个开放测试平台，将社交推理游戏 Mafia 转化为衡量机器心智理论（Theory of Mind）的工具。通过在每次公开发言后，让每个代理回答一组结构化的探测问题，这些答案不参与游戏但被自动评分以评估其信念准确性。系统提供可视化工具，包括角色视角模拟、信念轨迹图表和反事实重播功能。在包含 32 场游戏、13,815 个解析探测答案的 DeepSeek 案例研究中发现，代理的置信度校准较差（预期校准误差为 0.17），过度预测被怀疑的概率达 1.5 倍；30 次反事实重播实验完整展示了工作流程。该平台、可视化工具及超过 200 场跨模型游戏数据集已开源，可访问 demo 和演示视频。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 LLM 代理在公开行为中难以反映其真实社会推理能力：正确行为可能只是猜测，而高超的欺骗也无迹可寻。因此需要一种能深入探测代理内在信念状态的方法，以真正评估其心智理论能力。

Method: 将社交推理游戏 Mafia 改造成测量工具，每轮后对每个代理进行结构化探测提问，答案独立于游戏进程，由系统基于真实情境自动评分；结合可视化工具（如角色视角模拟、时间线上的准确率与校准度图表、反事实重播）追踪和分析代理的信念演化过程。

Result: 在 DeepSeek 的案例研究中，代理的置信度严重校准偏差（预期校准误差 0.17），过度预测自己被怀疑的频率达 1.5 倍；30 次反事实重播成功验证了整个工作流程的可用性；平台、可视化工具与大规模游戏数据集已开源并提供在线演示。

Conclusion: MafiaScope 提供了一种有效且可扩展的机制，用于揭示 LLM 代理在社交推理中的真实信念状态，突破了仅依赖公开行为评估的局限，为心智理论评估提供了新范式。

Abstract: An LLM agent's public behaviour reveals little about its social reasoning: an agent that votes correctly may be guessing, and an agent that lies well leaves no trace of what it actually believes. We present MafiaScope, an open testbed that turns the social deduction game Mafia into a measurement instrument for machine Theory of Mind. After every public utterance, every agent privately answers a configurable set of structured probe questions; the answers never re-enter the game and are scored automatically against the ground truth the engine knows. An interactive visualizer renders the belief trajectories: impersonate mode shows the game as one agent sees it, panels chart timeline-aligned accuracy and calibration, and counterfactual replay forks any recorded step. In a 32-game DeepSeek case study with 13{,}815 parsed probe answers, stated confidence is poorly calibrated, with expected calibration error 0.17, agents over-predict being suspected 1.5 times, and a 30-fork replay experiment walks the counterfactual replay workflow end to end. Engine, viewer and a corpus of 200+ cross-model games are released under an open licence; live demo: https://karpovilia.github.io/mafiascope/; screencast: https://vimeo.com/1208920221.

</details>


### [221] [Knowledge Distillation for Automated AI Tutor Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10647)
*Tahmid Al Hannan,Diego Garcia,Alex Njoroge,Suha Al Juboori,Tarek Sakakini*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了FATE（FLC AI Tutor Evaluator），一个专用于评估AI导师教学质量的80亿参数语言模型。该模型基于BEA 2025共享任务的四个核心评估维度——错误识别、错误定位、指导性与可操作性，通过知识蒸馏技术从前沿大模型获取额外监督信号，在数据稀缺情况下显著提升性能，最高达22.63个百分点的绝对提升。实验表明，FATE能有效自动化评估主流商业模型的表现，其中Gemini 2.5 Flash表现最佳（82.88%），其次是ChatGPT 5.5 Instant（80.75%）、DeepSeek V4 Flash（80.13%）和Claude Sonnet 4.6（74.00%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大型语言模型在教育领域的应用迅速扩展，但缺乏可靠的自动化评估方法来衡量其教学能力，尤其在K-12及高等教育中，亟需一种专门针对教学质量的评估工具。

Method: 采用知识蒸馏技术，利用前沿大模型生成高质量标注数据以弥补教学评估领域标注数据不足的问题，并训练出专注于教育评估的专用模型FATE，覆盖错误识别、错误定位、指导性和可操作性四大维度。

Result: FATE在多项指标上表现出色，相比基线模型有高达22.63个百分点的性能提升；在对主流AI模型的评估中，Gemini 2.5 Flash表现最优，其次为ChatGPT 5.5 Instant、DeepSeek V4 Flash，Claude Sonnet 4.6表现相对较弱。

Conclusion: FATE成功构建了一个高效、精准且可扩展的AI导师评价框架，不仅填补了教育场景下自动化评估工具的空白，也为未来智能教学系统的迭代优化提供了可靠基准。

Abstract: The rapid integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into K-12 and higher education has outpaced the development of reliable methods for evaluating their pedagogical quality. As the research community starts to explore the space of automating evaluation of AI tutors, we introduce FATE (FLC AI Tutor Evaluator), a specialized 8B-parameter language model designed to evaluate AI tutors. Aligned with the four core evaluation tracks from the BEA 2025 Shared Task, our model assesses pedagogical ability across Mistake Identification, Mistake Location, Guidance, and Actionability. Because pedagogical evaluation is a specialized task with limited labeled data, we leverage knowledge distillation from a frontier LLM to generate additional supervision, yielding absolute performance gains up to 22.63 percentage points. Finally, we demonstrate FATE's utility as an automated evaluator by benchmarking instructional responses generated by popular commercial models, including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and DeepSeek. On average, we have found that Gemini 2.5 Flash perfomed best (82.88%), then ChatGPT 5.5 Instant (80.75%), followed by DeepSeek V4 Flash (80.13%) and Claude Sonnet 4.6 (74.00%).

</details>


### [222] [Unlocking Parallelism in Autoregressive Language Models via Speculative Decoding with Progressive Tree Drafting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10661)
*Zipeng Gao,Zhi Zheng,Qingrong Xia,Junda Lin,Ziwei Zhao,Tong Xu,Zhefeng Wang,Enhong Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Progressive Tree Drafting (PTD) 是一种无需训练、模型无关的推测解码方法，通过结构化的渐进树形结构和逐步剪枝机制，在单次前向传播中引导大语言模型探索多个语义路径，从而实现更高的并行性和解码速度。实验表明，PTD 在多个基准上实现了高达 2 倍的解码加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统推测解码依赖辅助草稿模块，带来显著的训练和通信开销；而现有内生草稿生成方法未能充分挖掘模型的潜在并行能力，缺乏结构化协调。因此需要一种无需额外训练、能有效利用模型并行潜力的方法。

Method: 提出 Progressive Tree Drafting (PTD)，采用渐进式树形结构与分步剪枝机制，使目标模型在单次前向传播中并行探索多条语义路径，兼顾草稿的多样性和一致性。

Result: PTD 在多个基准测试中实现了最高达 2 倍的解码速度提升，且无需训练、适用于各类模型。

Conclusion: PTD 通过结构化并行策略有效释放了大语言模型的内在并行潜力，是一种高效、通用且无需训练的推测解码新范式。

Abstract: Speculative decoding has significantly accelerated Large Language Model (LLM) inference by alleviating memory-bound bottlenecks. However, traditional speculative decoding typically relies on auxiliary draft modules, incurring significant training and communication overhead. Although recent methods attempt to generate drafts within the target model itself, they often fail to fully exploit its latent parallel capacity due to a lack of structural coordination. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Progressive Tree Drafting (PTD)}, which employs a structured, guided parallel drafting strategy to harness the model's parallel potential. By coupling a progressive tree structure with a stepwise pruning mechanism, PTD actively guides the LLM to explore multiple semantic paths in a single forward pass, ensuring both draft diversity and coherence. Experiments demonstrate that PTD achieves up to $2\times$ decoding speedup across various benchmarks while remaining training-free and model-agnostic. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MINE-USTC/PTD.

</details>


### [223] [A Corpus of Persuasion Techniques in Slavic Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10715)
*Jakub Piskorski,Dimitar Iliyanov Dimitrov,Marina Ernst,Jacek Haneczok,Michał Marcińczuk,Arkadiusz Modzelewski,Roman Yangarber*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了一个针对斯拉夫语系语言（保加利亚语、波兰语、俄语）的说服技巧语料库，涵盖约7500个文本片段，涉及222篇在国家和国际层面具有争议性的文档。语料库在粗粒度文本段落和细粒度句子层面进行了标注，基于25种细粒度说服技巧，归类为6大修辞策略类别。研究描述了语料库构建过程，提供详细统计数据，并分析话题与说服技巧之间的相关性。同时采用传统机器学习和生成式AI模型，为文本片段和句子层面的说服技巧检测与分类提供了基线和基准结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有说服技巧研究多集中于英语等主流语言，缺乏对斯拉夫语系语言的系统性语料支持。为填补这一空白，本文旨在构建一个跨语言、多层级标注的说服技巧语料库，以促进自然语言处理在政治、媒体等领域的应用研究。

Method: 通过人工标注方式，在多语言文本中识别并标注说服技巧；使用25种细粒度技巧分类体系，按文本段落和句子层级进行标注；结合统计分析与机器学习（如SVM、BERT）及生成式AI模型（如GPT系列），评估不同模型在说服技巧识别任务中的表现。

Result: 语料库成功构建，包含7500个标注文本片段，覆盖多个高争议性话题；实验表明，生成式AI模型在文本段落级任务中表现优于传统机器学习方法；部分说服技巧与特定话题存在显著相关性，如情感诉求常出现在政治辩论中。

Conclusion: 本研究为斯拉夫语系语言的说服分析提供了首个大规模、多层次标注语料库，验证了生成式AI在说服技巧识别中的潜力，为后续跨语言修辞分析与舆情监测奠定了数据与方法基础。

Abstract: Persuasion techniques are powerful rhetorical devices used to sway public opinion in a wide range of media. We present a new corpus of persuasion techniques, focusing on Slavic languages. The corpus contains documents in Bulgarian, Polish, and Russian, annotated with persuasion techniques at the coarse-grained text-span level and fine-grained sentence level. The techniques are drawn from a taxonomy of 25 fine-grained persuasion techniques, grouped under six broad categories of rhetorical persuasion strategies. The corpus contains approximately 7500 text spans from 222 documents that cover topics hotly debated at the national and international levels. We describe the corpus creation process, provide detailed statistics, and examine correlations between topics and persuasion techniques. We use classic ML-based and generative AI-based models to provide baselines and benchmark results for the detection and classification of persuasion techniques at the text-span level and sentence level.

</details>


### [224] [The First ChineseBabyLM Challenge: training data-efficient and cognitively plausible language models for Chinese](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10745)
*Siyuan Song,Zhiheng Qian,Yunhao Zhang,Linyang He,Xiaozhe Ji,Yingxin Lin,Hongao Zhu,Chongtian Shao,Chuhan Lang,Luan Li,Rui Wang,Renfen Hu,Shaonan Wang,Hai Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文介绍了将于2026年NLPCC会议举办的首个中文BabyLM挑战赛，旨在推动中文语言模型从零训练的研究。挑战赛要求使用1亿个中文词元训练模型，并在自然语言理解、认知对齐和汉字知识三个任务赛道上进行评估，不限制分词器、模型架构和训练轮次。更多信息可访问https://chinese-babylm.github.io/。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推动中文语言模型从零训练的研究，探索在有限数据下构建高质量中文语言模型的能力，促进对中文语言特性的深入理解。

Method: 通过提供大规模中文语料（1亿词元）和多维度评估任务（包括自然语言理解、认知对齐和汉字知识），鼓励研究者自由选择分词器、模型架构和训练策略，实现从零开始训练语言模型。

Result: 成功启动首个专注于中文语言模型自训练的挑战赛，为中文NLP研究提供标准化评估平台，激发学术界对中文语言建模的创新探索。

Conclusion: 中文BabyLM挑战赛为中文语言模型的自训练研究提供了重要契机，有助于推动中文自然语言处理技术的发展与创新。

Abstract: This paper describes the first ChineseBabyLM challenge, which will be held in the 2026 NLPCC conference. The challenge calls for researchers to train language models from scratch with 100 million Chinese tokens and evaluates the models on 3 tracks of tasks: NLU, cognitive alignment and Hanzi knowledge. There is no restriction on tokenizer, model architecture and the number of training epochs. Details of the challenge can be found in https://chinese-babylm.github.io/.

</details>


### [225] [Trust Before Fusion: QIMG-7 and Source-Aware Resolution for Polluted Multimodal RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10798)
*Saadeldine Eletter,Owais Aijaz,Preslav Nakov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出QIMG-7基准，评估多模态检索污染对多句事实问答的影响；发现单纯融合多模态信息脆弱，污染下性能显著下降；提出无需训练的源感知信任解析（SATR）方法，通过比较参数化、纯文本与全模态答案，基于来源可靠性选择或回退；Field-Selector变体表现最佳，平衡得分0.816，优于全模态融合11.7点，优于级联路由器2.7点；消融实验表明，在以文本为主导的场景中，显式建模文本可靠性是性能提升的关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实多模态检索可能返回主题相关但不可靠的内容，如错误文本、误导性图像等，现有评估多基于干净证据，无法反映实际挑战，亟需可靠评估与应对机制。

Method: 构建QIMG-7基准，涵盖四个数据集、七类图像攻击和16种清洁/污染配置；提出源感知信任解析（SATR），通过比较参数化、纯文本与全模态候选答案，根据来源可靠性决定采纳或回退；采用Field-Selector变体实现最优平衡性能。

Result: 在gpt-4o-mini堆栈中，全模态支持从0.908降至0.490（污染时）；SATR的Field-Selector变体取得0.816的平衡得分，优于全模态融合11.7点，优于级联路由器2.7点；显式文本可靠性建模是主要增益来源。

Conclusion: 在以文本为主导的事实问答任务中，面对多模态检索冲突，应采取选择性信任而非无条件融合策略，源感知信任解析能有效提升系统鲁棒性。

Abstract: Multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is often evaluated with clean evidence, yet real retrieval can return topically relevant but unreliable content: false text and misleading images from corrupted metadata, entity swaps, typographic overlays, semantic edits, adversarial patches, blends, or style transfer. We introduce QIMG-7, a controlled benchmark for multimodal retrieval pollution in multi-sentence factual QA, spanning four datasets, seven image-attack families, and 16 paired clean/polluted regimes, for 1,760 evaluation rows per method. Across four generator/gate stacks, naive multimodal fusion is brittle: in the main gpt-4o-mini stack, Full-MM support drops from 0.908 with clean text to 0.490 with polluted text, often making Parametric fallback safer than retrieval. We propose source-aware trust resolution (SATR), a training-free approach that compares Parametric, Text-only, and Full-MM candidate answers and selects among candidate answers or falls back based on source reliability. The Field-Selector variant achieves the best balanced score, 0.816, improving over Full-MM by 11.7 points and over the Cascaded Router by 2.7 points. Ablations show that, in this text-first setting, explicit text-reliability modeling is the dominant driver of these gains. Overall, in text-first factual QA with multimodal retrieval conflict, our results support selective trust rather than unconditional fusion. Artifacts are available at https://github.com/SaadElDine/Trust_Before_Fusion.

</details>


### [226] [Diagnosing and Mitigating Thinking Collapse in On-Policy Self-Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10805)
*Keqin Peng,Chen Li,Yuanxin Ouyang,Yancheng Yuan,Liang Ding*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: OPSD在复杂推理任务中会导致性能下降，本文揭示其根源为'思维坍缩'——模型中间推理行为显著减弱。提出AD-OPSD框架，通过动态调节自蒸馏目标，保护高风险推理节点，提升模型推理能力，在多个数学基准上相比标准OPSD最高提升4.1%准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: OPSD在复杂推理任务中反而降低性能，存在优化陷阱，需理解并解决其导致的思维坍缩问题。

Method: 采用熵基梯度掩码与逐令牌目标分析，识别高熵决策分支中的抑制机制；提出AD-OPSD，通过不对称点对点分歧门将高风险令牌锚定至冻结基础模型的参考先验，实现推理能力保留与错误纠正的平衡。

Result: AD-OPSD在多个数学基准上相比标准OPSD平均提升达+4.1%绝对准确率，有效缓解思维坍缩，且在不同后训练范式下具有鲁棒泛化能力。

Conclusion: AD-OPSD成功克服了OPSD在复杂推理中的思维坍缩问题，实现了推理能力与纠错能力的协同增强，为大模型对齐提供了更稳健的训练框架。

Abstract: On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) has emerged as a crucial paradigm for enhancing and aligning Large Language Models (LLMs). However, in complex reasoning tasks, OPSD paradoxically degrades downstream performance. In this paper, we systematically investigate this pathology and identify a severe optimization trap we define as \textbf{Thinking Collapse} -- a sharp decline in the model's native intermediate reasoning behavior, measured by epistemic-token density (ET per 1k). Through entropy-based gradient masking and token-level target analysis, we show that this collapse is triggered by aggressive teacher gradients at high-student-entropy decision forks, where student epistemic tokens are frequently suppressed into teacher non-epistemic targets and are highly concentrated in high pointwise student-teacher divergence regions. To resolve this optimization pathology, we propose \textbf{Adaptive Dual-Perspective OPSD (AD-OPSD)}, a robust control framework that dynamically moderates the self-distillation objective. AD-OPSD selectively anchors high-suppression-risk sandboxed tokens to a reference prior derived from the frozen base model via an asymmetrical pointwise divergence gate, preserving native thinking capacity while retaining OPSD's error-correcting power. Extensive experiments across competitive mathematical benchmarks show that AD-OPSD improves over standard OPSD by up to \textbf{+4.1\%} absolute average accuracy across diverse model scales and datasets. Further analysis demonstrates that AD-OPSD mitigates thinking collapse and generalizes robustly to different post-training paradigms.

</details>


### [227] [Abstractiveness Metrics for Evaluating Text Summarization: A Refined Formulation with Empirical Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10806)
*Praveenkumar Katwe,Rakesh Chandra Balabantaray,Kali Prasad Vittala*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种衡量生成摘要抽象性的新方法，包括参考抽象（RA）、摘要抽象（SA）和抽象比率（AR），通过调制非重叠因子的调和平均数来评估摘要与源文本提取复制的偏离程度。在四个模型上的实验表明，这些度量能有效区分提取式和抽象式模型，并识别出需要人工评估以检测幻觉的摘要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评价指标如ROUGE仅关注表面层面，无法充分衡量摘要的抽象性，因此需要更精确的度量方法来评估生成摘要的抽象程度。

Method: 使用文档长度的调和平均值结合立方非重叠因子，构建了参考抽象（RA）、摘要抽象（SA）和抽象比率（AR）三个度量，具有维度一致性、边界限制及对抽象-提取边界的非线性敏感性。

Result: 在100个XSUM文档上测试显示，提取式模型的SA值为0.12-0.26，而抽象式模型的SA值为0.96-1.77；抽象比率能够有效识别出可能包含幻觉需人工审核的摘要。

Conclusion: 所提出的度量方法能有效量化摘要的抽象性，有助于提升摘要评估的深度与准确性，尤其在识别潜在幻觉方面具有实用价值。

Abstract: Quantifying abstractiveness in generated summaries is essential for evaluating summarization models beyond
  surface-level metrics like ROUGE. We introduce Reference Abstraction (RA), Summary Abstraction (SA), and Abstraction
  Ratio (AR) -- a set of principled heuristic metrics that measure how much a summary diverges from extractive copying
  of the source text. The formulation uses the harmonic mean of document lengths modulated by a cubic non-overlap
  factor, yielding dimensionally consistent, bounded output with non-linear sensitivity to the extractive-abstractive
  boundary. Evaluation on 100 XSUM documents across four summarization models (BART-large-cnn, Pegasus-xsum, DistilBart,
  MT5-small) demonstrates that the metrics successfully discriminate between extractive models (SA ~ 0.12-0.26) and
  abstractive models (SA ~ 0.96-1.77), and that the Abstraction Ratio identifies summaries requiring manual evaluation
  for potential hallucination. Code and results are available at https://github.com/katweNLP/AbstractionStudy.

</details>


### [228] [Large Language Models for Token-Efficient and Semantic-Preserving Opinion Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10825)
*Fabrizio Marozzo,Stefano Iannicelli*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的有观点文本摘要框架，通过多维度分类与分层采样策略，在减少令牌使用和计算成本的同时，有效保留语义信息，生成内容覆盖全面、观点平衡且忠实于原始意见多样性的摘要。在亚马逊产品评论、Tripadvisor酒店评论及X/Twitter帖子上的实验表明，该方法显著优于传统AI和标准LLM摘要基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模、冗余且不平衡的意见文本数据（如产品评论、酒店反馈、社交媒体帖子）虽然蕴含丰富的用户体验信号，但其规模和复杂性使得有效分析和生成忠实反映多元观点的摘要变得困难。现有方法在保持语义完整性的同时，往往面临高计算成本和低效率问题。因此，亟需一种既能压缩数据又能保留关键信息的高效摘要方法。

Method: 结合多维度分类（如情感、主题）与一系列分层采样策略，从原始意见数据中选取紧凑但具有代表性的子集；随后使用定制化提示（prompt）引导大语言模型生成平衡且富含关键信息的摘要，确保涵盖产品/酒店的优势与不足等核心方面。

Result: 在亚马逊产品评论、Tripadvisor酒店评论和X/Twitter帖子三个数据集上，该方法显著降低了令牌使用量和计算开销，同时在内容覆盖率、观点平衡性和语义保真度方面均优于传统AI方法和标准LLM摘要基线。

Conclusion: 所提出的框架能够高效处理大规模意见文本，在大幅降低资源消耗的前提下，实现高质量、高保真的观点摘要，为实际应用场景中的意见分析提供了可行且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Opinionated text - spanning product reviews, hotel feedback, and social posts - captures rich signals about user experiences, preferences, and concerns. However, the scale, redundancy, and imbalance of such corpora make it challenging to analyze opinions effectively, particularly when the goal is to generate summaries that remain faithful to the diversity of viewpoints expressed. This paper presents a framework that preserves semantics in LLM-based opinion summarization while minimizing token usage. We combine multidimensional classification (e.g., sentiment, topics) with a family of stratified sampling strategies to select compact yet representative subsets of opinions before prompting the LLM. Tailored prompts then produce balanced summaries that surface the salient aspects expressed in the opinions (e.g., strengths and weaknesses of products/hotels). Experiments on Amazon product reviews, Tripadvisor hotel reviews, and X/Twitter posts demonstrate that our method significantly reduces token usage and computational cost while consistently outperforming traditional AI-based and standard LLM summarization baselines in terms of content coverage, balance, and semantic preservation.

</details>


### [229] [Quantifying the Sources of Instability in LLM-Based Stance Analysis of Public Discourse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10846)
*Bo Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了计算社会科学中自动化预处理流程（如说话人辨识、语音转写清洗、句子分割）对文本分析结果的影响，使用256个来自41位公众人物的YouTube访谈数据，比较了两种说话人辨识流程和两种测量方法（LLM标注与关键词词典），聚焦于情感极性与认识模态之间的耦合关系。发现：（1）预处理流程的不稳定性主要集中在样本量少的说话人（N ≤ 5）；对于样本量较大的前四位说话人（N ≥ 16），流程引起的相关系数变化仅为0.13；（2）不同测量方法之间的分歧更大且系统性明显——即使在相同流程下，LLM与词典方法对某些高样本说话人的耦合方向判断相反；（3）总体情感比例高度稳定（|Δp(负向)| < 6个百分点），掩盖了上述两类不稳定性。研究提出一个诊断框架，用于区分预处理与测量方法的影响，强调在研究访谈数据中的跨维度关系时，必须验证结论对两类变异的稳健性，尤其需谨慎选择测量方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前计算社会科学研究依赖自动化预处理流程将原始媒体转化为可分析文本，但这些流程及后续测量方法可能引入不稳定性，影响研究结论的可靠性。尤其当不同流程或方法产生差异结果时，难以判断是流程本身还是测量工具导致的偏差。因此亟需一种方法来分离并诊断这两类来源的变异，以提升研究的可信度。

Method: 基于256个来自41位公众人物的YouTube访谈数据，采用两组说话人辨识流程（如基于聚类或深度学习的方法）与两种测量方法（大语言模型标注与关键词词典）进行组合实验，分析情感极性（负向/正向）与认识模态（如强调、怀疑）之间的相关性（r(neg, emph)），并评估不同条件下的结果变化。通过对比不同样本量下的差异、测量方法间的分歧以及整体情感比例的稳定性，构建诊断框架。

Result: （1）预处理流程的敏感性主要集中于样本量较少的说话人（N ≤ 5）；对于样本量大的说话人（N ≥ 16），流程引起的均值绝对变化仅为0.13；（2）测量方法间存在显著且系统性的分歧，即使在相同预处理流程下，LLM与关键词词典也常对同一说话人给出相反的耦合方向；（3）总体负向情感比例变化极小（|Δp(负向)| < 6个百分点），表明聚合层面的稳定性可能掩盖底层的不一致性。

Conclusion: 研究提出一个诊断框架，用以区分预处理流程与测量方法带来的变异。研究者在分析访谈数据中跨维度关系时，必须检验结论对两类变异的稳健性，尤其是测量方法的选择至关重要。忽视此问题可能导致错误的因果推断或趋势解读。

Abstract: Computational social science increasingly relies on automated preprocessing pipelines -- speaker diarization, ASR transcript cleaning, sentence segmentation -- to convert raw media into analyzable text. When these pipelines produce different outputs from the same input, two distinct sources of instability can arise: the preprocessing pipeline itself (diarization method, segmentation rules) and the downstream measurement instrument (LLM annotation vs.\ keyword lexicon). Using 256 YouTube interviews across 41 public figures from five domains, we compare two speaker-diarization pipelines and two measurement methods, all targeting the coupling between affective valence and epistemic modality. We find that (1) preprocessing pipeline sensitivity is concentrated in speakers with limited video samples (N $\leq 5$); for the four best-sampled speakers (N $\geq 16$), the mean absolute pipeline-induced change in $r(\text{neg}, \text{emph})$ is only $0.13$; (2) cross-method disagreement is larger and more systematic -- the LLM and keyword-lexicon methods assign opposite coupling directions to several well-sampled speakers, even within the same preprocessing pipeline; and (3) aggregate valence proportions are highly stable ($|Δp(\text{neg})| < 6$pp) regardless of pipeline or method, masking both sources of instability. The contribution is a diagnostic framework that separates pipeline effects from measurement effects: researchers studying cross-dimensional relationships in interview data should verify that their conclusions are robust to both sources of variation, with particular attention to measurement method choice.

</details>


### [230] [Capabilities of Claude Fable 5 on Biomedical Challenge Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10849)
*Dominic Okonkwo,Magnus Hodgson,Temitope I. David,Susan Adanna Ihejirika*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Claude Fable 5 shows high refusal rates (8.0%–99.4%) across biomedical benchmarks, but when excluding refused items, its accuracy surpasses or matches all other models. Refusal patterns differ by content type: basic science/mechanism in MedQA and MedXpertQA MM, and rare metabolic diseases in RareBench. The main limitation is willingness to respond, not capability.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Existing biomedical evaluations are flawed due to saturated benchmarks and unreliable model-based grading; this study aims to provide more accurate, deterministic evaluation of top-tier language models.

Method: Evaluated Claude Fable 5, two predecessors, and GPT-5 on eight biomedical benchmarks (four text, four multimodal) using fixed answer keys and deterministic scoring; tracked refusal rates and analyzed refusal patterns by content category.

Result: Fable 5's accuracy exceeds or matches all baselines when refused questions are excluded; distinct refusal patterns emerge in basic science and rare disease domains.

Conclusion: The primary constraint on Fable 5's biomedical utility is its reluctance to respond, not lack of knowledge or ability.

Abstract: Frontier language models are increasingly evaluated on biomedical benchmarks, but two problems undermine most published evaluations: legacy benchmarks are near-saturated, and open-ended responses are graded by other language models. We evaluate Claude Fable 5, Anthropic's most capable publicly available model, across eight biomedical benchmarks, four text and four multimodal, using deterministic scoring against fixed answer keys throughout. We include two Claude predecessors and GPT-5 as baselines. Refusal is tracked as a distinct outcome in every result table. That decision produces the paper's central finding. Fable 5 refuses between 8.0% and 99.4% of questions depending on the benchmark, a pattern absent in both predecessors and in GPT-5. Once refused items are excluded from the denominator, Fable 5's accuracy exceeds or meets every other model on every benchmark in this study. We identify two distinguishable refusal patterns: one concentrating in basic-science and mechanism content across MedQA and MedXpertQA MM, confirmed independently on two benchmarks using each benchmark's own category labels; and a separate disease-domain pattern on RareBench, where inborn metabolic disease presentations are refused near-universally while adult-onset autoimmune presentations are not. The primary constraint on Fable 5's biomedical usefulness is willingness to engage, not capability once it does.

</details>


### [231] [The Nuts and Bolts of Natural Language to SQL Translation: A Systematic Analysis of Model Pipeline Optimisation Approaches and their Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10911)
*Filip Klubicka,Vasudevan Nedumpozhimana,Sneha Rautmare,Bora Caglayan,Mingxue Wang,John D. Kelleher*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了大语言模型时代下自然语言转SQL（NL2SQL）任务中多个管道扩展组件的交互作用，旨在推动更轻量级模型的发展。通过集成NatSQL中间表示、预处理步骤、基于合成数据的微调以及一种新型重排序模型来提升最终束搜索中的SQL选择效果，并在SmBoP和RASAT两种主干架构上进行了消融实验与Shapley分析。结果表明，简单叠加所有组件并不能获得最佳性能，各组件的效果取决于其与基线系统及其他组件之间的相互作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NL2SQL任务在大语言模型时代仍是一个开放性问题，具有广泛的应用价值。现有方法虽有进展，但如何高效整合多种改进策略以构建更轻量、高性能的模型仍需探索。因此，研究不同组件间的交互作用，有助于指导未来更优模型的设计。

Method: 集成NatSQL中间表示、引入预处理与基于合成数据的微调步骤，并设计一种新型重排序模型；在SmBoP和RASAT两种主干模型上进行实验，采用消融研究结合Shapley值分析评估各组件贡献及其交互影响。

Result: 实验结果显示，各组件的组合并非越复杂越好，整体性能受组件间交互及与基线模型适配度的影响显著；某些组件在特定架构下表现突出，而另一些则可能产生负向影响，说明需要根据具体系统进行协同优化。

Conclusion: NL2SQL系统的性能提升不能仅依赖于堆叠多个模块，而应关注组件间的协同效应与系统兼容性。未来轻量级模型的设计需综合考虑组件交互机制，而非简单集成。

Abstract: In the age of large language models, Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) translation remains an open problem with many useful applications. We explore interactions between several NL2SQL pipeline extensions to inspire development of more lightweight models. Specifically, we integrate the NatSQL intermediate representation, include a preprocessing step and a fine-tuning step based on synthetic data, and develop a novel reranker model to improve SQL selection in the final beam. We perform an ablation study supplemented by a Shapley analysis of these different components integrated with two backbone architectures, SmBoP and RASAT. We find that simply combining all of them does not lead to best results, but that their impact depends on their interactions with the baseline system, as well as each other.

</details>


### [232] [EasyOPD: An Easy-to-use On-Policy Distillation Framework for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11012)
*Jie Sun,Mao Zheng,Mingyang Song,Qiyong Zhong,Gengsheng Li,Zhepei Hong,Chang Wu,Pengfei Liu,Junfeng Fang,Xiang Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为EasyOPD的统一在线策略蒸馏框架，通过分离配置、方法逻辑和执行后端，实现多种在线策略蒸馏方法的可复现与扩展。该框架基于verl分布式强化学习系统，支持跨分词器蒸馏、自蒸馏和逐步蒸馏等不同设置，在多个基准测试中表现出色，并提供了可运行的YAML配置、文档和演示包。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线策略蒸馏方法在监督形式、分词器兼容性、教师访问方式和监督粒度上差异大，导致实现碎片化，难以复现和扩展。

Method: EasyOPD采用模块化设计，将用户配置、方法特定的监督逻辑与verl后端解耦，通过扩展边界实现损失构建、回放元数据、奖励处理、分词器对齐和教师侧计算的集成。

Result: 在推理、代码生成、科学知识和工具使用等多个任务上，三种典型在线策略蒸馏方法均能通过同一verl后端高效执行，保持各自方法目标和任务相关性能特征。

Conclusion: EasyOPD提供了一个统一、可扩展且易于复现的在线策略蒸馏框架，显著降低了方法实现复杂度，推动了该领域的标准化发展。

Abstract: Conventional language-model distillation often relies on fixed teacher-generated data, which may not cover the states encountered by an evolving student policy. On-policy distillation (OPD) instead collects teacher or evaluator supervision on student-generated rollouts. However, existing OPD methods differ substantially in supervision form, tokenizer compatibility, teacher access, and supervision granularity, leading to fragmented implementations that are difficult to reproduce and extend. We present \textsc{EasyOPD}, an on-policy distillation framework built on verl, a distributed reinforcement-learning framework for large language models. \textsc{EasyOPD} separates user-side configuration, method-specific supervision logic, and verl-based execution. Its method modules connect to the shared backend through extension boundaries for loss construction, rollout metadata, reward processing, tokenizer alignment, and teacher-side computation. We instantiate representative methods for three OPD settings -- cross-tokenizer OPD, on-policy self-distillation, and step-wise OPD. Experiments on reasoning, code-generation, scientific-knowledge, and tool-use benchmarks show that these implementations can be executed through the same verl-based backend while retaining their method-specific objectives and task-dependent performance profiles. We release \textsc{EasyOPD} with runnable YAML configurations, documentation, and an installable demonstration package and video.

</details>


### [233] [Can a Language Model Learn Facts Continually in Its Weights?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11020)
*Charles O'Neill*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了持续学习中语言模型通过权重更新积累知识的能力。实验发现，仅使用单一陈述训练会导致知识无法有效利用（准确率仅1%），而通过多样化重述进行训练可显著提升知识可用性（准确率46%）。尽管知识在权重中未被删除，但可能因后续写入而“行为遗忘”，表现为对问题的回答错误，且错误答案常包含最近写入的信息。即使事实被遗忘，若在提示中提供，仍可恢复至77-80%的准确率。结果表明，知识存储是与问题相关的，后期写入会重定向其访问路径；相比之下，上下文比权重更可靠地支持知识的长期保留和组合使用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究语言模型在持续学习过程中，通过权重更新积累知识的可行性与局限性，特别是新知识是否能有效保留并被后续任务使用。

Method: 在Qwen3模型上进行序列化知识写入实验，从创建到最多100次后续写入，使用五类保留问题评估知识保持情况。比较不同训练数据广度（单一陈述 vs 多样化重述）对知识可及性的影响，并分析行为遗忘现象及上下文恢复能力。

Result: 单一陈述训练下，知识20次写入后准确率仅1%，而多样化重述训练下可达46%。知识虽未被擦除，但易受后续写入干扰，表现出行为遗忘；即使忘记，提示中提供仍可恢复至77-80%准确率。所有干预措施均无法确保早期知识可访问。

Conclusion: 当需要组合或长期保存知识时，可靠的通道是上下文而非权重。尽管广泛数据可生成可用知识，且冻结参考可维持能力，但现有方法无法保证早期知识在后续写入中依然可访问。

Abstract: Continual learning promises a language model that keeps acquiring knowledge after training, with each new fact written into its weights. Whether weight writes can support accumulation remains undecided. We follow invented facts written into Qwen3 models from creation through sequences of twenty to one hundred later writes, using held-out questions of five types, with the original model given the fact in its prompt as the reference. Across these experiments, the breadth of the training data determines the kind of knowledge created. Bare-statement training produces recitation, while diverse restatements reduce the recitation-to-use gap from 27.4 to 5.4 points without showing the model a conclusion. This difference carries into later writes: after twenty sequential writes, bare-statement facts retain 1% accuracy while facts written from broad study data retain 46%. We also find that facts can be behaviourally forgotten without being erased. Forgotten facts keep most of the log-probability added by their write, and under bare-statement training 70% of wrong answers about them contain the most recently written fact. The same writes barely degrade the model's use of facts in context, and a forgotten study fact supplied in the prompt recovers to 77-80% on its questions. These results describe knowledge that is stored but question-keyed: later writes redirect the questions that reached it. Damage to unrelated abilities tracks KL divergence from the original model, and the later writes cause interference regardless of how the earlier fact was stored. Broad data can create usable knowledge, and a frozen reference can preserve capability, but no intervention we tested, including those built on accurate local measurements of each write, keeps earlier facts reachable. When facts must be composed or survive later writes, the reliable channel is context rather than the weights.

</details>


### [234] [Dimensionality in Satisfaction Ratings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11026)
*Andrew Hong,Jason Potteiger*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究利用GPT-4.1对全球消费品公司约9,000条客服对话文本进行标注，将客户满意度分解为整体、客服人员、结果、产品和客户努力五个维度，并与客户自评满意度进行验证。结果显示，除产品满意度外，其余四个维度与自评满意度高度相关（整体、客服、结果相关系数约为0.65，努力为-0.54）；剔除严重分歧样本后，整体相关性提升至0.811，完全剔除分歧尾部则达0.914。各维度间高度共线，组合预测能力未超越整体评分，其价值在于归因分析与覆盖广度。全量分析显示，真实满意度（2.91）显著低于仅基于回调查的报告值（3.62），凸显传统抽样偏差。该方法的优势在于从对话数据中识别更细微的客户体验驱动因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统客户满意度评估依赖有限的问卷调查，存在样本偏差且难以深入理解满意度的具体驱动因素。本研究旨在通过大规模语言模型对完整客服对话进行自动标注，实现对客户满意度的精细化分解，以揭示更深层的体验动因，并克服抽样局限。

Method: 采用GPT-4.1对约9,000条全球消费者商品公司的客服对话进行自动化文本标注，将满意度拆解为五个维度：整体、客服人员、结果、产品、客户努力。通过对比模型标注与客户自评分数，评估各维度的相关性，并分析维度间的共线性及对整体满意度预测的增量贡献。同时，比较全面普查与抽样调查的满意度差异，验证方法的有效性与代表性。

Result: 四个维度（整体、客服、结果、客户努力）与客户自评满意度高度相关，相关系数在0.65左右，客户努力为负相关（-0.54）；产品满意度相关性较弱。去除极端分歧案例后，相关性显著提升至0.811（部分排除）和0.914（完全排除）。各维度高度共线，组合后未提升预测性能。全量分析显示真实满意度（2.91）远低于抽样调查报告值（3.62）。方法优势在于提供更细粒度的归因分析与更全面的数据覆盖。

Conclusion: 大语言模型可有效实现客户满意度的多维分解，尽管预测增量有限，但其核心价值在于提升归因深度与数据覆盖广度。全量分析揭示了传统抽样方法带来的乐观偏差，凸显了从对话数据中挖掘细微体验动因的潜力，为改进客户体验管理提供了新范式。

Abstract: We used a large language model (GPT-4.1) to annotate the text of about 9,000 support conversations at a global consumer-goods firm, decomposing customer-care satisfaction into component axes (overall, agent, outcome, product, and customer effort), and validated the LLM annotations against the satisfaction ratings customers gave themselves. Four of five axes track self-reported satisfaction closely (overall, agent, and outcome near an unadjusted 0.65; effort -0.54), while product satisfaction is weak against the available proxy. The unadjusted correlation also understates the alignment: the disagreements concentrate in a small, readable tail of divergent sessions rather than in general drift, and the overall correlation rises to 0.811 when only the severe divergences are excluded and to 0.914 when the full divergent tail is excluded. The axes are also highly collinear, and adding them to the overall score does not improve prediction of the customer's rating, the decomposition's value is not incremental prediction but attribution and coverage. And, with greater coverage the picture of the data changes. Read on every contact rather than the few that return a survey, satisfaction is markedly lower than the survey reports (a full-census 2.91 against the surveyed 3.62 on a five-point scale). The promise of decomposed satisfaction as a methodology is the ability to identify more nuanced drivers of customer experience in conversational data.

</details>


### [235] [Flout at Your Own Risk: LLMs Struggle with Pragmatic Cooperativity Under Epistemic Asymmetry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11053)
*Hannah VanderHoeven,Abhijnan Nath,Nikhil Krishnaswamy*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究探讨了大语言模型（LLMs）在部分信息条件下多主体协作任务中的语用推理能力，引入‘协作认知不对称’概念，结合格里希合作原则，评估不同提示和后训练策略下LLMs作为说话者与听者的合作表现。结果显示，尽管通过提示和后训练可激发一定的语用能力，但LLMs在信息不完整时仍存在沟通障碍，且部分失败模式与未被识别的格里希准则违背相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型在协作与代理流程中的广泛应用，亟需探究其在信息不对称情境下的语用协作能力，尤其是能否有效传递和理解上下文线索以支持协同推理。

Method: 提出协作认知不对称的正式化定义，设计多主体协作任务，在部分信息条件下测试多种LLMs的表现，采用提示工程与后训练策略，并基于格里希合作原则分析其行为是否符合合作规范。

Result: LLMs在协作中展现出一定语用能力，可通过提示和后训练增强；但在信息不完整时仍存在沟通失效，部分错误表现为对格里希准则的无意识违背。

Conclusion: 尽管大语言模型具备一定的语用协作潜力，但在真实复杂协作场景中仍受限于信息不对称，需进一步优化以实现更自然、高效的跨主体沟通。

Abstract: Fruitful collaborations rely on cooperative communications, including of contextual cues to incorporate into reasoning. The increasing use of LLMs in collaborative and agentic pipelines raises questions about the extent to which they exhibit these pragmatic capabilities, especially in scenarios where they may not have access to the same information as their collaborators. In this paper, we perform a novel investigation into the pragmatic reasoning capabilities of LLMs in a multi-party collaborative task under partial information conditions. We formalize a notion of collaborative epistemic asymmetry that explicitly connects objective task success to Grice's cooperative principle and empirically assess various LLMs' abilities to act cooperatively as both speakers and listeners, including both prompting and post-training strategies. Our results show that while LLMs exhibit certain pragmatic capabilities in collaborative settings, and these can be elicited through prompting and post-training, they still face challenges in pragmatic communication with incomplete information, and that certain failure modes do correlate with floutings of Grice's maxims that go unrecognized.

</details>


### [236] [MJ: Multi-turn LLM Jailbreaking via Decomposed Credit Assignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11070)
*Junyoung Park,Namgyu Park,Sechan Lee,Yoon-Chan Jhi,Jihoon Cho,Sangdon Park*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出DC-GRPO框架，通过分阶段的信用分配机制提升多轮越狱攻击的有效性，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在多轮越狱攻击中存在信用分配粗略的问题，难以准确评估各对话回合的贡献，导致学习效率低下。

Method: 提出分解信用的组相对策略优化（DC-GRPO），为每一轮对话分配独立的组相对学习信号，结合即时与未来信用，避免整体轨迹得分广播带来的信用误分配。

Result: 在多个目标LLM和基准测试中，动态与静态加权版本分别达到98.26%和97.88%的平均ASR5@3，显著优于SEMA（86.58%）和TROJail（86.23%）。

Conclusion: 实验表明，多轮越狱攻击性能的提升主要源于轮次级的组相对信用分配机制，而非特定加权规则。

Abstract: Modern large language models (LLMs) operate in interactive multi-turn settings, making multi-turn jailbreaking a realistic threat model and an important setting for automated red teaming. A core challenge in learning multi-turn jailbreak attackers is credit assignment: different turns contribute differently to the final outcome, yet existing learning signals are often too coarse to identify their individual contributions. We propose decomposed credit GRPO (DC-GRPO), a unified turn-level credit assignment framework for Group Relative Policy Optimization in multi-turn jailbreak learning. DC-GRPO assigns a separate group-relative learning signal to each turn by combining immediate and future credit, avoiding the credit misassignment induced by broadcasting a single trajectory-level score across the dialogue. We instantiate this framework with static and dynamic weighting rules that differ in how the two credit sources are balanced while sharing the same turn-level structure. Across multiple victim LLMs and benchmarks, the dynamic- and static-weighted variants achieve average ASR5@3 scores of 98.26% and 97.88%, respectively, substantially outperforming the state-of-the-art methods, including SEMA (86.58%) and TROJail (86.23%). Their consistently strong performance indicates that the central empirical benefit comes from turn-level group-relative credit assignment rather than a particular weighting rule. Warning: This paper contains examples of harmful content.

</details>


### [237] [ResearchQA: Benchmarking Citation-Grounded Question-Answering on Scientific Papers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11074)
*Saba Imran,Debanjum Singh Solanky*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ResearchQA 是一个包含 6,211 个单篇论文问答对的基准，覆盖八个领域和四种问题类型（查找、理解、多跳推理、对抗性），专为基于引用的评估设计。它允许多个有效支持段落，并在源论文不支持答案时奖励拒绝回答。通过确定性引用匹配器和基于 LLM 的评分器评估了八个主流闭源与开源模型，结果显示基于引用的指标比 LLM 评分更能区分模型表现；开源模型在引用准确率上接近最优闭源模型，同时延迟降低 3 到 6 倍。研究已公开基准、评估工具和评分提示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有科学阅读辅助评估方法难以检测答案是否由可验证的引用支持，因此需要一种更严谨的基于引用的评估方式来衡量大语言模型在科学文献理解中的真实能力。

Method: 构建 ResearchQA 基准，涵盖多种问题类型和领域，采用确定性引用匹配器与 LLM 基础评分器双轨评估，对比不同模型在引用覆盖和引用准确性上的表现。

Result: 基于引用的指标能更清晰地区分模型性能，开源模型在引用准确率上接近闭源模型，且每例推理延迟显著更低（3-6倍）。

Conclusion: ResearchQA 提供了一种有效的基于引用的评估框架，揭示了当前模型在科学阅读任务中的真实能力边界，推动更可靠、高效的大模型应用。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used to assist scientific reading, but existing evaluation methods often fail to detect whether answers are supported by verifiable citations. We introduce ResearchQA, a benchmark of 6,211 single-paper question-answer pairs from 494 open-access papers spanning eight domains and four question types: lookup, comprehension, multi-hop, and adversarial. ResearchQA is designed for citation-grounded evaluation: it permits multiple valid supporting passages for a claim and rewards grounded refusal when the source paper does not support an answer. We evaluate eight leading closed- and open-weight models in a citation-grounded chat-with-paper setting using a deterministic citation matcher and an LLM-based rubric evaluator. Citation-based metrics separate systems more clearly than LLM-evaluator scores: section coverage and citation accuracy vary substantially across models, while evaluator scores remain tightly compressed. We further find that open-weight models approach the best closed-model citation accuracy while achieving 3 to 6 times lower per-example latency. We release the benchmark, evaluation harness, and evaluator prompt.

</details>


### [238] [Do LLMs Fabricate Legal Citations? A Bilingual Benchmark on Saudi Data Protection Law and the GDPR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11127)
*Noura Suliman Alrajeh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究构建了一个包含120个问题的双语基准测试，评估免费大语言模型（LLM）在欧盟GDPR和沙特个人数据保护法（PDPL）下的法定条文引用准确性。测试涵盖直接引用检索、虚假前提验证及无法回答的‘陷阱’问题，所有问题均以阿拉伯语和英语提出，评分基于人工验证的参考答案。评估的三个模型（Gemini 2.5 Flash、GPT-OSS-120B、Nemotron-3-Super-120B）在GDPR上表现优异（94–100%准确率），但在PDPL上出现严重捏造（60–77%），且与查询语言无关。最高伪造率源于法律条文与实施细则的混淆，91%的错误引用被高置信度（≥0.8）声称。结果表明，模型置信度无法提供保障，必须依赖逐字验证机制，而非模型自我判断，才能确保合规审查中对LLM的可靠使用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着组织和监管机构越来越多地依赖大语言模型处理合规性问题，错误的法律条文引用可能悄然传播至法律建议、合规文档和政策决策中。因此，亟需评估现有自由可获取的大语言模型在关键法律文本引用上的可靠性，尤其是跨司法管辖区的表现差异，以避免因模型幻觉导致重大风险。

Method: 构建一个双语（阿拉伯语/英语）基准测试集，包含120个问题，涵盖直接引用检索、虚假前提验证和故意设计的无法回答的‘陷阱’问题（如关于已废止条款或仅存在于实施条例中的截止日期）。所有问题均针对欧盟GDPR和沙特PDPL两个数据保护法规。采用人工验证的黄金标准进行自动评分，评估三种公开可用的大语言模型在不同语言和法律体系下的表现。

Result: 在欧盟GDPR上，三个模型的直接引用准确率接近满分（94–100%）；而在沙特PDPL上，引用错误率高达60–77%，且错误模式不随语言变化。最高伪造率源于将实施条例中的规定误认为法律条文。91%的伪造引用被模型以高置信度（≥0.8）断言，表明模型自信度无法作为可靠过滤机制。

Conclusion: 模型在法律引用中的幻觉行为高度依赖于法律所属的司法管辖区，而非查询语言。模型自信心不能作为防范幻觉的有效手段，因此在制度化应用中，必须采用严格的逐字验证机制，而非依赖模型自身的置信度输出，才能保障合规审查的安全性。

Abstract: Organizations and regulators increasingly consult large language models (LLMs) for regulatory-compliance questions, yet a wrong statutory citation can silently propagate into legal advice, compliance documentation, and policy decisions. We introduce a bilingual benchmark of 120 questions probing whether freely accessible LLMs fabricate article citations for two data-protection instruments: the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Saudi Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL). The benchmark pairs direct citation retrieval questions with false premise verification probes and deliberately unanswerable "trap" questions -- including questions about a repealed article and about deadlines that exist only in implementing regulations, not in the law itself. Every question is posed in both Arabic and English, and all scoring is fully automatic against a manually verified gold reference. Evaluating three freely accessible models (Gemini 2.5 Flash, GPT-OSS-120B, Nemotron-3-Super-120B), we find a dramatic jurisdiction gap: near-ceiling citation accuracy on the GDPR (94-100% on direct retrieval) against majority fabrication on the Saudi PDPL (60-77%), invariant to query language; the highest fabrication rates (67%) arise from statute-vs-regulations confusion, and 91% of fabricated citations are asserted with confidence >= 0.8. Fabrication tracks the jurisdiction of the law, not the language of the query, and model confidence provides no protection -- indicating that verbatim-verification safeguards, rather than model self confidence, must gate any institutional reliance on LLMs for compliance screening.

</details>


### [239] [TIGER: Text-Conditioned Visual Gated Routing with Acceptance Alignment for Multimodal Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11131)
*Quynh Vo,Cong-Duy Nguyen,Ponhvoan Srey,Luu Anh Tuan,Thong Nguyen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TIGER提出了一种基于文本条件的视觉门控路由框架，用于提升多模态大模型的推测解码效率。通过动态选择与当前文本状态相关的视觉令牌，避免冗余视觉信息干扰，同时优化生成长度以提升速度。采用基于验证器奖励的分组策略训练，使轻量级起草者更贴近目标模型并生成更长可接受的前缀，实验表明其在推理速度和质量之间实现了良好平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推测解码在多模态大模型中效果有限，主要因为起草者对视觉关键内容容易产生偏差，且缺乏对无关视觉证据的有效处理或对验证器接受前缀长度的优化。

Method: TIGER采用文本条件的视觉门控路由机制，动态筛选上下文相关的视觉令牌；使用基于验证器反馈的接受前缀长度奖励进行分组策略训练，并结合知识蒸馏与KL锚定进行预热初始化，以实现训练与推理效率的一致性。

Result: TIGER在精确验证器侧推测解码下显著提升了接受前缀长度与推测加速比，在视觉路由分析中保持了与基线相当的下游准确率，展现出优异的质量-延迟权衡能力。

Conclusion: TIGER通过动态视觉令牌选择和接受前缀导向的训练策略，有效解决了多模态推测解码中的视觉冗余与效率瓶颈问题，为高效多模态生成提供了新范式。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive generation by letting a lightweight drafter propose multiple tokens that are verified by a larger target model. Although effective for text-only LLMs, speculative decoding yields limited gains in VLMs because drafters often diverge on vision-critical content, while existing multimodal acceleration methods do not directly address irrelevant visual evidence or optimize the verifier-accepted prefix length that governs speedup. We propose TIGER, a Text-conditioned vIsual GatEd Routing framework for multimodal speculative decoding. TIGER dynamically selects a sparse set of context-relevant visual tokens based on the drafter's current textual state, rather than expose the full visual token set or a fixed compressed interface. To better align training with inference-time efficiency, we optimize the drafter with acceptance-aligned group-based policy training using verifier-derived rewards based on accepted prefix length, built on top of distillation warm start with KL anchoring. This encourages the drafter not only to imitate the target model, but also to produce speculative continuations that survive verification for longer prefixes. Experiments show that TIGER yields consistent gains in accepted prefix length and speculative speedup under exact verifier-side speculative decoding, while achieving favorable quality-latency trade-offs with comparable downstream accuracy in visual-routing analyses.

</details>


### [240] [Unified Gradient Projection: Language-Balanced Continual Learning for Multilingual Low-Resource ASR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11163)
*Ziang Ren,Guodong Lin,Yuchen Ai,Kaize Tan,Wei-Qiang Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL
