Standard O2O-RL pipelines train multiple candidate policies offline, evaluate them using off-policy or online evaluation, and then deploy and fine-tune the policy with the highest estimated value. However, as in offline pretraining, fine-tuning performance is highly sensitive to the choice of algorithm and hyperparameters, making it risky to commit to a single policy. Objectives: We study active policy selection for fine-tuning under a limited interaction budget in O2O-RL settings. To our knowledge, this is the first work to address this problem. Methods: We formulate the problem by identifying a fundamental trade-off between allocating online interactions to policy evaluation, which helps identify high-performing policies, and allocating them to fine-tuning, which improves policy performance. We then propose an approach that balances this trade-off by actively selecting policies for fine-tuning based on upper-confidence bounds on their future performance. These bounds are derived from locally linear performance forecasts fitted to observations obtained through online evaluation. Results: Across a diverse range of experiments, the proposed approach consistently outperforms existing O2O-RL baselines. Conclusions: Actively selecting and fine-tuning policies uses limited online interaction budgets more effectively than either committing to a single policy or dividing the budget equally among all policies. Our framework also advances offline RL toward practical deployment in real-world systems where online interaction is costly or risky.

</details>


### [442] [Time-Lag-Aware Deep Reinforcement Learning for Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling in PPVC Module Factories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11725)
*Ziheng Zhang,Wei Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究针对预制模块化建筑中因混凝土养护、防水测试和油漆干燥等导致的长时间工序间延迟问题，提出一种基于双注意力深度强化学习的调度优化方法。通过引入滞后感知动态、两个前瞻性的滞后特征通道及活性掩码的操作与站位类型嵌入，显著提升调度效率。在基于国家标准指南构建的公开基准测试集上，所提方法在无求解器依赖的情况下，性能接近约束规划参考解（差距约4%），优于所有传统调度规则和遗传算法元启发式方法，且在资源竞争加剧时优势更明显。单一混合尺寸策略可泛化至不同规模工厂，具备秒级重规划能力，适用于实时扰动应对。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预制模块化建筑中，混凝土养护、防水测试和油漆干燥等后处理工序导致显著的时间延迟，使模块在工作站上被占用但无法继续加工，严重影响生产调度效率。现有调度方法忽略此类延迟或事后修复，效果不佳，亟需一种能有效建模和应对这些延迟的先进调度机制。

Method: 采用状态-动作-奖励框架下的双注意力深度强化学习模型，引入三项轻量级可独立移除的改进：(1) 滞后感知的动态系统设计与可接受的奖励边界；(2) 两个用于预测滞后的前瞻特征通道；(3) 考虑设备活跃状态的嵌入表示。所有改进均可独立验证，确保性能提升归因于新增机制。同时发布基于国家指南的公开基准生成工具。

Result: 在未见实例上，所提方法无需任何求解器或模型支持，即可实现最优调度性能（距离约束规划参考解仅约4%），显著优于各类调度规则与遗传算法，且在高负载条件下优势扩大。单一训练策略可跨工厂规模适用，响应时间短，支持秒级重规划。当可部署精确求解器时，其仍为性能上限，本研究明确刻画了这一边界。

Conclusion: 通过引入滞后感知机制与前瞻性特征设计，所提出的深度强化学习调度器在复杂延迟场景下表现出卓越性能，兼具高效性、鲁棒性与可扩展性，是目前无需求解器支持的最强调度方案，为预制工厂智能调度提供了新范式。

Abstract: Prefabricated prefinished volumetric construction moves most building work into module factories, whose production floor operates as a flexible job shop. A major complication is decisive: long post-operation time-lags caused by concrete curing, watertightness ponding tests, and paint drying, during which a module is blocked while its workstation stays free. On benchmark instances grounded in an official national prefabrication guidebook, these lags inflate even the optimal reference makespan by about 67% on average, and ignoring them at decision time, then repairing to feasibility, is worse than every dispatching rule. We adapt a state-of-the-art dual-attention deep reinforcement learning solver through three minimally invasive, individually ablatable extensions: lag-aware dynamics with an admissible reward bound, two anticipatory lag feature channels, and liveness-masked operation- and station-type embeddings. With every extension disabled the implementation reproduces the original solver exactly, so all gains are attributable to the adaptations. We release a public, guidebook-grounded benchmark generator. On held-out instances the learned policy is the strongest solver-free scheduler: it reaches within about 4% of a constraint-programming reference and beats every dispatching rule and a genetic-algorithm metaheuristic, with its advantage widening under capacity contention, and a single size-mixed policy carries this lead across the trained range of factory sizes. It needs no solver, model, or license in the loop and re-plans within seconds of a disruption; where an exact solver can be deployed, that solver remains the quality ceiling, a boundary we map explicitly.

</details>


### [443] [HiFi-LLP: High-Fidelity, Low-Cost Latency Predictors with Confidence for Robust HW-NAS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11746)
*Shambhavi Balamuthu Sampath,Behzad Shomali,Nael Fasfous,Moritz Thoma,Judeson Anthony Fernando,Lukas Frickenstein,Pierpaolo Mori,Manoj Rohit Vemparala,Alexander Frickenstein,Walter Stechele*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出HiFi-LLP，一种基于图注意力网络的高保真、低成本延迟预测器，结合置信度度量，显著提升预测精度并减少硬件在环（HIL）测量需求。进一步设计混合NAS框架，对低置信度预测调用HIL，实现最高8.6倍加速，同时保持优异的模型性能权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有硬件感知神经架构搜索（HW-NAS）依赖硬件在环（HIL）延迟测量，但其串行特性成为瓶颈；尽管已有延迟预测器，但仍面临需大量样本训练和预测不准导致搜索偏差的问题。

Method: 提出基于图注意力网络的HiFi-LLP延迟预测器，并引入置信度评估机制；设计混合NAS框架，仅在预测置信度低时调用HIL反馈，实现高效与准确的平衡。

Result: HiFi-LLP在LatBench数据集上达到最高0.996的斯皮尔曼等级相关系数，10%误差范围内比先前方法提升最多9个百分点；混合NAS框架相比传统NAS提速最高达8.6倍，且保持竞争力的帕累托前沿。

Conclusion: HiFi-LLP及其混合NAS框架有效缓解了硬件感知优化中的延迟预测瓶颈，显著提升搜索效率与精度，为边缘设备上DNN部署提供了实用高效的解决方案。

Abstract: With deep neural networks (DNNs) increasingly deployed on edge devices, hardware (HW)-aware optimization techniques--such as HW-aware compression and HW-aware neural architecture search (HW-NAS)--have become essential. These methods rely on real feedback from the target hardware to tailor DNN architectures for efficient deployment. While the search can be parallelized, latency measurements via hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) remain a bottleneck due to their sequential nature. Recent approaches use latency predictors to replace costly HIL feedback, but challenges persist: (1) platform-specific predictors often require tens of thousands of samples, and (2) inaccurate predictions can mislead the NAS process. To address this, we introduce HiFi-LLP, a high-fidelity, low-cost latency predictor based on graph attention networks, augmented with a confidence metric. HiFi-LLP outperforms prior platform-specific predictors by up to 9 percentage points (p.p.) in the 10% accuracy bound and achieves a Spearman's rank correlation of up to 0.996 across six devices in the LatBench dataset. We further propose a hybrid NAS framework that routes low-confidence predictions to HIL, achieving up to 8.6$\times$ speedup compared to typical NAS while maintaining a competitive Pareto front.

</details>


### [444] [From Global to Factor-Wise Expert Composition in Discrete Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11758)
*Haozhe Huang,Yudong Xu,Abhijoy Mandal,Alán Aspuru-Guzik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FactorDiff，一种针对扩散模型的因子级组合框架，通过动态路由每个因子到最相关的专家，解决传统方法在样本级别处理时忽略空间或功能特异性的局限。该方法在ARC-AGI基准上验证，证明因子级路由优于复杂的全局标量加权方案，尤其在需要逻辑一致性和空间解耦的任务中表现更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散扩散模型虽能通过组合预训练专家解决复杂推理任务，但其基于每样本的处理方式忽略了专家间可能存在的空间或功能专门化，限制了模型的泛化能力。因此亟需一种能够识别并利用因子层面差异的组合机制。

Method: 提出因子级组合框架FactorDiff，将生成样本分解为更小的因子（如像素级），设计动态路由机制，使每个因子被分配至最合适的专家进行处理，实现更精细的专家分工与协作。

Result: 在ARC-AGI基准测试中，因子特定路由策略显著优于全局标量加权方法，在需要逻辑一致性与空间解耦的任务中表现出更强的性能。

Conclusion: FactorDiff通过因子级动态路由实现了更高效的专家组合，突破了传统方法在样本级处理上的局限，为复杂推理任务中的扩散模型提供了更具可解释性与灵活性的新范式。

Abstract: Discrete diffusion models offer a powerful framework for solving complex reasoning tasks, particularly through compositional generation, which combines multiple pre-trained experts to generalize beyond their individual training data. Recent theoretical corrections introduce time-dependent mixing weights to better align composed diffusion dynamics with the intended target. However, these methods are fundamentally limited by working on a per-sample basis, treating each generated state monolithically and ignoring the potential spatial or functional specializations of different experts. In this work, we address this limitation by proposing FactorDiff - a factor-wise composition framework for diffusion models. We posit that samples can be further decomposed into smaller factors, and propose a sampling process that dynamically routes each factor to the most relevant expert. We instantiate this framework with spatial/pixel-level compositions and validate it on the ARC-AGI benchmark, demonstrating that simple factor-specific routing consistently outperforms complex global scalar weighting schemes on tasks that require logical consistency and spatial disentanglement.

</details>


### [445] [An Exact Instrument for State Usage in Selective State-Space Models, and the Input-Driven Migration It Reveals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11796)
*Raktim Bhattacharya*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种精确测量选择性状态空间模型（如Mamba）中各模式使用情况的工具。由于状态矩阵为对角阵，每个通道的输出可精确分解为各模式的贡献，通过一个每（层、通道、窗口）的Gram张量可离线计算删除任意模式子集后的输出误差。该工具在Mamba-1系列上验证相对误差仅为2.3×10⁻⁷，对4,464个配置的部署剪枝误差预测中位相对偏差为5×10⁻⁷，其下限由重构能力决定。应用于Mamba-1（130M–2.8B）、7B Falcon-Mamba和Mamba-2发现，训练好的模型会根据输入重新分配状态空间：信号承载模式随上下文迁移；在最受影响的层中，基于输入的最优模式设置可将输出误差减半。冻结信号反事实分析表明，这种迁移主要源于输入依赖的写入映射 $B_t$，而非通常被认为具选择性的时步。基于此测量的输入调度模式剪枝在所有规模（130M至7B）上均优于静态、Hankel及层自适应排序方法，在仅一半状态预算下即达到未剪枝模型性能，且因需前向遍历一次读取模式使用情况，证明了实际可用的冗余空间，但未声称部署中节省计算或内存。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法无法精确评估选择性状态空间模型中各模式的实际贡献，尤其在动态输入下模式使用变化显著，缺乏有效的量化工具。需要一种能离线、精确衡量模式重要性并指导高效剪枝的方法，以揭示模型内部机制并提升部署效率。

Method: 利用状态矩阵的对角结构，构建每（层、通道、窗口）的Gram张量，实现输出误差的精确分解与预测；通过冻结信号反事实实验分离输入依赖项，识别关键动态机制；基于模式使用度量设计输入调度剪枝策略。

Result: 所提工具在Mamba-1上相对误差低至2.3×10⁻⁷，对4,464种配置的剪枝误差预测中位偏差为5×10⁻⁷；实证显示模型随输入动态迁移模式使用，$B_t$是迁移主因；输入调度剪枝在各规模下超越现有方法，半状态预算下媲美原模型。

Conclusion: 本研究提供了对选择性状态空间模型中模式使用行为的精确测量工具，揭示了输入驱动的动态模式重分配机制，并展示了基于此的输入调度剪枝策略在不牺牲性能前提下实现高效资源利用的潜力，为模型压缩与理解提供新范式。

Abstract: Selective state-space models such as Mamba route information through a bank of first-order modes whose input coupling is set by a learned selection mechanism. We give an exact instrument for measuring how a trained model uses these modes. Because the state matrix is diagonal, each channel's output decomposes exactly into per-mode contributions, and a per-(layer, channel, window) Gram tensor yields the exact output error of dropping any subset of modes, offline, at any budget. Validated against the reference implementation to a relative error of $2.3\times10^{-7}$ on the Mamba-1 family where it is exact, the instrument predicts a layer's deployed pruning error to a median relative deviation of $5\times10^{-7}$ over $4{,}464$ configurations, its floor set by the reconstruction. Applying the instrument across the Mamba-1 family (130M--2.8B), the deployed 7B Falcon-Mamba, and Mamba-2, we find that trained models re-allocate their state space with the input: which modes carry the signal migrates across contexts, and at the most affected layers a per-input oracle roughly halves the output error of a fixed mode set. Frozen-signal counterfactuals attribute the migration primarily to the input-dependent write map $B_t$; the timestep usually identified with selectivity carries almost none of it. Input-scheduled mode pruning on this measurement outperforms static, Hankel-based, and layer-adaptive rankings at every scale from 130M to the deployed 7B Falcon-Mamba, and at half the state budget it matches the unpruned model. Because the scheduler reads each window's mode usage from a first pass, this demonstrates realizable headroom; we claim no deployed compute or memory saving.

</details>


### [446] [Relaxing Faithfulness with Intervention-Only Causal Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11816)
*Bijan Mazaheri,Jiaqi Zhang,Caroline Uhler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出，传统因果发现算法依赖于忠实性假设（faithfulness），但在存在缓冲和稳定路径的自然系统中，这种假设常被违反，导致错误地移除因果关系。作者指出，硬干预（hard interventions）包含了关于因果链接存在与否的重要信息，而这些信息在结构发现的第一阶段被忽视。为此，论文引入“干预即时忠实性”（intervention-immediacy faithfulness）这一较弱假设，证明其足以非参数化识别因果结构。研究强调干预应成为因果结构信息的主要载体，应优先于条件独立性检验。此外，当干预范围有限无法满足识别条件时，论文还定义了相应的等价类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多自然系统具有缓冲和稳定机制，导致因果变量间的统计独立性，从而违反传统的忠实性假设，使现有因果发现算法失效。需要一种更稳健的方法来处理此类情况，尤其是在干预数据可用的情况下。

Method: 提出并分析‘干预即时忠实性’假设，基于硬干预数据进行非参数因果结构识别，通过理论推导建立干预与因果方向之间的联系，并在识别失败时定义等价类以刻画不确定性。

Result: 在干预即时忠实性假设下，可非参数化地识别因果结构；干预数据能提供比条件独立性测试更可靠的因果方向信息；当干预受限时，可构建等价类描述可能的因果结构。

Conclusion: 干预是因果结构信息的核心来源，应取代条件独立性测试作为因果发现的首要依据。在现实复杂系统中，放宽忠实性假设并利用干预数据，可显著提升因果发现的准确性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Causal discovery algorithms learn a network that describes the causal dependencies among random variables. A common workflow involves first utilizing conditional independence properties on observational data to determine partially directed causal relationships, then applying interventions to orient the unknown causal directions. A critical assumption for the first step is faithfulness: a requirement that causally linked variables exhibit statistical dependence. Many natural systems include buffering and stabilizing pathways that cancel out to achieve systemic robustness. This cancellation of pathways violates faithfulness, leading causal discovery algorithms to incorrectly remove causal dependencies. In this paper, we argue that hard interventions contain information about the presence/absence of causal linkage that is overlooked in the first stage of structure discovery. We show that a mild assumption -- called intervention-immediacy faithfulness -- that allows cancellations, is sufficient to nonparametrically identify causal structures with hard interventions. These results position interventions as the primary carriers of information about causal structure, which should take precedence over conditional independence testing. To flip the paradigm, we also specify equivalence classes when the identification criteria are not met due to limitations in the scope of interventions.

</details>


### [447] [Transformer-Guided Swarm Intelligence for Frugal Neural Architecture Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11826)
*Romain Amigon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种低成本且基于记忆的神经架构搜索（NAS）框架，结合Transformer控制器的全局宏观搜索与人工蜂群（ABC）算法的局部微观优化，利用动态熵机制防止强化学习阶段过早收敛。在消费级GPU（NVIDIA RTX 3060）上仅用3小时即发现高效模型，在CIFAR-10上实现84.85%准确率仅需约17.4k参数；在信用卡欺诈检测任务中，以约4.6k参数达到0.71 F1分数，显著提升模型效率与可部署性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统NAS需要大量计算资源，难以在普通设备上应用；现有方法常面临冷启动问题和模型膨胀，限制其在边缘设备上的部署。本文旨在开发一种轻量、高效、适用于消费级硬件的NAS框架，实现高性能、小参数量模型的自动化设计。

Method: 融合自回归Transformer控制器（基于强化学习）进行全局架构探索，结合人工蜂群算法（ABC）进行局部精细化搜索；引入动态熵机制以避免强化学习过程中的性能停滞导致的过早收敛；通过算法惩罚网络深度来主动抑制模型膨胀。

Result: 在CIFAR-10上，仅用3小时搜索时间即获得84.85%准确率，模型参数约17.4k，远小于标准模型如ResNet-20；在高度不平衡的信用卡欺诈检测任务中，以约4.6k参数达到0.71 F1分数，验证了框架在非图像数据与特定指标优化上的灵活性与有效性。

Conclusion: 所提出的混合NAS框架能够在消费级硬件上高效生成参数极简、性能优越的深度学习模型，具备良好的可扩展性与实用性，为边缘计算场景下的模型设计提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has automated the design of deep learning models but traditionally requires massive computational resources, often measured in thousands of GPU-days. In this paper, we propose a frugal and memetic NAS framework designed to democratize architecture design on consumer-grade hardware. Our approach combines the global macro-search capabilities of an autoregressive Transformer controller, trained via Reinforcement Learning (RL), with the local micro-exploitation of an Artificial Bee Colony (ABC) algorithm. To prevent premature convergence during the RL phase, we introduce a dynamic entropy mechanism that forces topological exploration upon detection of performance stagnation. Evaluated on a standard GPU (NVIDIA RTX 3060), our hybrid method effectively resolves the "cold-start" problem inherent in metaheuristics. By algorithmically penalizing network depth, our framework actively mitigates model bloat: on the CIFAR-10 dataset, it discovers an efficient architecture reaching 84.85% accuracy with only $\sim$174,000 parameters (significantly smaller than standard baselines like ResNet-20) in 3 hours of search time. Furthermore, we demonstrate the framework's flexibility by applying it to credit card fraud detection, directly optimizing the F1-Score on highly imbalanced tabular data to reach a F1-Score of 0.71 with a compact network of $\sim$4,600 parameters. These results suggest that our approach can yield tailored, accessible, and highly parameter-efficient deep learning models suitable for edge deployment.

</details>


### [448] [Invariant Learning Dynamics of Transformers in Inductive Reasoning Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11875)
*Tiberiu Musat,Tiago Pimentel,Nicholas Zucchet,Thomas Hofmann*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个理论框架，解释Transformer语言模型中归纳推理能力的出现。通过研究一类广义的归纳任务，理论证明注意力模型的训练动态可被限制在一个可解释的低维不变流形上，使得学习动态由少数可解释坐标描述，而非数百万参数。该框架揭示了数据统计如何影响上下文学习与权重学习之间的竞争，分析了随机初始化如何决定多个解中的‘获胜’电路，并展示了流形对应的坐标系可用于自动检测模型中已学习的电路。将电路形成视为低维动力学现象，推动了对Transformer学习机制的预测性理论发展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对Transformer学习动态的研究多局限于特定任务，缺乏统一的理论框架来解释归纳推理能力的出现。本文旨在建立一个通用的理论框架，以理解Transformer在多种合成任务（如上下文n-gram和多跳推理）中展现的归纳能力。

Method: 提出一类广义归纳任务，理论证明训练动态可被约束于低维不变流形；在该流形上，使用可解释坐标描述学习动态；通过该框架分析数据统计、初始化对学习过程的影响，并利用坐标系检测已学习电路。

Result: 成功构建了可解释的低维动态模型，揭示了数据分布与初始化对学习路径的调控作用，实现了对模型内部电路的自动检测，为预测Transformer学习行为提供了新视角。

Conclusion: 本文通过将电路形成建模为低维动力学现象，为理解Transformer的学习机制提供了一个可预测的理论基础，标志着向解析和预测大模型行为迈出重要一步。

Abstract: We present a theoretical framework to explain the emergence of inductive reasoning abilities in Transformer language models. While previous works on Transformer learning dynamics have so far been mostly tied to specific tasks, we study a generalized class of inductive tasks that unifies several synthetic tasks known in the literature, including in-context n-grams and multi-hop reasoning. In this class, we theoretically prove that the training dynamics of attention models can be confined to a highly interpretable, low-dimensional invariant manifold. On this manifold, the learning dynamics are captured by a handful of interpretable coordinates rather than millions of parameters, making both theoretical and empirical analysis more tractable. Using this framework, we characterize how data statistics govern the competition between in-context and in-weights learning, we study how random initializations determine the `winning' circuit when multiple solutions are possible, and we demonstrate that the coordinate frame associated with the manifold can be used to automatically detect which circuits have been learned in trained models. By casting circuit formation as a low-dimensional dynamical phenomenon, we take a step toward a predictive theory of how Transformers learn.

</details>


### [449] [Requential Coding: Pushing the Limits of Model Compression with Self-Generated Training Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11883)
*Shikai Qiu,Marc Finzi,Yujia Zheng,Kun Zhang,Andrew Gordon Wilson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为requential coding的新方法，通过教师模型从学生模型分布中选择训练样本，仅编码两者不一致的部分，从而实现与参数量和数据熵无关的高效压缩。该方法在大规模模型上显著优于传统预序编码，揭示了模型复杂度、泛化能力与可压缩性之间的新关系，并为大模型提供了更优的泛化界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有压缩方法如量化和预序编码存在局限：前者依赖参数量导致码长随模型增大而增长，后者对高熵数据编码效率低。需要一种能真正反映模型学习到的规律性、独立于模型大小和数据熵的压缩方式。

Method: requential coding：使用教师模型从学生模型生成的数据分布中采样训练样本，仅记录教师与学生预测不一致的位置，以极小的比特数捕捉模型学到的信息。

Result: requential code长度与模型参数量和数据熵无关，在大规模模型下比预序编码短多个数量级；可揭示模型过拟合过程、区分数据中的可学习结构与随机噪声；应用于PAC-Bayes界时，对十亿参数大模型给出当前最优泛化保证。

Conclusion: requential coding提供了一种全新的视角来理解模型的泛化能力与可压缩性，表明更大的模型在相同损失下反而更易压缩，且其泛化性能随计算规模增加而提升，证明了模型学习本质是发现数据中的深层规律。

Abstract: Compression is fundamental to intelligence. A model that can represent its training data as a short code has discovered regularities that enable generalization. Large neural networks may learn functions far simpler than their parameter counts suggest, but it is challenging to construct codes that realize this simplicity. Parameter-based methods such as quantization produce code lengths that scale with model size, insensitive to how much information the parameters store. Prequential coding bypasses this issue by compressing the training trajectory, but codes the exact data sequence regardless of how much the model learns, yielding large codes when the data has high entropy. We introduce requential coding, where a teacher model selects training samples drawn from the student's own distribution. The student's code records only these selections, which cost bits only where teacher and student disagree. The resulting code length is independent of parameter count and data entropy, and often orders of magnitude shorter than the prequential counterpart, with an advantage that grows with scale. This compression sheds light on phenomena inaccessible to prior compressors. Holding loss fixed, larger models and ensembles compress to much smaller sizes despite more parameters. Plugged into a PAC-Bayes bound, the requential code yields state-of-the-art generalization guarantees for billion-parameter LLMs, outperforming bounds built on aggressive post-training quantization even granted zero error. The bound tightens with scale in the compute-optimal regime, as models become increasingly compressible relative to dataset size. The same code predicts that models gradually overfit when trained for multiple epochs. It also isolates the learnable information in a dataset from its unpredictable, random content, revealing that lower-entropy text holds far more learnable structure than higher-entropy image data.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [450] [From ML Predictions to Informed Diagnostic Assistance Using the Toulmin Model of Argumentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09664)
*Anca Marginean,Adrian Groza*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究提出一种基于图灵论证模型的可解释医学影像诊断框架，将机器学习诊断分解为声明、依据、理由、限定词、反驳和支撑等组件，通过专门的生物标志物提取模型提供依据，利用MedGemma代理分析理由，结合定量评估确定限定词，并通过MedSigLip计算图像相似性构建反驳，最终向人类专家呈现完整论证链以支持更可信的诊断评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习模型在医学影像诊断中虽能生成结论，但缺乏透明性和可解释性，难以被临床医生信任与采纳。为提升诊断过程的可理解性与可信度，需要一种结构化、可追溯的评估方法。

Method: 采用图灵论证模型对图像诊断进行分解，分别由专用模型提取生物标志物（依据），由具备医学知识的MedGemma代理分析理由（ warrant），通过量化评估确定限定词，利用MedSigLip计算图像相似性生成反驳，并整合所有组件供人类专家审阅。

Result: 该框架实现了对机器生成诊断的系统性、可解释性评估，增强了人类专家对AI诊断结果的信任与判断能力，提升了诊断过程的透明度与可靠性。

Conclusion: 基于图灵论证模型的结构化评估框架能够有效提升医学影像诊断中人工智能系统的可解释性与可信度，为临床应用提供了有力支持。

Abstract: To provide a structured and interpretable assessment, we decompose the image-based diagnosis into components following the Toulmin model of argumentation. This model consists of a claim, grounds, warrant, qualifier, rebuttal, and backing. Consider a claim generated by a machine learning (ML) model for retinal diagnosis. Rather than accepting this claim at face value, one could either apply explainable AI (XAI) methods or adopt an argumentation-based approach. In our framework, a model specialized in biomarker extraction from images provides the grounds. The warrant-linking the grounds to the claim - is analyzed by an agent equipped with medical knowledge; in our architecture, this role is fulfilled by a MedGemma agent. The qualifier is determined based on the overall quantitative evaluation of both the warrant and grounds models. Finally, a rebuttal is constructed using image similarity measures computed with MedSigLip. All these components are presented to the human expert, enabling a more informed and critical assessment of the ML-generated diagnosis.

</details>


### [451] [Format Sensitivity Index: Token-Controlled Prompt Wrapper Robustness and Schema Compliance in LLM Benchmarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09665)
*Deep Pankajbhai Mehta*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 研究提示包装器对模型评分的影响，发现即使格式微小差异也能显著改变模型表现，甚至颠覆排行榜结论。提出两个新指标：格式敏感度指数（FSI）和可解析性敏感度指数（PSI），用于衡量不同包装器带来的准确率与答案可解析性变化。在14万次生成实验中，不同模型的平均FSI差异超过30倍，主要由合规性失败导致。回归分析表明，即使控制任务、模型和包装器因素，可解析性仍能有效预测准确性。建议在基准测试和结构化输出部署中考虑包装器变异性和合规性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提示包装器的细微格式差异可能显著影响模型评分，进而改变基准测试结论，但现有评估常忽略这种变异性，导致结果不可靠。

Method: 采用受控令牌协议进行大规模实验，涵盖7个问答任务、5种包装器家族和4种指令模型（参数规模7B至72B），通过计算FSI和PSI量化包装器对准确率和可解析性的影响，并使用固定效应回归分析各因素作用。

Result: 平均FSI在不同模型间差异超过30倍，主要由模型合规性失败引起；可解析性在控制其他变量后仍显著预测准确性；当前仅报告平均准确率而忽略包装器变异性与合规性的问题具有统计脆弱性。

Conclusion: 基准测试和结构化输出部署应纳入包装器敏感性分析与合规性评估，以提升结果可靠性与可复现性。

Abstract: Prompt wrappers often differ only in formatting, yet they can change model scores enough to flip leaderboard conclusions. We study this variance under a token-controlled protocol and introduce two complementary metrics: the Format Sensitivity Index (FSI), the accuracy range induced by wrapper choice, and the Parseability Sensitivity Index (PSI), the corresponding range in answer parseability. Across 140,000 OpenRouter generations spanning 7 QA tasks, 5 wrapper families, and 4 instruct models from 7B to 72B parameters, we find that mean FSI varies by over 30x across models and is largely explained by compliance failures. A fixed-effects regression shows that parseability remains a strong predictor of accuracy even after controlling for task, model, and wrapper. We argue that reporting accuracy without wrapper variance and compliance is statistically fragile, and we give practical recommendations for both benchmarking and structured-output deployments.

</details>


### [452] [Faithful, Not Corrective: Message-Format Effects in Multi-Hop Agent Relays Are Tier-Dependent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09678)
*Zayx Shawn*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究通过受控接力测试平台，评估了不同消息格式在多跳传递中的表现。结果显示，格式效果依赖于中继能力：强中继下格式差异小，弱中继下结构化格式（如JSON）因编码开销导致性能下降，但固定键名的JSON具有抗漂移优势，使格式排名反转；错误注入实验表明结构化格式能有效局部化错误，但不具纠错能力。结论是：格式选择应以链条中最弱的中继为依据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对消息格式的影响存在分歧：一派认为结构化消息可降低成本而不影响准确率，另一派则认为强制结构会降低生成质量。然而，这些研究均未考察消息在多跳传递中复制保真度的问题，而这是多代理系统中关键因素。本文旨在填补这一空白，探究不同格式在多跳传递中的实际表现。

Method: 构建一个受控的接力测试平台，使用12个程序生成的原子事实，以五种格式（自由自然语言、精确指令自然语言、JSON、三元组、键值对）进行六跳传递，通过固定强评分器与程序化真实值对比，评估各格式在两种中继能力层级、认知负荷条件及配对分叉错误注入下的表现。

Result: 在强中继条件下，所有格式几乎无损失，认知负荷仅提升成本（24-53%）而不影响保真度；在弱中继（1.5B模型）下，六跳召回率差距扩大8.7倍（从2.3到20.5点），由刚性格式的编码代价和固定键名JSON的抗漂移特性共同驱动，导致格式排名反转；错误注入实验显示，错误在各格式中持续率达83-100%，与真实值保留率接近，无显著旁路损害。

Conclusion: 结构化格式提供的是忠实且错误局部化的通信通道，而非纠错机制。格式选择应基于整个链路中最弱的中继能力，以确保信息传递的稳定性与可靠性。

Abstract: When LLM agents hand off information to one another, does the message format matter? Two literatures disagree: format-optimization work reports that structured messages cut cost without hurting accuracy, while format-restriction work finds that imposing structure degrades generation -- and neither measures what happens when a message traverses multiple hops, where copy fidelity, not one-shot generation, dominates. We introduce a controlled relay testbed: briefs of twelve programmatically generated atomic facts are re-encoded hop-by-hop in five formats (free NL, precision-instructed NL, JSON, triples, key-value) over six hops, scored by a fixed strong grader against programmatic ground truth, across two relay-capability tiers, a cognitive-load condition, and a paired-fork error injection. We find that message-format effects are tier-dependent. (i) Under faithful-relay instructions a strong relay is nearly lossless -- the documented "telephone-game" collapse does not occur -- and adding per-hop cognitive load leaves format-level fidelity unchanged (within +/-1.8 points) while raising generation cost by 24-53%. (ii) Under a weak (1.5B) relay the across-format spread of six-hop recall grows by a factor of 8.7 (from 2.3 to 20.5 points), driven by two opposing mechanisms -- an encoding toll paid by the rigid formats and drift resistance specific to the fixed-key JSON schema -- that flip the format ranking in transit. (iii) In a paired-fork injection, an injected wrong value, once present, persists to the final hop in 83-100% of chains in every format, closely matching each format's retention of the true value, with no detectable collateral damage to neighboring facts. Structure buys a faithful, error-localizing channel -- not an error-correcting code -- and format choice should follow the weakest relay in the pipeline.

</details>


### [453] [Boltzmann MapReduce: A Partition-Function Reduce for Forkable Sandboxes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09689)
*Yossi Eliaz*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 在局部渐近正态性（LAN）下，工人对大小为 $n$ 的块生成的置信密度是逆温度为样本量 $n$ 的吉布斯-玻尔兹曼测度 $\exp\{-βE(θ)\}$。在高斯/线性情况下三个结果精确成立，其他情况为一阶近似：不相交块携带独立的玻尔兹曼因子，因此 MapReduce 中的 'reduce' 按字面理解即为分区函数 $Z=\int\prod_k h_k\,dθ$，其最大值为精度加权（反方差）池化；频率一致性是零温极限 $T=1/n\\to0$ 的体现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在局部渐近正态性框架下，如何通过玻尔兹曼测度建模置信密度，并揭示 MapReduce 框架中 reduce 操作的统计意义，以及频率一致性的热力学解释。

Method: 基于局部渐近正态性（LAN）理论，将置信密度形式化为吉布斯-玻尔兹曼分布，利用逆温度与样本量的关系分析块间独立性、分区函数结构及一致性极限。

Result: 在高斯/线性模型中，不相交块的置信密度独立，MapReduce 的 reduce 操作对应于分区函数，其模式为精度加权平均；频率一致性等价于零温极限 $T=1/n\\to0$。

Conclusion: 该研究揭示了大规模数据处理中的统计机制与热力学类比之间的深刻联系，为分布式统计推断提供了理论基础。

Abstract: To leading order under local asymptotic normality (LAN), the confidence density a worker emits over a chunk of size $n$ is a Gibbs--Boltzmann measure $\exp\{-βE(θ)\}$ whose inverse temperature is the sample size, $β=n$. Three consequences are exact in the Gaussian/linear case and first-order otherwise: disjoint chunks carry independent Boltzmann factors, so the MapReduce \emph{reduce}, read literally, is a partition function $Z=\int\prod_k h_k\,dθ$ whose mode is precision-weighted (inverse-variance) pooling; frequentist consistency is the zero-temperature limit $T=1/n\to0$

</details>


### [454] [Interpreting Latent CoT Reasoning as Dynamical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09698)
*Sabari Iyyappan Duraipandian,Shreya Sanjay Boyane,Manju Nagesh,Jerome Francis,Archana Vaidheeswaran,Kevin Zhu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于动力系统分析的方法，用于研究隐式思维链（latent CoT）中推理轨迹的动态演化。通过量化指标（如步间变化、方向一致性、Lyapunov敏感性）和可视化技术（如UMAP、DMD/PHATE），揭示了CODI和COCONUT在表示空间中的结构化非随机动态行为，分别表现为稳定吸引子和不稳定扩张系统。此外，SIM-CoT监督虽增强稳定性但不改变基本动态模式。该框架提升了对隐式推理过程的理解与可解释性，并为改进模型性能提供指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有隐式思维链方法（如CODI和COCONUT）存在可解释性问题，其在隐藏空间中维持多重叠加的候选推理路径，缺乏像显式思维链那样单一透明的推理轨迹。当前机制分析方法无法阐明推理如何在潜层步骤中演化，因此亟需新的工具来揭示其内在动态机制。

Method: 将隐式token序列建模为表示空间中的轨迹，运用动力系统理论进行分析，结合定量测量（步间变化、方向一致性、Lyapunov敏感性）与定性投影技术（UMAP、DMD/PHATE），以刻画推理演化的规律性与稳定性特征。

Result: 发现隐式CoT具有结构化的非随机动态行为，分为两类稳定性：CODI呈现稳定吸引子特性，而COCONUT表现为不稳定扩张系统；SIM-CoT监督能提升两者稳定性，但不改变其本质动态模式。

Conclusion: 该框架显著增强了对隐式思维链推理动态的理解与可解释性，为设计更高效、更可控的隐式推理模型提供了理论支持与实践指导。

Abstract: Recent latent reasoning methods, such as CODI and COCONUT, face a fundamental interpretability problem: they maintain multiple superimposed candidate traces in the hidden space at each step, unlike explicit- CoT, which follows a single transparent reasoning trace. Existing mechanistic methods show compression, shortcuts, and superposition without explaining how reasoning evolves across latent steps. To address this gap, we model latent token sequences as trajectories in representation space and apply dynamical systems analysis to characterize the evolution of reasoning. Using quantitative measures, such as step-to-step change, direction consistency, and Lyapunov sensitivity, alongside qualitative projections, such as UMAP and DMD/PHATE, we show that latent CoT exhibits structured, non-random dynamics with two distinct stability classes. CODI behaves as a stable attractor, while COCONUT behaves as an unstable expanding system, and SIM-CoT supervision tightens both behaviors without changing the underlying dynamics. This framework advances the interpretability of latent CoT reasoning dynamics and provides actionable insights for improving latent reasoning performance. Code1 and Project page2 available online.

</details>


### [455] [YUKTI: From Natural-Language Situations to Robust, Verifiable Decisions An Uncertainty-Typed Proposition IR, Assumption-Robust Pareto Frontiers, and a Regret Certificate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09706)
*Suyash Mishra*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: YUKTI introduces a robust, assumption-aware decision-making framework using typed-proposition graphs with uncertainty and provenance, enabling distributional Pareto hand-offs and Assumption-Robust Pareto Frontiers (ARPF) to measure decision resilience. It outperforms traditional single-objective, point-coefficient methods by reducing mean and tail regret by over 90%, improves auditability, and demonstrates strong performance on real-world datasets and regulated decisions.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Traditional language model-based optimization pipelines rely on fixed, point-valued coefficients and single objectives, making them fragile when assumptions are incorrect. Real-world decisions involving budget, effort, or clinical attention require robustness to uncertainty and better traceability.

Method: YUKTI uses a typed-proposition graph with shape priors, coefficient uncertainty, and provenance tracking. It employs exact, nonlinear, and evolutionary solvers across stages, couples them via distributional Pareto hand-offs, and introduces ARPF to resample assumptions (including epsilon-contamination) to compute survival probability (rho), which bounds decision regret.

Result: YUKTI reduces mean and tail regret by over 90% under misspecification; achieves superior performance in regulated commercial decisions with auditable risk pricing; outperforms status quo and naive rules by 34% and 4% respectively on a public dataset of 41,188 decisions; and shows LLMs alone incur ~47x more regret than YUKTI even with correct inputs.

Conclusion: YUKTI shifts the focus from pure autoformulation to assumption-robust decision-making. An LLM is effective as a formulator but not a solver. The framework enables reliable, auditable, and resilient planning under uncertainty, especially critical in long-range causal settings where forward propagation fails.

Abstract: Language models turn a worded situation into a numeric plan, and the dominant pipelines (NL4Opt, OptiMUS, ORLM, OR-LLM-Agent) commit to a single objective and point-valued coefficients, then solve once. For decisions that allocate real budget, effort, or clinical attention, that confidence is the failure mode: every objectified number is an assumption, and a plan optimal only if the guesses are exactly right is fragile -- mimicry of computation. YUKTI changes the target of autoformulation. Its representation is a typed-proposition graph whose relationships carry shape priors, coefficient uncertainty, and provenance. YUKTI routes each stage to an exact, nonlinear, or evolutionary solver; couples stages by a distributional Pareto hand-off; and introduces Assumption-Robust Pareto Frontiers (ARPF), resampling assumptions (including structural epsilon-contamination) to score how often each action survives (rho). We prove a bound making rho an exact factor of decision regret, add auditable traceability, and synthesize a benchmark-faithful data foundation when none exists (SRJANA). We validate three ways: under controlled misspecification the robust compromise cuts mean and tail regret by over 90% versus a naive point plan; on a regulated commercial decision we optimize inside a lawful action space and price the downside in euros; and on a real public dataset of 41,188 decisions an out-of-sample backtest beats the logged status quo by 34% and a naive point rule by 4% while reducing the optimizer's curse. The solvers are standard; we claim no benchmark-SOTA win. A head-to-head shows an LLM given the correct numbers, and single-objective optimization, both incur about 47x the held-out regret of YUKTI -- an LLM is a formulator, not a solver. Under long-range causal coupling, the forward hand-off becomes unsound, locating where it must become a backward-induction causal policy.

</details>


### [456] [GES-TSP: Graph Edge Sparsification for TSP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09708)
*Tianfeng Chen,Xianyue Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于学习的图边稀疏化方法GES，用于欧几里得旅行商问题（TSP），通过融合几何结构信息和组合优化技术，自适应地为不同实例生成稀疏图，显著减少图规模并加速求解。实验表明，在MATILDA数据集上可剪枝高达95%的边，且解与最优值差距小于1%；在TSPLIB基准上表现出强泛化能力，部分大规模实例剪枝率超99%，最优性差距仍低于1%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统图稀疏化方法依赖固定启发式规则，未能充分利用实例特有的结构信息，导致计算效率提升有限。为克服这一局限，需发展一种能自适应利用实例结构特征的稀疏化方法。

Method: 提出Graph Edge Sparsification（GES）方法，结合几何结构信息与组合优化技术，通过学习机制自适应生成适用于不同实例的稀疏图，从而降低图的复杂度并提升求解速度。

Result: 在MATILDA数据集上实现最高95%的边剪枝率，解质量与最优值差距小于1%；在TSPLIB上展现强泛化能力，部分大实例剪枝率超过99%，最优性差距保持在1%以内。

Conclusion: GES是一种高效且具有强泛化能力的基于学习的图稀疏化方法，能显著降低欧几里得TSP实例的求解复杂度，同时保证高质量解，适用于大规模实际应用。

Abstract: Solving large-scale instances of the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) exactly is computationally expensive. Researchers often employ graph sparsification methods to improve computational efficiency. Traditional sparsification methods typically rely on fixed heuristics and fail to fully exploit instance-specific structural information. In this paper, we propose Graph Edge Sparsification (GES), a learning-based sparsification approach for Euclidean TSP. By incorporating geometric structural information and combinatorial optimization technology, our proposed method adaptively generates a sparsification graph for different instances, significantly reducing the graph size and accelerating the solving process. Experimental results demonstrate that our sparsification method can prune up to 95% of edges on the MATILDA dataset, while keeping the solution gap within 1% of the optimal value. Moreover, our approach exhibits strong generalization capability on the TSPLIB benchmark.In some large-scale instances, the pruning rate exceeds 99%, while the optimality gap remains below 1%.

</details>


### [457] [The Verifier is the Curriculum: Execution-Gated Self-Distillation for Cross-Family Game Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09709)
*Chenyu Zhou,Qiliang Jiang,Shuning Wu,Xu Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 通过严格的无头引擎启动过滤器（strict-launch）进行自蒸馏，显著提升了代码生成模型在未见过的游戏类型上的可运行生成率，从8.8%提升至42.2%，并实现全覆盖（25/25），且该效果非由数据量增加导致，而是源于验证器的精确性与功能性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法依赖可被操纵的评分机制优化代理特征，但可能导致生成物质量未真正提升。本文提出一种不可被游戏化的确定性验证信号——生成项目能否在无头引擎中顺利启动，以此作为训练的严格过滤标准，以确保生成结果的真实可用性。

Method: 采用严格启动（strict-launch）作为无游戏化、确定性的验证过滤器，对14B参数模型（Qwen3-14B+LoRA）进行拒绝采样自蒸馏，在GameCraft-Bench任务上进行多轮迭代优化，评估其在未见游戏类型中的生成表现，并通过对照实验分离质量与数量的影响，验证验证器的作用。

Result: 经过三轮自蒸馏，模型在四个未见游戏家族中的干净生成率从8.8%提升至42.2%（每候选），最佳生成覆盖率从18/25提升至25/25（达到黄金天花板），且每轮提升均具统计显著性；控制实验表明，该提升并非源于数据量增加，而是验证器精度所致；替换为宽松的BUILD检查后，性能回归基线，验证了严格启动过滤器的关键作用。

Conclusion: 验证器即课程：模型所学习的内容取决于验证器所认证的标准。使用严格、不可游戏化的验证信号，能有效引导模型生成真正可运行、功能完整的代码，是提升代码生成实用性的重要路径。

Abstract: Post-training a code generator against a learned judge can optimize proxy features that raise the score without improving the artifact. We study the opposite signal: a deterministic, judge-free, ungameable filter -- whether a generated project launches cleanly under a headless engine (strict-launch). Under this gate, rejection-sampling self-distillation compounds out-of-family generalization. On GameCraft-Bench (mapping a natural-language brief to a complete Godot project), a 14B model (Qwen3-14B+LoRA) distilled under strict-launch raises clean generation on four unseen game families from 8.8% to 42.2% per-candidate and best-of-K coverage from 18/25 to 25/25 (the gold ceiling) over three rounds, each a significant gain (p=0.0019, p<1e-4, p<1e-4). The gain is not from merely adding data: an exactly-matched gold-duplication control regresses below the base model (5.6% vs. 8.8%, p=0.019), while a count-matched decomposition splits the round-1-to-2 jump into comparable quality (+8.8pp) and quantity (+8.5pp) channels. Most directly, rerunning the loop with only the filter swapped -- the lenient BUILD check, which passes 99.9% of generations, in place of the launch gate -- erases the gain entirely (back to base, p=1e-3 vs. the launch-gated round), isolating verifier precision rather than the optimizer. A second ungameable signal, headless execution grounding, rises monotonically across rounds and yields far more grounded candidates than gold-duplication at a matched budget (16 vs. 5), confirming the gains are functional, not launch-but-empty. Game generation is a verifiable testbed for one lesson: the verifier is the curriculum -- what it certifies is what the model learns.

</details>


### [458] [Closed-Loop Control with Rule-Aligned Small Language Models and Multi-Agent Self-Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09713)
*Yuchen Wang,Javal Vyas,Tong Liu,Mehmet Mercangoz*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究探索使用小型语言模型（SLM）在边缘设备上实现自主工业控制的可行性，通过结合数字孪生式验证器和迭代修正机制，实现从自然语言指令到可执行控制策略的快速生成。实验表明，该框架在热控模拟中达到91.5%的动作对齐准确率，平均推理延迟仅为3.84秒，并在符号映射下保持95%的物理范围合规率，证明SLM+验证器架构是边缘可重构自主控制的有效路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前工业自动化面临控制策略难以快速响应自然语言指令的问题，而大型云模型因延迟高、计算开销大、数据敏感等限制，难以部署于边缘闭环系统。因此亟需一种轻量、高效、可解释的控制生成方法，以支持自主系统的实时重构与部署。

Method: 采用Qwen2.5-1.5B小语言模型，通过组相对策略优化（GRPO）进行对齐，构建包含动作代理、符号化/数字孪生式验证层以及重提示修正代理的三模块协同框架，通过迭代反馈机制引导输出向有效动作收敛。

Result: 在30次随机热控仿真（每轮500步）中，框架实现91.5%的平均动作对齐准确率（86.3%–100%），平均推理延迟为3.84秒；在符号重映射下仍保持95%的物理量在范围内的合规率，表明其具备良好的物理调控鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 小型语言模型结合验证器的架构，能够在边缘设备上实现高效、可靠、可重构的自主控制，是一种具有实际应用前景的解决方案。

Abstract: A key step toward autonomous industrial operation is the ability to create and reconfigure control policies from natural-language requirement specifications, with minimal or no manual redesign. In this setting, policy generation by AI agents can be a credible path when paired with a plant-aware validator (e.g., a digital twin) that can check generated candidate actions before execution. However, practical deployment is constrained by inference latency and compute footprint: large cloud-based models are often too slow, opaque, or data-sensitive for edge closed-loop use. This work investigates whether a compact Small Language Model (SLM) can be retrained for control reasoning and embedded in a validator-guided correction loop. We use a Qwen2.5-1.5B model aligned via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), combined with (i) an action agent, (ii) a symbolic/digital-twin-style validation layer, and (iii) a reprompting agent that iteratively steers outputs toward valid actions. In randomized thermal-control simulations (30 experiments with 500 steps each), the framework achieves 91.5% average action-alignment accuracy (86.3%--100% across cases) at 3.84\,s mean inference latency. Under symbolic re-mapping, it maintains a 95% in-range rate, indicating robust physical regulation despite reduced token-level agreement. These results support SLM+validator architectures as a practical path toward reconfigurable autonomous control at the edge.

</details>


### [459] [Feedback-Coupled Memory Systems in Continuous Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09714)
*Stefano Grassi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种反馈耦合记忆系统（FCMS）的连续时间实现，通过机制基础智能（MBI）和耦合记忆图过程（CMGP）分别定义了代理更新和环境更新算子。系统表现出由可计算阈值 $4β^2 < 2ημγ^2$ 控制的李雅普诺夫全局耗散性，推广了原有的离散稳定性条件与物理分岔阈值，揭示了记忆耗散必须超过反馈增益这一普遍组织原则。数值模拟与平均场验证支持了该结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有FCMS框架中两个核心算子（代理更新和环境更新）未被明确定义，限制了其理论完备性和应用潜力，亟需构建可形式化、可计算的动态机制来实现闭环协调。

Method: 采用机制基础智能（MBI）对代理更新算子 $f_i$ 进行建模，利用分布式价格机制与经济原则实现局部更新；引入非马尔可夫的耦合记忆图过程（CMGP），将环境视为记录并响应历史轨迹的物理基底，从而定义环境更新算子 $Ψ$。在此基础上构建连续时间FCMS模型，并通过李雅普诺夫分析推导全局耗散性条件。

Result: 推导出系统的全局耗散性条件 $4β^2 < 2ημγ^2$，该条件统一了原有离散FCMS稳定性条件 $4ηβ^2 < γ$ 和CMGP的物理分岔阈值 $α_c = 1/K$，表明记忆耗散速率必须超过反馈增益是系统稳定的核心原则。数值模拟（$N=2$）和平均场分析（$N=10^6$）验证了该阈值的正确性及违反时出现自强化协调级联现象。

Conclusion: 本研究成功填补了原始FCMS框架中算子定义的空白，建立了具有理论保障和实证支持的连续时间模型，揭示了记忆与反馈之间动态平衡的普遍规律，为复杂系统中的自组织协调提供了新范式。

Abstract: The Feedback-Coupled Memory Systems (FCMS) architecture formalizes closed-loop coordination through four abstract operators, two of which - the agent update operator $f_i$ and the environmental update operator $Ψ$ - are left axiomatically undefined in the original framework. To address this, $f_i$ is defined by Mechanism-Based Intelligence (MBI), where agents update locally through a decentralized price mechanism and economic principles, and $Ψ$ is defined by the Coupled Memory Graph Process (CMGP), a non-Markovian framework where the environment is treated as a physical substrate that records and responds to trajectory history coherently without external forcing. The resulting continuous-time FCMS instantiation achieves Lyapunov global dissipativity governed by the computable threshold $4β^2 < 2ημγ^2$. This generalizes both the discrete FCMS stability condition $4ηβ^2 < γ$ and CMGP's physical bifurcation threshold $α_c = 1/K$, confirming that memory dissipation must outpace feedback gain as a universal organizing principle. Numerical simulation with $N=2$ agents and mean-field validation at $N=10^6$ confirm the stability threshold and the self-reinforcing coordination cascade that emerges when it is violated.

</details>


### [460] [AGM-like Paraconsistent Partial Meet Abductive Expansion Operation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09729)
*Ulisses Franceschi Eliano*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的双面一致性AGM类归纳扩展操作，能够在不导致认知状态荒谬化的情况下吸收矛盾的解释假设。该操作基于帕努科的早期工作，并结合了阿托查·阿利塞达的分类法，利用最近发展的双面一致性逻辑RCbr的特性，实现了传递性关系部分满足构造。这是两篇论文中的第一篇，尚未赋予双面一致性算子在认知角色上的重要地位，后续论文将在此基础上进一步完善。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AGM框架下的归纳推理操作难以处理矛盾的解释假设而不导致认知状态的荒谬化。为解决这一问题，需要一种能够容忍矛盾且不引发逻辑崩溃的新型归纳扩展操作。

Method: 基于帕努科的归纳扩展操作和阿利塞达的分类法，构建一个全新的双面一致性AGM类归纳扩展操作，采用传递性关系部分满足的构造方式，并依托于新近建立的双面一致性逻辑RCbr以确保其自扩展性等关键性质。

Result: 成功设计出首个在AGM文献中实现矛盾解释假设非平凡吸收的双面一致性归纳扩展操作，具备良好的形式化结构与逻辑稳定性，为后续引入更复杂的双面一致性算子奠定基础。

Conclusion: 本文提出的paraconsistent AGM-like abductive expansion operation是AGM文献中的首创，尽管未完全赋予双面一致性算子重要认知角色，但已证明其在处理矛盾假设方面的有效性；第二篇论文将进一步强化该系统，赋予算子更核心的认知功能。

Abstract: In his 1996 doctoral thesis, Maurice Pagnucco created the first AGM-like abductive expansion operation. Taking his operation as a basis, as well as a taxonomy -- inspired by Atocha Aliseda -- responsible for highlighting and formalizing the main components of abductive reasoning, the main aim of this paper is to present a new paraconsistent AGM-like abductive expansion operation -- capable of assimilating contradictory explanatory hypotheses without trivialization and the consequent absurd epistemic state -- with its postulates and its transitively relational partial meet construction. To a large extent, the formal development presented in this paper was only made possible by the recent creation of the paraconsistent logic RCbr, an LFI (Logics of Formal Inconsistencies) that establishes properties especially relevant to belief revision contexts, in particular, the ability to be self-extensional -- i.e., to satisfy the replacement property. This is the first of two papers: the paraconsistent abductive expansion operation announced here -- which is part of a new system called AGMpabd -- despite bringing many interesting features, does not assign any relevant epistemic role to the paraconsistent operators of negation and consistency. Only in a second paper will an analogous paraconsistent abductive expansion operation -- which is part of another new system, AGMcircabd -- be enhanced in this direction. Nevertheless, to the best of my knowledge, the operation developed in this paper is the first of its kind in the AGM literature.

</details>


### [461] [Coresets Before Score Sets: Evaluation-Unsupervised Prompt Subset Selection for LLM Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09739)
*Jihan Yao,Gantavya Bhatt,Arnav Das,Peter Jin,Ke Bao,Qiaolin Yu,Khushi Bhardwaj,Chang Su,Jialei Wang,Yikai Zhu,Sugam Devare,Damon Mosk-Aoyama,Zhen Dong,Venkat Krishna Srinivasan,Yineng Zhang,Oleksii Kuchaiev,Jiantao Jiao,Banghua Zhu,Jeff Bilmes*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究大语言模型（LLM）基准测试的压缩问题，提出一种无需模型评估结果的评价无监督基准核心集选择方法。该方法在细粒度上从多个基准中选取少量提示，利用子模函数（如设施选址、确定性点过程、互信息等）进行优化，在35个异构基准、18个前沿LLM和超过6万条提示的大规模数据集上表现优异。实验表明，仅依赖廉价语义提示嵌入的设施选址函数在多种核心集预算下均优于12种基于评分或多样性的基线方法。此外，该方法在需选择少数完整基准且有大量模型评分可用的场景下，也能在MMLU和MTEB排行榜上达到或超越现有最优方法，且计算成本更低。结果表明，子模性是实现基准压缩的强大而可靠的工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试套件规模庞大，导致评估成本高昂。如何高效压缩基准测试集，同时保持模型性能评分与排名的准确性，成为关键挑战。传统方法多依赖模型评估结果或粗粒度筛选，缺乏效率与精度平衡。本文旨在设计一种无需模型评估、可在细粒度上选择提示的核心集方法，以降低评估开销并提升压缩效果。

Method: 采用子模集合选择框架，设计多种子模函数（包括设施选址、确定性点过程、子模互信息等），在不使用任何模型输出的前提下，基于提示的语义嵌入进行核心集选择。通过最大化子模目标函数，实现对原始基准测试集的有效压缩。

Result: 在35个异构基准、18个前沿LLM和超6万条提示的大规模实验中，设施选址函数在不同核心集预算下均显著优于12个基线方法，能更准确地保留原始模型评分与排名。在有限模型评分可用的场景下，该方法在MMLU和MTEB榜单上表现媲美甚至超越当前最优方法，且计算成本大幅降低。

Conclusion: 子模性为基准测试压缩提供了强大而可靠的方法论基础。提出的评价无监督核心集选择方法在效率与保真度之间取得良好平衡，适用于多种实际评估场景，具有广泛的应用前景。

Abstract: We study LLM benchmark coreset selection: selecting a small subset of prompts over multiple benchmarks whose induced model scores and rankings approximate those obtained from the full benchmark suite. In evaluation-unsupervised benchmark coreset selection (our approach), the selection algorithm uses no model evaluation outcomes, and operates on a fine granularity by producing subsets of prompts over multiple benchmarks rather than producing a sub-collection of entire benchmarks. We use submodular subset selection, and we develop and evaluate many different submodular functions for this purpose, including determinantal point process (DPP) based approaches, submodular mutual information functions, and facility location-based functions. On a new large-scale suite of 35 heterogeneous benchmarks spanning five different capability categories, 18 frontier LLMs, and over 61K prompts, we find that the facility location (FL) function operating exclusively on inexpensive semantic prompt embeddings preserves LLM scores better than twelve separate score-based and diversity-based baselines, across a range of coreset budgets. Moreover, we show our proposed objective is not limited to the evaluation-unsupervised regime: in the setting where only a handful of whole benchmarks must be selected and a large amount of model scores are available, the same objective matches or outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on the MMLU and MTEB leaderboards, while being substantially cheaper to compute. Together, our results suggest that submodularity, in general, is a strong and reliable tool for benchmark compression.

</details>


### [462] [A Dynamic Scene Interaction Reasoning Framework for Scene-level Lane-Change Intention and Trajectory Prediction of Multiple Interacting Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09740)
*Joshua Kofi Asamoah,Blessing Agyei Kyem,Eugene Denteh,Armstrong Aboah*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种动态场景图注意力框架（DSiGAT），用于预测局部交通场景中每个相关车辆的变道意图和未来轨迹。通过将交通场景建模为随时间变化的交互图，车辆作为节点，其空间和运动关系通过显式边特征编码。利用时序图注意力消息传递捕捉车辆间的动态依赖关系和变道前的线索，意图引导解码器将每个预测的驾驶行为与其对应的未来运动关联起来。同时引入场景级一致性目标，促进多车未来状态的一致性。在NGSIM I-80、NGSIM US-101和highD数据集上的实验表明，该方法在意图预测准确率和轨迹预测精度上均优于现有基线，意图预测准确率分别达到90.12%和90.97%，轨迹均方根误差（RMSE）相比最强基线降低52.94%，且碰撞率与联合位移误差更低，说明预测更具协同性。消融实验、敏感性分析、鲁棒性分析及定性分析进一步验证了各组件的有效性和场景聚焦设计的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有车道变换预测方法多集中于单一目标车辆，而多智能体预测方法通常仅提供未来位置信息，缺乏对每辆车具体驾驶行为的明确描述。为提升高级驾驶辅助系统和自动驾驶车辆中的安全运动规划能力，需要更准确地理解交通场景的演化趋势，特别是对多车协同行为和意图的联合预测。

Method: 提出动态场景图注意力框架（DSiGAT），将交通场景表示为时间变化的交互图，车辆作为节点，通过显式边特征编码空间与运动关系；采用时序图注意力机制捕获车辆间动态依赖与变道前线索；设计意图引导解码器将驾驶意图与未来轨迹匹配；引入场景级一致性目标，确保多车未来状态协调一致。

Result: 在NGSIM I-80、US-101和highD数据集上，DSiGAT在意图预测准确率上分别达到90.12%和90.97%，轨迹RMSE降低最多达52.94%；同时降低车辆间碰撞率与联合位移误差，实现更连贯的多车场景预测。

Conclusion: DSiGAT通过图结构建模与意图引导的联合预测机制，显著提升了多车场景下车道变换意图与轨迹预测的准确性与一致性，验证了场景聚焦范式在复杂交通预测任务中的有效性。

Abstract: Safe motion planning in advanced driver-assistance systems and autonomous vehicles requires an accurate understanding of how the surrounding traffic scene is likely to evolve. However, many existing lane-change prediction methods remain centered on a single target vehicle, while multi-agent forecasting approaches often describe scene evolution only through future positions and provide limited explicit information about the maneuver associated with each vehicle. This study proposes a dynamic scene graph attention framework that predicts the lane-change intention and future trajectory of every relevant vehicle within a local traffic scene. The scene is represented as a time-varying interaction graph in which vehicles are modeled as nodes and their spatial and kinematic relationships are encoded through explicit edge features. Temporal graph-attention message passing captures evolving inter-vehicle dependencies and pre-maneuver cues, while an intention-guided decoder links each predicted maneuver to its corresponding future motion. A scene-level consistency objective further encourages compatible multi-vehicle futures. Experiments on the NGSIM I-80, NGSIM US-101, and highD datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over competing baselines. DSiGAT achieves intention prediction accuracies of 90.12% and 90.97% on NGSIM I-80 and US-101, respectively, and reduces trajectory RMSE by up to 52.94% relative to the strongest baseline. It also produces lower inter-agent collision rates and joint displacement errors, indicating more coherent scene-level predictions. Ablation, sensitivity, robustness, and qualitative analyses further validate the contribution of the proposed components and the effectiveness of the scene-focused formulation.

</details>


### [463] [Scaffolding the Strategist: Architecture-Dependent Reasoning Interventions in Hotelling Spatial Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09743)
*Pratyush Singh*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究探讨结构化推理干预是否能提升大语言模型的战略经济推理能力，以及其效果是否依赖于模型架构。通过霍特林线性城市模型作为诊断工具，评估GPT-4.1-mini（标准指令跟随模型）和GPT-5-mini（推理优化模型）在五种条件下的表现，涵盖八道问题、三种提示框架及每条件三轮重复，共720个独立评分。结果显示，支架类型与模型架构存在显著交叉作用（t(7) = 4.79, p = 0.002, d = 1.69）：承诺支架提升标准模型（+0.21），但损害推理模型（-0.63）；原则性分离则相反（-0.40 vs. +0.31）。两种交叉效应均显著，且在全部八道题中方向一致性达7/8。对抗性压力测试对两模型均有负面影响，推理模型受损程度是标准模型的2.6倍（-1.47 vs. -0.57；p = 0.038），且损伤与基础难度负相关（R² = 0.36, p = 0.014）。此外，发现两模型存在持续的陈述性-程序性差距：识别正确策略的能力远高于执行能力；原则性分离可完全弥合推理模型的该差距，而其他干预对标准模型无效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究结构化推理干预对大语言模型战略经济推理能力的影响，特别是不同模型架构下干预效果的差异，以揭示模型在复杂推理任务中的局限性与改进路径。

Method: 采用霍特林线性城市模型作为诊断工具，评估GPT-4.1-mini和GPT-5-mini在五种条件（无支架基线与四种推理干预）下的表现，覆盖八道问题（涵盖演绎与归纳推理）、三种提示框架及每条件三轮重复，共720个独立评分，通过统计分析检验干预效果与模型架构的交互作用，并进行对抗性压力测试与差距分析。

Result: 发现支架类型与模型架构存在显著交叉作用：承诺支架提升标准模型但损害推理模型，而原则性分离则相反；两种效应均显著且在多数问题上具方向一致性。对抗性压力测试对推理模型造成更大伤害，且损伤与基础难度负相关。两模型普遍存在陈述性-程序性差距，原则性分离可完全弥合推理模型的差距，其他干预对标准模型无效。

Conclusion: 结构化推理干预的效果高度依赖模型架构，单一干预无法普适适用。原则性分离对推理优化模型有效，而承诺支架对标准模型更优。模型在识别策略与执行策略之间存在显著差距，需针对性干预。对抗性环境会加剧模型缺陷，尤其影响推理优化模型。未来模型设计应考虑任务特性与干预适配性。

Abstract: We investigate whether structured reasoning interventions improve the strategic economic reasoning of large language models, and whether their effects depend on model architecture. Using Hotelling's linear city model as a diagnostic vehicle, we evaluate GPT-4.1-mini (a standard instruction-following model) and GPT-5-mini (a reasoning-optimized model) under five conditions - an unscaffolded baseline and four reasoning interventions - across eight questions spanning deductive and abductive reasoning, three prompt framings, and three repetitions per condition, yielding 720 individually judged responses. We find a statistically significant crossover interaction between scaffolding type and model architecture ($t(7) = 4.79$, $p = 0.002$, $d = 1.69$): commitment scaffolding improves the standard model ($+0.21$) while degrading the reasoning model ($-0.63$), and principled separation shows the opposite pattern ($-0.40$ vs. $+0.31$). Both crossovers are individually significant (commitment: $p = 0.040$; separation: $p = 0.002$) and hold across all eight questions with 7/8 directional consistency. Adversarial stress-testing harms both models, with $2.6\times$ greater degradation for the reasoning model ($-1.47$ vs. $-0.57$; $p = 0.038$), and the damage correlates negatively with baseline difficulty ($R^2 = 0.36$, $p = 0.014$). We further document a persistent declarative-procedural gap in which both models identify correct strategies at rates far exceeding their ability to execute them; separation fully closes this gap for the reasoning model while no intervention helps the standard model.

</details>


### [464] [A Theory of Least Autonomy in AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09744)
*Christophe Parisel*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出将传统“最小权限”原则推广为适用于智能代理系统的“最小自主性”原则，以应对代理间权限组合、批准和扩大的复杂性。通过引入结构化爆炸半径d(a,b)衡量企业层级中动作间的隔离程度，构建有向代理影响图G(theta)，基于资源读写共享或代理间通信触发的条件来建模影响潜力，并定义了基于图可达性的共谋谓词，用于检测权限组合、决策操纵和跨域能力整合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统最小权限原则无法有效应对智能代理系统中权限的动态组合、跨工作流及系统边界的放大问题，亟需新的访问控制范式。

Method: 提出三部分方法：1）使用超度量树与格值保密性、完整性及控制上下文标签结合，定义动作间的结构性爆炸半径；2）构建有向代理影响图G(theta)，基于共享资源写-读会面或代理间通信会面条件，设定影响潜力阈值theta；3）设计基于图可达性的共谋谓词，用于识别权限协同与能力复合行为。

Result: 成功建立了一套形式化理论框架，可对智能代理系统中的自主性风险进行量化评估与审计，支持策略校准与违规检测。

Conclusion: 最小自主性是适应智能代理系统的更优访问控制原则，本文提出的理论工具为实现安全、可审计的代理协作提供了坚实基础。

Abstract: Least privilege, the principle that an identity should hold only the permissions strictly required for its task, has been a foundational primitive of access control for decades. We argue that this principle is insufficient for agentic AI systems, which do not merely hold permissions but can combine, approve, and amplify them across workflows and system boundaries.
  We propose least autonomy as an appropriate generalization and develop a formal theory. First, we define a compositional blast radius d(a,b) that measures structural separation between actions in an enterprise hierarchy, combining an ultrametric tree with lattice-valued confidentiality, integrity, and control-context labels. Second, we define a directed agent influence graph G(theta). An arc from U to V requires a directed shared-resource write-to-read meeting or a conservative undirected agent-to-agent (A2A) communication meeting, and a meeting-conditioned influence potential at or above an externally selected policy threshold theta. A catalogue-radius profile supports calibration and audit of theta. Finally, we define a collusion predicate over graph reachability that detects authorization composition, decision manipulation, and cross-domain capability composition.

</details>


### [465] [SupplyNetPy: An Open-Source Python Library for High-Fidelity Modeling and Simulation of Arbitrary Supply Chain and Inventory Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09745)
*Tushar Lone,Neha Karanjkar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SupplyNetPy 是一个开源、文档齐全的 Python 库，用于建模和仿真具有任意多级结构的供应链网络，支持多种补货策略、易腐库存、节点中断以及随机需求和提前期。所有组件可通过继承扩展，用户通过定义带有属性的图来描述供应链，库负责仿真并生成日志及详细的节点与网络级性能报告。本文介绍了其动机、设计、核心功能与架构，并提供了详细的验证结果（与解析基准、商业工具和已发表案例研究对比）。开发 SupplyNetPy 的关键动机是实现复杂模型的程序化生成与仿真，支持设计空间探索、假设分析、训练数据生成和供应链数字孪生。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现复杂供应链模型的程序化生成与仿真，支持设计空间探索、假设分析、训练数据生成和供应链数字孪生。

Method: 通过构建一个基于图的供应链网络建模框架，利用 Python 实现可扩展的离散事件仿真，用户以节点和边属性定义供应链结构，库自动处理仿真过程并输出详细报告。

Result: SupplyNetPy 成功实现了对多级供应链网络的灵活建模与仿真，验证结果显示其结果与解析基准、商业工具及公开案例高度一致，具备良好的准确性与实用性。

Conclusion: SupplyNetPy 是一个强大且灵活的开源工具，适用于复杂供应链的建模、仿真与分析，为研究者和实践者提供了一个高效、可扩展的平台，支持从设计优化到数字孪生的多种应用场景。

Abstract: This paper introduces SupplyNetPy, an open-source, well-documented Python library for modeling and discrete-event simulation of supply chain networks with arbitrary multi-echelon structures. It supports multiple replenishment policies, perishable inventory, node disruptions, and stochastic demand and lead times. All components are extensible via inheritance. Users describe a supply chain as a graph with node and link attributes, while the library handles simulation, providing logs and extensive node and network level performance reports. This paper presents the motivation, design, key features, and architecture of SupplyNetPy, along with detailed validation results (against analytical benchmarks, a commercial tool, and a published case study). A key motivation behind SupplyNetPy's development is programmatic generation and simulation of complex models, enabling design-space exploration, what-if analysis, training data generation, and supply chain digital twins.

</details>


### [466] [Replicating Belief, Not Bits: Epistemic State Replication for Agentic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09748)
*Jun He,Deying Yu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出面向智能体分布式系统的信念复制框架Epistemic State Replication (ESR)，旨在解决传统状态机复制在随机性、生成式智能体场景下的局限性。传统方法要求比特级一致，但在智能体系统中，不同副本可能因随机推理路径产生差异，但语义上仍正确。因此，该文主张以‘信念’而非‘比特’作为复制目标，将状态分为确定性证据日志（L）和可变的信念谱系（B），并引入语义线性化与有界最终一致性等新形式化安全机制，支持可验证的语义回滚与增量更新，原型验证了其可行性并降低了次生认知错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统状态机复制依赖确定性与比特级一致，但在包含生成式模型的智能体分布式系统中，副本可能因随机推理、摘要差异、分词边界不同而产生非一致状态，但依然达成语义正确的决策。强制比特一致会牺牲灵活性、导致上下文遗忘，并影响性能。因此需要一种新的复制范式，从关注数据一致性转向关注知识与信念的一致性。

Method: 提出Epistemic State Replication (ESR)框架，将节点状态定义为信念对K = (L, B)，其中L为不可变的证据日志，B为可变的信念谱系。引入两套形式化保障：1）语义线性化（Semantic Linearizability），确保操作反映验证器约束下的最新语义意义；2）有界最终一致性（Bounded Eventual Coherence），在公平交付、单调证据、有限验证干扰及收缩嫁接算子条件下，限制预期语义偏差。设计基于结构化信念增量的传播协议，以及可验证语义回滚机制，用于清除错误前提而不丢失上下文。

Result: 原型实现表明，在给定假设下ESR具有可行性。模拟结果展示其能有效减少由于信念分歧引发的次生认知错误，同时保持执行灵活性与语义正确性，优于传统比特复制方案在复杂智能体环境中的表现。

Conclusion: 在智能体驱动的分布式系统中，应以信念一致性取代传统的比特一致性。通过引入ESR框架及其配套的形式化机制与协议，可在保证语义正确性的前提下提升系统鲁棒性与灵活性，为下一代自主分布式系统提供理论与实践基础。

Abstract: In distributed systems, the classical State Machine Replication (SMR) model assumes that correct replicas execute deterministic transitions to yield identical bitwise states. However, the rise of agentic distributed systems -- where autonomous, stochastic, and model-driven agents orchestrate infrastructure -- presents scenarios where deterministic, bitwise replication is insufficient. Replicas operating with generative models may exhibit divergent reasoning paths, summaries, and token boundaries, yet reach semantically equivalent and correct operational decisions. Forcing bitwise agreement across these stochastic participants degrades execution flexibility, induces context amnesia, and limits performance.
  We argue that in such settings replicas should agree on belief, not bits. We propose Epistemic State Replication (ESR), a belief-replication layer for agentic distributed systems that shifts the replication boundary from data visibility to knowledge visibility. We formalize the epistemic node state as a pair K = (L, B) separating the deterministic, immutable evidence log (L) from the stochastic, evolving belief lineage (B). To govern execution safety, we define Semantic Linearizability, which requires operations to reflect the latest committed operational meaning within a verifier-bounded semantic compatibility metric, and Bounded Eventual Coherence, which bounds expected semantic divergence under fair delivery, monotonic evidence, bounded verifier disturbance, and a contractive graft operator. We outline protocols for propagating derived insights using structured epistemic deltas, and formalize Verifiable Semantic Rollbacks to prune faulty premises from belief lineages without inducing context amnesia. We prototype ESR and report preliminary simulation results that show feasibility under the stated assumptions and illustrate reductions in secondary cognitive faults.

</details>


### [467] [Task-Conditioned Synthetic Data Generation for Improving Machine Learning Performance in Agricultural Prediction Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09751)
*Hamid Ebrahimy,Moritz Lucas,Martin Atzmueller*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种任务条件化的合成数据生成（TCSDG）算法，结合贝叶斯网络生成器与基于Transformer的表格基础模型（TabICL），用于提升农业预测任务中机器学习模型的性能。在作物产量预测和作物类型分类两个任务上，TCSDG在多数实验条件下均显著优于六种基准合成数据生成方法，且在聚合层面持续提升模型表现。结果表明，精心设计的合成数据可有效改善精准农业中的机器学习效果。代码已开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于训练数据的数量和质量直接影响机器学习算法的性能，而在农业领域常面临参考数据有限或不完整的问题，因此需要一种有效的方法来增强数据集，以提升模型性能。合成数据生成（SDG）被视为解决此问题的可行方案，但现有方法在复杂农业场景下表现有限，亟需更高效、更具适应性的生成策略。

Method: 提出任务条件化的合成数据生成（TCSDG）算法，融合教师-学生知识迁移与上下文学习思想，利用贝叶斯网络作为生成器，配合基于Transformer的表格式基础模型（TabICL）进行数据生成，并通过多任务、多站点、多数据比例的实验验证其有效性。

Result: 在12个研究地点、两种训练数据比例、四种数据扩增比率及三种预测模型的组合下，使用TCSDG生成的数据使作物类型分类任务的模型性能提升出现在89%的实验中，作物产量预测任务则为74%；且TCSDG是唯一在两类任务上均持续提升整体性能的方法，显著优于其他六种基准方法。

Conclusion: 经过精心设计和处理的合成数据能够有效提升机器学习在精准农业应用中的表现。TCSDG提供了一个实用且可扩展的合成数据生成框架，具有广泛的应用前景。其完整实现已公开发布于GitHub。

Abstract: Machine Learning (ML) algorithms have been widely used to estimate agricultural variables across diverse contexts. However, because the quantity and quality of training data strongly influence performance of ML algorithms, their use can be constrained by limited or incomplete reference data. Synthetic Data Generation (SDG) offers a practical approach to address this issue by producing artificial but realistic samples that preserve key characteristics of the original data. Building on teacher-student knowledge transfer and in-context learning for tabular data, this study proposes a Task-Conditioned SDG (TCSDG) algorithm that pairs a Bayesian Network generator with a transformer-based tabular foundation model (TabICL). The proposed algorithm was evaluated on two agricultural prediction tasks: crop yield prediction and crop type classification. Six benchmark SDG algorithms were also utilized to compare their performance with that of TCSDG. Across twelve study sites, two training-data fractions, four multiplication ratios, and three predictive ML algorithms, augmenting the original data with TCSDG-generated synthetic data improved ML performance in 89% of the crop type classification experiments and 74% of the crop yield prediction experiments. TCSDG also substantially outperformed benchmark SDG algorithms and was the only method to consistently improve ML performance across both tasks at the aggregate level. The study demonstrates that carefully designed and processed synthetic data can improve ML performance in precision-agriculture applications. TCSDG offers a practical and extensible framework for generating synthetic data that supports downstream ML agricultural prediction. The full implementation of TCSDG is publicly available as open source at https://github.com/HamidEbrahimy/TCSDG.

</details>


### [468] [LegalFarePlan: A Label-Setting Framework for Fare-Transparent Urban Rail Route Planning under Non-Additive Fare Rules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09755)
*Tanghui Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文提出LegalFarePlan框架，用于在非加性票价系统下进行可解释的路线规划，通过显式建模合法出站与重新进入操作，结合时间预算和拆分限制，计算多段付费行程的最优路径。采用多种算法（如Dijkstra、贪心拆分、精确标签设置等）进行评估，在半合成数据集上，71.11%的出行对实现了票价降低，平均降幅3.78，最大降幅9.0，验证了方法的有效性和可复现性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市轨道交通票价系统可能存在非加性特性，即单程票价可能高于多个合法分段行程票价之和。为应对这一复杂性，需一种透明、可审计的路径规划方法，以识别潜在的票价优化策略，同时满足运营规则与时间约束。

Method: 提出LegalFarePlan框架，将合法出站与重新进入操作建模为可审计的约束条件；集成多种算法包括最短时间Dijkstra、直接路径规划、贪心拆分、有界精确标签设置及帕累托前沿搜索，支持在给定网络、票价函数、换乘规则、进出站成本、额外时间预算和拆分上限条件下生成可解释的路线方案。

Result: 在57个站点的半合成基准测试中，有71.11%的起讫对发现票价降低，平均降幅为3.78个票价单位，最大降幅达9.0个票价单位，且在45分钟额外时间预算内实现，表明该方法能有效识别票价优化机会。

Conclusion: LegalFarePlan框架能够有效处理非加性票价系统下的路径规划问题，提供透明、可解释的解决方案，其结果具有良好的可复现性，但不构成对任何实际运营商（如MTR）的实证结论。

Abstract: Urban rail fare systems may be non-additive: the fare of a single paid journey from an origin to a destination can differ from the sum of fares over multiple legally separated journey legs. This paper presents LegalFarePlan, a fare-transparent route-planning framework that models legal exit-and-reentry operations as explicit, auditable constraints. Given a transit network, fare function, transfer rules, station-level exit/re-entry costs, an extra-time budget, and a split limit, the planner computes explainable route plans over paid journey segments. The artifact implements Dijkstra shortest-time and direct route-planner baselines, a greedy split heuristic, bounded exact label-setting, and Pareto-frontier search. Evaluation uses controlled synthetic data and a 57-station semi-synthetic benchmark with 360 OD pairs. On the semi-synthetic benchmark, bounded exact search identifies positive modeled fare reductions for 71.11% of OD pairs, with mean reduction 3.78 and maximum reduction 9.0 synthetic fare units under a 45-minute extra-time budget. These results demonstrate method behavior and reproducibility; they are not empirical conclusions about MTR or any transit operator.

</details>


### [469] [BatteryLake: Agentic, Physics-Grounded Curation of Heterogeneous Battery Aging Data and Benchmarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09762)
*Tianwen Zhu,Hao Wang,Yonggang Wen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: BatteryLake提出一个基于代理的物理驱动数据湖仓框架，将公开电池老化数据转化为可直接用于基准测试的资产。通过LLM代理提取元数据并生成数据转换器，结合人机协作验证机制，确保数据的准确性与物理合理性。发布了一个包含41个数据集的开放基准，涵盖标准化的SOH和RUL任务、多种划分协议及8类基线模型。平台、基准与协议均已开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公开电池老化数据因格式不统一、元数据分散、缺乏清晰架构而难以有效利用；传统数据整理依赖人工且难以复现，通用数据集成工具又忽略电化学时序数据的领域特性。

Method: 采用基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能代理系统，自动提取元数据并生成数据转换器，所有输出均基于原始证据，无依据时则拒绝生成；引入人机协同验证机制，通过26项规则（包括结构、统计与物理合理性）筛选数据；构建标准化的数据湖仓架构，实现数据的可追溯、可复现与可扩展管理。

Result: 成功构建了包含41个来自25+机构的数据集的开放基准，支持标准化的健康状态（SOH）与剩余使用寿命（RUL）预测任务，提供三种数据划分协议和八类基线模型。平台与完整流程开源，显著提升数据可用性与研究可复现性。

Conclusion: BatteryLake通过融合人工智能与领域知识，实现了对公共电池数据的高效、可信、可扩展的自动化治理，为电池健康管理研究提供了高质量、标准化的数据基础设施。

Abstract: Public battery aging datasets are a critical asset for advanced health management, but their practical use is often limited by inconsistent formats, unclear schemas, and metadata scattered across repositories and publications. Current curation remains largely manual and hard to reproduce, while general-purpose data integration tools miss the domain-specific semantics of electrochemical time-series data. We present BatteryLake, a governed data lakehouse that turns raw public battery data into benchmark-ready assets through an agentic, physics-grounded curation framework, with three contributions. First, LLM agents extract metadata and synthesize dataset-specific converters, grounding every output in verbatim evidence and abstaining when none supports a value. Second, a human-in-the-loop mechanism frames verification as selective prediction and gates admitted data through 26 schema, statistical, and physical-plausibility rules. Third, we release an open benchmark of 41 datasets from over 25 institutions, with standardized SOH and RUL tasks, three split protocols, and eight baseline model families. The platform, benchmark, and curation protocol are publicly available at https://tianwen1209.github.io/batterylake/.

</details>


### [470] [How Much Does Correctness Cost? Budgeted Placement of Strong Correctors in a Weak Multi-Agent Swarm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09765)
*Igor Itkin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究如何以最低成本部署少量强效‘预言机’来引导大量廉价且不可靠的代理达成正确共识。通过建模为图上的共识问题，每个预言机以代价耦合的凹强度固定一个节点，用相干性 H(R) = tr M(R)^{-1} 衡量质量。研究发现，即使预言机强度不同，H 仍保持次模性，因此贪心算法可在任意预算下达到最优解的 1-1/e 逼近。进一步推导出预算-精度前沿 B*(ε)，即保证 ε 精度所需的最小支出：在完全图上可得闭式解，当预言机成本相同时可求出最少预言机数量 k*。预算分配策略取决于成本-质量曲线的曲率——递减回报偏好分散部署；实验显示，该规律在 Qwen3 模型（0.6-32B）上对数学验证呈凹性，对涌现代码追踪呈凸性，表明结论具有任务依赖性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在分布式系统中，大量廉价但不可靠的代理难以达成一致，而引入少数强效、高成本的‘预言机’可纠正其偏差。然而，如何以最小成本高效部署这些预言机，是一个关键挑战。本文旨在解决预算约束下的最优预言机位置选择问题，提升系统整体一致性与效率。

Method: 将代理群体建模为图上的共识过程，每个预言机通过在特定节点施加带成本-强度耦合的凹性影响来引导共识。使用相干性指标 H(R) = tr M(R)^{-1} 量化系统一致性。证明了即使预言机强度不同，该指标仍保持次模性，从而支持使用贪心算法近似求解。进一步分析预算-精度关系，推导出预算-精度边界 B*(ε)，并结合实际模型评估不同任务下的成本-质量曲线形状。

Result: 1. H(R) 在预言机强度不同时依然保持次模性，确保贪心算法能获得至少 (1-1/e) 近似比。2. 在完全图上，预算-精度边界 B*(ε) 可解析求解；当预言机成本相同，最少预言机数 k* 可确定。3. 成本-质量曲线的曲率决定部署策略：凹性（如数学验证）倾向多而弱的预言机，凸性（如代码追踪）倾向少而强的预言机。4. 实验验证了该规律在 Qwen3 多规模模型上的任务依赖性。

Conclusion: 本研究揭示了在资源受限下优化预言机部署的关键机制：次模性保障了贪心算法的有效性，而成本-质量曲线的曲率决定了应采用集中还是分散部署策略。结果表明，最优部署方式高度依赖具体任务特性，需结合实际模型行为进行调整。

Abstract: A cheap swarm of unreliable agents can be steered to a correct consensus by a few strong, expensive "oracle" correctors. We ask how much one must spend, and where to place the oracles. We model the swarm as a consensus on a graph in which each oracle pins one node toward the truth at a cost-coupled, concave strength, and measure quality by the coherence H(R)=tr M(R)^{-1}. Our first result is that H stays submodular (each added oracle helps less than the last) even when the oracles differ in strength, so a cost-benefit greedy comes within 1-1/e of the best placement at any budget. Inverting the budget gives the budget-correctness frontier B*(eps), the least spend that guarantees an eps-correct consensus: closed-form on the complete graph, and a minimal oracle count k* when oracles cost the same. Whether a budget then buys a few strong oracles or many medium onese curvature of the cost-quality law: diminishing returns favour spreadsharply increasion. Measured onthe Qwen3 ladder (0.6-32B), the law is concave for math verificatio convex foremergent code tracing, so the verdict is genuinely task-dependent.https://github.com/YehudaItkin/budgeted-oracle-placemen

</details>


### [471] [Norm Enforcement for AI Agents: Robustly Shaping Behavior in Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09766)
*Yaowen Ye,Jacob Steinhardt*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究语言模型代理在多代理竞争环境中的规范执行机制。发现简单机制易被不一致的代理利用以获得竞争优势，即使未明确训练或提示这样做。因此提出更鲁棒的机制，关键在于长期估计代理可靠性，并对重复违规行为施加逐步升级的惩罚。在三个模拟环境和多种代理群体中，基于此原则的机制能有效抵抗滥用，同时以相当或更低的成本惩罚违规行为。结果表明，只有当规范执行机制能预见自身成为治理系统的一部分时，才能作为可扩展的杠杆来塑造代理行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多代理系统中，个体追求自身利益可能导致集体损失，如社交媒体营销代理发布误导性内容。人类社会通过规范和执行机制应对此类问题，因此需要为语言模型代理设计类似的规范执行机制，以防止不良行为。

Method: 通过构建模拟环境测试不同规范执行机制，分析其对代理行为的影响；重点研究长期可靠性评估与逐步升级惩罚策略的有效性，并与基线方法进行对比。

Result: 基于可靠性和逐步惩罚机制的方案能有效抵御代理的滥用，保持较低的惩罚成本，且在多种环境和代理配置下表现稳定。

Conclusion: 规范执行机制是调控语言模型代理行为的可扩展工具，但必须设计得能够预见并适应其自身成为系统治理一部分的现实，否则容易被利用。

Abstract: AI agents are increasingly deployed in shared environments where they pursue diverse goals and compete for rewards. This multi-agent competition can lead to behaviors that serve individual gains at collective cost -- for instance, marketing agents may post misleading content as a result of competing for engagement on social media. Human societies address such problems through norms that constrain acceptable behavior, supported by enforcement mechanisms that detect and penalize violations. Motivated by this, we study norm enforcement mechanisms for language model agents. We find that simple enforcement mechanisms are exploited by misaligned agents for competitive advantage, even when they are not explicitly trained or prompted to do so. We thus turn our attention to designing more robust mechanisms, and identify two key ingredients: estimating each agent's reliability over time, and updating this estimate with escalating penalties for repeated misbehavior. Across three simulated environments and a variety of agent populations, mechanisms built on these principles resist exploitation, while still penalizing norm violations at comparable or lower cost than baselines. Our results position norm enforcement mechanisms as scalable levers for shaping agents' behavior, but only when designed to anticipate becoming part of the system they govern. Our code and data are available at https://yaowenye.com/norm-enforcement.

</details>


### [472] [Verification of Adaptive Agentic Controllers through Finite Rule Revision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09770)
*Roberto Garrone*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对由有限符号规则、显式诊断谓词、解释日志和保留重评估组成的自适应代理控制器的有界验证协议。研究核心问题是在不依赖无限人类干预的前提下，哪些类型的控制器故障可被检测、局部修复或拒绝。框架将控制器视为可修订的有限对象，将诊断失败映射到规则级别的修改（如增删规则、优先级调整），修复后在保留的模拟种子或克隆初始状态下重新评估。实验在金融约束库存控制基准中表明：资源导致的故障无法通过单次规则修改修复；部分修复因违反阈值或护栏被拒绝；而由平滑规则引发的订单波动性故障可通过移除该规则实现一步局部修复。方法论贡献在于提供了一套可在仿真环境中测试控制器故障是否可观测、可解释、可局部修订及可重复验证的流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前工业级智能代理系统存在原型能力与生产部署之间的差距，尤其在非确定性、保密性限制、上下文受限和可观测性弱等条件下，自适应代理虽能生成合理输出，但难以验证其可靠性。现有方法往往依赖大量人工判断，缺乏系统性、可复现的验证机制，因此亟需一种无需无限人工介入即可检测、修复并验证控制器故障的方法。

Method: 将自适应代理控制器建模为具有有限符号规则、显式诊断谓词、解释日志和保留重评估的可修订对象；定义规则级编辑操作（添加、删除、优先级调整）以应对诊断失败；采用保留的模拟种子或克隆初始状态进行修复后的再评估，实现可控环境下的可重复验证。

Result: 在金融约束库存控制实验中，识别出三类结果：1）资源相关故障无法通过单一规则修改修复；2）部分修复因违反安全阈值或护栏被拒绝；3）订单波动性故障可通过移除平滑规则实现一次局部修复。验证过程支持可观测性、可解释性、局部可修性和可重复测试。

Conclusion: 本文提出的有界验证框架为自适应代理控制器提供了一种可仿真的、系统化的故障检测与修复流程，能够在不依赖无限人工干预的情况下实现对控制器行为的可观测、可解释、可局部修订与可验证，具有重要的方法论价值，适用于高风险、高复杂度的工业应用。

Abstract: Industrial agentic AI systems increasingly exhibit a gap between prototype capability and production deployment. In particular, adaptive agents may generate plausible outputs while remaining difficult to verify under non-determinism, confidentiality constraints, limited context, and weak observability. This paper formulates a bounded verification protocol for adaptive agentic controllers represented by finite symbolic rules, explicit diagnostic predicates, explanation logs, and held-out re-evaluation. The central research question is: when an adaptive agentic controller is represented through finite rules, explicit diagnostic predicates, explanation logs, and held-out re-evaluation, which classes of controller failure can be detected, locally repaired, or rejected without relying on unrestricted human-in-the-loop judgment? The proposed framework treats the controller as a finite revisable object. Diagnostic failures are mapped to predefined rule-level edits, including rule addition, rule deletion, and priority revision. Repaired controllers are then evaluated on held-out simulation seeds or cloned initial states. Experiments in a stylized financially constrained inventory-control benchmark show three outcomes: resource-induced failures that remain non-repairable by one rule edit, partial repairs that are rejected because they violate thresholds or guardrails, and a local one-step repair of an order-volatility failure induced by removing a smoothing rule. The contribution is methodological and provides a simulation-compatible procedure for testing whether specific controller-level failures can be made observable, explainable, locally revisable, and empirically re-tested under controlled conditions.

</details>


### [473] [EvoCUA-1.5: Online Reinforcement Learning for Multi-turn Computer-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09773)
*Mianqiu Huang,Taofeng Xue,Chong Peng,Jinrui Ding,Sicheng Fan,Jiale Hong,Yufei Gao,Xiaocheng Zhang,Linsen Guo,Xin Yang,Dengchang Zhao,Yuchen Xie,Peng Pei,Xunliang Xie,Xipeng Qiu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: EvoCUA-1.5 introduces a novel online reinforcement learning framework for computer-use agents, addressing challenges like sparse rewards and variable-length trajectories through Step-Level Policy Optimization (STEPO), policy-aware filtering, Dynamic Tri-Adaptive Curriculum (DTAC), and an asynchronous RL infrastructure. It achieves 63.2% success on OSWorld-Verified, outperforming large open-weight baselines.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Existing offline imitation learning and trajectory refinement cannot capture the dynamic feedback loop in real computer use, where actions alter screen states and future action spaces. A need exists for online RL that adapts through real-time interaction with executable environments.

Method: EvoCUA-1.5 employs STEPO to maintain trajectory-level advantage balance during step-level sampling, uses policy-aware filtering and pass-rate calibration for synthesized tasks, implements DTAC combining learnable tasks, difficult positive replay, and controlled infeasible-task exposure, and integrates a fully asynchronous RL system with staleness control and mini-group batching.

Result: The framework improves training stability and downstream performance, achieving 63.2% success on OSWorld-Verified, surpassing 32B/35B-scale open-weight models and approaching larger parameter-count models.

Conclusion: EvoCUA-1.5 provides a practical and effective framework for scaling online reinforcement learning in multi-turn computer-use agents, enabling robust, adaptive behavior through continuous interaction and self-improvement.

Abstract: Computer-use agents must solve long-horizon tasks through repeated interaction with partially observable, multimodal desktop environments. Although imitation learning and offline trajectory refinement provide strong priors, static traces cannot cover the causal feedback loop of real computer use: each action changes the screen state, future action space, and recovery options. EvoCUA-1.5 extends self-evolving computer-use agents from offline experience learning to online reinforcement learning, where policies interact with executable sandbox environments and improve from verifiable task outcomes. Online RL in this setting requires more than directly reusing single-turn language-RL recipes. Multi-turn interaction introduces context-managed observations, sparse terminal rewards, variable-length trajectories, and slow environment feedback. EvoCUA-1.5 addresses these challenges with Step-Level Policy Optimization (STEPO), which preserves trajectory-level advantage balance after decomposition into step-level samples; policy-aware filtering and pass-rate calibration over verifiable synthesized tasks; Dynamic Tri-Adaptive Curriculum (DTAC), which combines learnable tasks, difficult positive replay, and controlled infeasible-task exposure; and a fully asynchronous RL infrastructure with staleness control and mini-group batching.
